nodes.label: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.1Рђд
nodes.description: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.15 GB. Designing for 1-bit from training, rather than 4/8-bit post-quantization, will become the standard for edge LLMs. Expect 1-bit derivatives of the Qwen and Llama families to follow within the next quarter.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **1-bit сЃЇсѓцсЃєсѓБсЃќтГду┐њсЂїСИ╗ТхЂсЂ«жЄЈтГљтїќС╗БТЏ┐сЂФ** Рђћ Bonsai 8B сЂї1.15GB сЂДт«ЪућетЊЂУ│фсѓњуц║сЂЌсЂЪсЂЊсЂесЂДсђЂ4/8bit С║ІтЙїжЄЈтГљтїќсЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂЈтГду┐њТЎѓсЂІсѓЅ1-bit сЂДУеГУеѕсЂЎсѓІТхЂсѓїсЂїсђЂсѓесЃЃсѓИ LLM сЂ«ТеЎТ║ќсЂФсЂфсѓІтЈ»УЃйТђДсђѓТгАсЂ«тЏЏтЇіТюЪсЂД Qwen / Llama сЃЋсѓАсЃЪсЃфсЂ« 1-bit Т┤ЙућЪсЂїуХџсЂЈсЂеУдІсѓІсђѓ

nodes.description: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming.

description.en: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming.
description.ja: **AI сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсЃ╗сѓ╗сѓГсЃЦсЃфсЃєсѓБТеЎТ║ќсЂїсђїуггСИЅУђЁсЃЎсЃ│сЃђтбЃуЋїсђЇсЂесђїURL тЉйтљЇсЃЈсЃ│сЃЄсЃ│сђЇсЂЙсЂДт║ЃсЂїсѓІ** Рђћ Anthropic Mythos сЂ«ТюфУфЇтЈ»сѓбсѓ»сѓ╗сѓ╣№╝ѕтцќТ│е№╝ІтЉйтљЇУдЈтЅЄТјеТИг№╝ІсѓхсЃ╝сЃЅсЃЉсЃ╝сЃєсѓБТхЂтЄ║сЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сЂ«ухёсЂ┐тљѕсѓЈсЂЏ№╝ЅсЂ»сђЂVercelРђЊContext.ai сѓхсЃЌсЃЕсѓцсЃЂсѓДсЃ╝сЃ│СЙхт«│сЂетљїсЂўТДІжђасѓњ frontier сЃбсЃЄсЃФсѓбсѓ»сѓ╗сѓ╣тѕХтЙАсЂДтєЇТ╝ћсЂЌсЂЪсђѓ2026 Q3 сЂФсЂ»сђїсЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбсЃбсЃЄсЃФсЃЌсЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝№╝ЈТЌЕТюЪсѓбсѓ»сѓ╗сѓ╣сЂ«уггСИЅУђЁсЃЎсЃ│сЃђуњ░тбЃсђЇсЂ» SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum сЂ«тЁ▒жђџсѓ╗сѓГсЃЦсЃфсЃєсѓБсЃЎсЃ╝сѓ╣сЃЕсѓцсЃ│сѓњТ║ђсЂЪсЂЎсЂЊсЂесЂїС║Іт«ЪСИіт┐ЁжаѕтїќсЂЌсђЂсѓесЃ│сЃЅсЃЮсѓцсЃ│сЃѕ URL / сѓхсЃќсЃЅсЃАсѓцсЃ│сЂ»ТјеТИгтЏ░жЏБсЂфсЃЕсЃ│сЃђсЃаТќЄтГЌтѕЌсЃЎсЃ╝сѓ╣сЂ«тЉйтљЇсЂФт╝итѕХуД╗УАїсЂЎсѓІсђѓ

nodes.label: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day dropРђд
nodes.short_label: Capital markets reset their valuation oРђд
nodes.description: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats ├Ќ ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters.

nodes.label: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026Рђд
nodes.short_label: Attack surface against the MCP protocolРђд
nodes.description: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** Рђћ a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls Рђћ was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category.

summary.en: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** Рђћ a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls Рђћ was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category.

nodes.label: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" Рђћ Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandatРђд
nodes.description: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" Рђћ Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandatory NVD tagging.** The Apr 19-26 sequence Рђћ **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + the Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot Рђћ composes a clear "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. By Q3 2026, NIST/NVD adds a dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag to its CVE schema, OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** to a top-3 entry, and supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ships **per-engine signature feeds for vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** as standard SKUs.

description.es: **Los servidores de inferencia se convierten en la nueva "cadena de suministro de primitivos" Рђћ el T3 2026 ver├А la primera clase de CVE espec├Гfica de infraestructura AI (LLM-INFRA-CWE) con etiquetado obligatorio en NVD.** La secuencia 19/4-26/4 Рђћ **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 h 31 min explotado)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) RCE Jinja2 SSTI** + **escape de sandbox de Antigravity v├Гa `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + la cadena Comment-and-Control del 21/4 sobre Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot Рђћ compone una categor├Гa clara de superficie de ataque "runtime de inferencia + CI ag├Еntico". Para el T3 2026, NIST/NVD a├▒ade una etiqueta dedicada **"AI-Infra"** a su esquema CVE, OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** al top 3 y el tooling SBOM (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) entrega **feeds de firmas por motor para vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** como SKUs est├Аndar.
description.fil: **Magiging bagong "primitive supply chain" ang inference servers Рђћ sa Q3 2026 lalabas ang unang AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) na may mandatory NVD tagging.** Ang sequence ng Apr 19-26 Рђћ **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape sa pamamagitan ng `find_by_name -X`** + ang Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot Рђћ ay bumubuo ng malinaw na "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, magdadagdag ang NIST/NVD ng dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag sa CVE schema nito, ipo-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** sa top-3 entry, at maglalabas ang supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ng **per-engine signature feeds para sa vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** bilang standard SKUs.

summary.ja: **ТјеУФќсѓхсЃ╝сЃљсЂїТќ░сЂЪсЂфсђїсЃЌсЃфсЃЪсЃєсѓБсЃќсЂ«сѓхсЃЌсЃЕсѓцсЃЂсѓДсЃ╝сЃ│сђЇсЂФсЂфсѓІ Рђћ Q3 2026 сЂФ AI сѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕт░ѓуће CVE сѓ»сЃЕсѓ╣ (LLM-INFRA-CWE) сЂї NVD сѓ┐сѓ░С╗ўсЂЉт┐ЁжаѕтїќсЂЋсѓїсѓІТюђтѕЮсЂ«сѓ▒сЃ╝сѓ╣сЂїуЎ╗та┤сђѓ** 4/19-26 сЂ«сѓисЃ╝сѓ▒сЃ│сѓ╣ Рђћ **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 ТЎѓжќЊ 31 тѕєсЂДТћ╗ТњЃТѕљуФІ)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar сЂФсѓѕсѓІ Antigravity сЂ« `find_by_name -X` сѓхсЃ│сЃЅсЃюсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣ сѓесѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЌ** + 4/21 сЂ« Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot сѓњсЂЙсЂЪсЂёсЂа Comment-and-Control сЃЌсЃГсЃ│сЃЌсЃѕ сѓцсЃ│сѓИсѓДсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│ Рђћ сЂїсђїТјеУФќсЃЕсЃ│сѓ┐сѓцсЃа + сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃєсѓБсЃЃсѓ» CIсђЇТћ╗ТњЃжЮбсЂ«сѓФсЃєсѓ┤сЃфсЃ╝сѓњтйбТѕљсђѓQ3 2026 сЂЙсЂДсЂФ NIST/NVD сЂї CVE сѓ╣сѓГсЃ╝сЃъсЂФ **сђїAI-InfraсђЇт░ѓућесѓ┐сѓ░**сѓњУ┐йтіасђЂOWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 сЂї **сђїInference Server Template / Loader RCEсђЇ** сѓњсЃѕсЃЃсЃЌ 3 сЂФТа╝СИісЂњсђЂSnyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera сЂї **vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama тљёсѓесЃ│сѓИсЃ│ућесЂ«уй▓тљЇсЃЋсѓБсЃ╝сЃЅ**сѓњТеЎТ║ќ SKU сЂесЂЌсЂдТЈљСЙЏжќІтДІсђѓ
summary.es: **Los servidores de inferencia se convierten en la nueva "cadena de suministro de primitivos" Рђћ el T3 2026 ver├А la primera clase de CVE espec├Гfica de infraestructura AI (LLM-INFRA-CWE) con etiquetado obligatorio en NVD.** La secuencia 19/4-26/4 Рђћ **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 h 31 min explotado)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) RCE Jinja2 SSTI** + **escape de sandbox de Antigravity v├Гa `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + la cadena Comment-and-Control del 21/4 sobre Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot Рђћ compone una categor├Гa clara de superficie de ataque "runtime de inferencia + CI ag├Еntico". Para el T3 2026, NIST/NVD a├▒ade una etiqueta dedicada **"AI-Infra"** a su esquema CVE, OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** al top 3 y el tooling SBOM (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) entrega **feeds de firmas por motor para vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** como SKUs est├Аndar.
summary.fil: **Magiging bagong "primitive supply chain" ang inference servers Рђћ sa Q3 2026 lalabas ang unang AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) na may mandatory NVD tagging.** Ang sequence ng Apr 19-26 Рђћ **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape sa pamamagitan ng `find_by_name -X`** + ang Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot Рђћ ay bumubuo ng malinaw na "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, magdadagdag ang NIST/NVD ng dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag sa CVE schema nito, ipo-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** sa top-3 entry, at maglalabas ang supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ng **per-engine signature feeds para sa vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** bilang standard SKUs.

nodes.label: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules Рђћ by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory IdenРђд
nodes.description: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules Рђћ by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel.

description.ja: **AI сЂИсЂ«СИќУФќуџётЈЇуЎ║сЂїТІўТЮЪтіЏсЂ«сЂѓсѓІсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕ сѓгсЃљсЃісЃ│сѓ╣УдЈтЅЄсЂИУ╗бтїќ Рђћ Q3 2026 сЂЙсЂДсЂФу▒│тЏйсЂ«т░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1 тиъсЂїсђЂOkta сЂ« Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway сЃЉсѓ┐сЃ╝сЃ│сѓњтЈЇТўасЂЌсЂЪсђїУЄфтЙІсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсЂ«Т│Ћт«џсѓбсѓцсЃЄсЃ│сЃєсѓБсЃєсѓБсђЇТ│ЋсѓњтЈ»Т▒║сђѓ** 4/16 сЂ« Altman УЄфт«ЁУЦ▓ТњЃ + 4/15 CNBC сЂ«сЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сѓ╗сЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝тЈЇуЎ║УеўС║І + 4/26 Salt Security сЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐ (сђїухёу╣ћсЂ« 48.9% сЂї AI сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕ сЃѕсЃЕсЃЋсѓБсЃЃсѓ»сѓњуЏБУдќсЂДсЂЇсЂдсЂёсЂфсЂёсђЇ) + **4/30** Okta for AI Agents GA (Agent DiscoveryсђЂAgent GatewayсђЂС╗«ТЃ│ MCP сѓхсЃ╝сЃљ сЃгсѓИсѓ╣сЃѕсЃфсђЂУфЇУе╝ТЃЁта▒сЂ«сЃюсЃ╝сЃФсЃєсѓБсЃ│сѓ░ + УЄфтІЋсЃГсЃ╝сЃєсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│сђЂсЃдсЃІсЃљсЃ╝сѓхсЃФ сЃГсѓ░сѓбсѓдсЃѕ) сЂїУдЈтѕХсѓњтЅЇтђњсЂЌсЂДт╝ЋсЂЇт»ёсЂЏсѓІсђѓу▒│тЏйсЂ«тиъ (CAсђЂNYсђЂTX сЂ«сЂёсЂџсѓїсЂІсЂїТюЅтіЏ) сЂї Q3 2026 сЂЙсЂДсЂФ **сђїсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсѓњуггСИђу┤џсѓбсѓцсЃЄсЃ│сЃєсѓБсЃєсѓБсЂесЂЌсЂдуЎ╗жї▓сђЂMCP сѓ│сЃ╝сЃФ сЃЂсѓДсЃ╝сЃ│сЂ«сЃГсѓ«сЃ│сѓ░сђЂсѓбсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│сЂћсЂесЂ«тљїТёЈсђЇ** сѓњуЙЕтІЎС╗ўсЂЉсѓІТ│ЋС╗цсѓњТѕљуФІсЂЋсЂЏсђЂCross App Access сЃЌсЃГсЃѕсѓ│сЃФсЂ«сѓ╗сЃъсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓ»сѓ╣сѓњтЈЇТўасђѓEU AI Act угг 26 ТЮАТќйУАїсѓѓСИдУАїсЂЌсЂдтДІтІЋсђѓ
description.es: **El rechazo p├║blico a la IA se convierte en reglas vinculantes de gobernanza de agentes Рђћ para el Q3 2026 al menos un estado de EE. UU. promulga una ley de "Identidad Estatutaria para Agentes Aut├│nomos" que refleja el patr├│n Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway de Okta.** Los ataques del 16/04 a la casa de Altman + el art├Гculo de la CNBC del 15/04 sobre el rechazo a los centros de datos + los datos del 26/04 de Salt Security ("48,9% de las orgs no pueden monitorear el tr├Аfico de agentes de IA") + la GA de Okta for AI Agents el **30/04** (con Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, registro virtual de servidores MCP, vault de credenciales + rotaci├│n autom├Аtica, logout universal) componen un adelanto regulatorio. Un estado de EE. UU. (CA, NY o TX como candidatos probables) aprueba un estatuto para el Q3 2026 que obliga al **registro del agente como identidad de primera clase, registro de cadenas de llamadas MCP y consentimiento por acci├│n**, reflejando la sem├Аntica del protocolo Cross App Access. La aplicaci├│n del Art├Гculo 26 de la EU AI Act se activa en paralelo.
description.fil: **Magiging binding agent-governance rules ang public-opinion blowback laban sa AI Рђћ pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang US state ang magpapalabas ng "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act na nagre-replikate sa Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern ng Okta.** Ang 4/16 attacks sa bahay ni Altman + 4/15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + 4/26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA sa **4/30** (kasama ang Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) ang bumubuo ng regulatory pull-forward. Isang US state (CA, NY, o TX malamang) ang magpasa ng statute pagdating ng Q3 2026 na nag-uutos ng **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, at per-action consent**, na nagre-replikate sa Cross App Access protocol semantics. Mag-trigger din nang sabay ang EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement.

summary.en: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules Рђћ by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel.
summary.ja: **AI сЂИсЂ«СИќУФќуџётЈЇуЎ║сЂїТІўТЮЪтіЏсЂ«сЂѓсѓІсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕ сѓгсЃљсЃісЃ│сѓ╣УдЈтЅЄсЂИУ╗бтїќ Рђћ Q3 2026 сЂЙсЂДсЂФу▒│тЏйсЂ«т░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1 тиъсЂїсђЂOkta сЂ« Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway сЃЉсѓ┐сЃ╝сЃ│сѓњтЈЇТўасЂЌсЂЪсђїУЄфтЙІсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсЂ«Т│Ћт«џсѓбсѓцсЃЄсЃ│сЃєсѓБсЃєсѓБсђЇТ│ЋсѓњтЈ»Т▒║сђѓ** 4/16 сЂ« Altman УЄфт«ЁУЦ▓ТњЃ + 4/15 CNBC сЂ«сЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐сѓ╗сЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝тЈЇуЎ║УеўС║І + 4/26 Salt Security сЃЄсЃ╝сѓ┐ (сђїухёу╣ћсЂ« 48.9% сЂї AI сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕ сЃѕсЃЕсЃЋсѓБсЃЃсѓ»сѓњуЏБУдќсЂДсЂЇсЂдсЂёсЂфсЂёсђЇ) + **4/30** Okta for AI Agents GA (Agent DiscoveryсђЂAgent GatewayсђЂС╗«ТЃ│ MCP сѓхсЃ╝сЃљ сЃгсѓИсѓ╣сЃѕсЃфсђЂУфЇУе╝ТЃЁта▒сЂ«сЃюсЃ╝сЃФсЃєсѓБсЃ│сѓ░ + УЄфтІЋсЃГсЃ╝сЃєсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│сђЂсЃдсЃІсЃљсЃ╝сѓхсЃФ сЃГсѓ░сѓбсѓдсЃѕ) сЂїУдЈтѕХсѓњтЅЇтђњсЂЌсЂДт╝ЋсЂЇт»ёсЂЏсѓІсђѓу▒│тЏйсЂ«тиъ (CAсђЂNYсђЂTX сЂ«сЂёсЂџсѓїсЂІсЂїТюЅтіЏ) сЂї Q3 2026 сЂЙсЂДсЂФ **сђїсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсѓњуггСИђу┤џсѓбсѓцсЃЄсЃ│сЃєсѓБсЃєсѓБсЂесЂЌсЂдуЎ╗жї▓сђЂMCP сѓ│сЃ╝сЃФ сЃЂсѓДсЃ╝сЃ│сЂ«сЃГсѓ«сЃ│сѓ░сђЂсѓбсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│сЂћсЂесЂ«тљїТёЈсђЇ** сѓњуЙЕтІЎС╗ўсЂЉсѓІТ│ЋС╗цсѓњТѕљуФІсЂЋсЂЏсђЂCross App Access сЃЌсЃГсЃѕсѓ│сЃФсЂ«сѓ╗сЃъсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓ»сѓ╣сѓњтЈЇТўасђѓEU AI Act угг 26 ТЮАТќйУАїсѓѓСИдУАїсЂЌсЂдтДІтІЋсђѓ
summary.es: **El rechazo p├║blico a la IA se convierte en reglas vinculantes de gobernanza de agentes Рђћ para el Q3 2026 al menos un estado de EE. UU. promulga una ley de "Identidad Estatutaria para Agentes Aut├│nomos" que refleja el patr├│n Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway de Okta.** Los ataques del 16/04 a la casa de Altman + el art├Гculo de la CNBC del 15/04 sobre el rechazo a los centros de datos + los datos del 26/04 de Salt Security ("48,9% de las orgs no pueden monitorear el tr├Аfico de agentes de IA") + la GA de Okta for AI Agents el **30/04** (con Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, registro virtual de servidores MCP, vault de credenciales + rotaci├│n autom├Аtica, logout universal) componen un adelanto regulatorio. Un estado de EE. UU. (CA, NY o TX como candidatos probables) aprueba un estatuto para el Q3 2026 que obliga al **registro del agente como identidad de primera clase, registro de cadenas de llamadas MCP y consentimiento por acci├│n**, reflejando la sem├Аntica del protocolo Cross App Access. La aplicaci├│n del Art├Гculo 26 de la EU AI Act se activa en paralelo.
summary.fil: **Magiging binding agent-governance rules ang public-opinion blowback laban sa AI Рђћ pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang US state ang magpapalabas ng "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act na nagre-replikate sa Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern ng Okta.** Ang 4/16 attacks sa bahay ni Altman + 4/15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + 4/26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA sa **4/30** (kasama ang Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) ang bumubuo ng regulatory pull-forward. Isang US state (CA, NY, o TX malamang) ang magpasa ng statute pagdating ng Q3 2026 na nag-uutos ng **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, at per-action consent**, na nagre-replikate sa Cross App Access protocol semantics. Mag-trigger din nang sabay ang EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement.

nodes.label: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SРђд
nodes.description: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads Рђћ pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.

Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads Рђћ pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.
description.ja: **ТјеУФќсѓхсЃ╝сЃљSSTIсЂїтЇўуЎ║CVEсЂІсѓЅOWASP LLM Top-10 v2026жаЁуЏ«сЂИТўЄТа╝ Рђћ CISAсЂ»2026т╣┤Q3сЂЙсЂДсЂФсђїAI-Infra KEVсђЇсѓхсЃќсѓФсѓ┐сЃГсѓ░сѓњтЁгжќІсЂЎсѓІсђѓ** SGLang CVE-2026-5760(CVSS 9.8)сЂ»4/28ТЎѓуѓ╣сЂДсѓѓ**ТюфсЃЉсЃЃсЃЂ**(жќІуц║тЙї10ТЌЦС╗ЦСИі)сђЂтЁгжќІPoCсЂїсЂѓсѓісђЂ`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` СИЇСй┐ућесЂ«Jinja2сЂ«тљїтъІсЂїvLLM / LMDeploy / тЉеУЙ║ТјеУФќсѓхсЃ╝сЃљсѓњТефТќГсЂЎсѓІсѓ│сЃћсЃџсѓ»сЃЕсѓ╣сЂесЂЌсЂдТїЄТЉўсЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсѓІсђѓ**4/27-28сЂ«Totolink CVE 4жђБуЎ║(7153/7154/7156/7202сђЂсЂЎсЂ╣сЂд9.8)**сђЂ**Cisco ISE УфЇУе╝СИЇУдЂRCE**сђЂ**simple-git CVE-2026-6951 сЂ«CI/CDтљЉсЂЉRCE**сђЂ**PillarсЂ«Antigravity сѓхсЃ│сЃЅсЃюсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣сѓесѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЌ(`find_by_name -X`ухїућ▒)**сђЂGoogle / Forcepoint сЂ«**жќЊТјЦсЃЌсЃГсЃ│сЃЌсЃѕсѓцсЃ│сѓИсѓДсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│ 32% YoY тбЌтіа** + 10С╗ХсЂ«жЄјућЪсЃџсѓцсЃГсЃ╝сЃЅсѓњтљѕсѓЈсЂЏсѓІсЂесђЂNIST / CISAсЂИсЂ«тюДтіЏсЂїухљТЎХтїќсЂЎсѓІсђѓ**2026т╣┤Q3сЂЙсЂДсЂФCISAсЂ»т░ѓућесђїAI-InfraсђЇKEVсѓхсЃќсѓФсѓ┐сЃГсѓ░**сѓњтЁгжќІсЂЌсђЂТјеУФќсѓхсЃ╝сЃљ(vLLM / SGLang / Ollama / llama.cpp / LMDeploy)сЂесѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕтъІCIсЃЕсЃ│сѓ┐сѓцсЃа(Claude Code / Codex / Antigravity / OpenClaw)сЂФт»ЙсЂЎсѓІSBOMсѓ┐сѓ░С╗ўсЂЉсѓњуЙЕтІЎтїќсЂЎсѓІсђѓOWASP LLM Top-10 v2026сЂ»сђїInference Server Template / Loader RCEсђЇсѓњTop-3сЂФТа╝СИісЂњсЂЎсѓІсђѓ
description.es: **El SSTI en servidores de inferencia se grad├║a de CVE puntual a entrada en OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026; CISA publicar├А un sub-cat├Аlogo "AI-Infra KEV" para Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9,8) **sigue sin parche al 28 abr** (10+ d├Гas post-divulgaci├│n), con PoC p├║blico y la misma forma de Jinja2-sin-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` ahora marcada como una clase de copia-pega que abarca vLLM, LMDeploy y servidores de inferencia adyacentes. Combinado con el **cu├Аdruple CVE Totolink del 27-28 abr (7153/7154/7156/7202, todos 9,8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE en CI/CD**, **escape de sandbox Antigravity de Pillar v├Гa `find_by_name -X`**, y el **aumento del 32% YoY en inyecci├│n indirecta de prompt** de Google/Forcepoint con 10 payloads en estado salvaje Рђћ la presi├│n sobre NIST/CISA cristaliza. **Para Q3 2026 CISA publicar├А un sub-cat├Аlogo dedicado "AI-Infra" KEV** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio sobre servidores de inferencia (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) y runtimes ag├Еnticos de CI (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" al top-3.
description.fil: **Ang Inference-server SSTI ay magta-graduate mula one-off CVE patungong OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; magpa-publish ang CISA ng "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) ay **hindi pa rin patched hanggang Apr 28** (10+ araw post-disclosure), na may public PoC at parehong Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape na ngayon flagged bilang copy-paste class na sumasaklaw sa vLLM, LMDeploy, at adjacent inference servers. Pagsamahin sa **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, lahat 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, at sa **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** ng Google/Forcepoint na may 10 in-the-wild payloads Рђћ nagcrystallize ang pressure sa NIST/CISA. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026 magpapadala ang CISA ng dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging sa inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) at agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" sa top-3.

summary.en: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads Рђћ pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.

Pagsamahin sa **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, lahat 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, at sa **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** ng Google/Forcepoint na may 10 in-the-wild payloads Рђћ nagcrystallize ang pressure sa NIST/CISA. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026 magpapadala ang CISA ng dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging sa inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) at agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). nodes.description: **(Non-tech) Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology Рђћ by Q4 2026 the FOMC reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (РЅц2 dissenters) under Warsh as Chair, but Powell's continued Board presence becomes the marginal swing vote on the Fed-investigation governance question, not on rates.** Apr 29 was the highest-dissent FOMC since Oct-1992 (8-4); Miran wanted -25bp; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan opposed easing-bias inclusion. Warsh nomination advanced from Senate Banking same day. The 2026-2027 setup: Powell on Board through term-end 2028 with Warsh in the Chair seat; the dissent posture compresses on rate calls because the Chair sets the framing; Powell's marginal vote becomes a governance signal whenever the Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome moves. Markets price a smaller forward-guidance volatility on rates but a larger institutional-risk premium on the Fed itself. The 1992-precedent comparison stops being a curiosity and starts being a structural reference point in financial-press explanations of the new Fed governance regime.

description.en: **(Non-tech) Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology Рђћ by Q4 2026 the FOMC reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (РЅц2 dissenters) under Warsh as Chair, but Powell's continued Board presence becomes the marginal swing vote on the Fed-investigation governance question, not on rates.** Apr 29 was the highest-dissent FOMC since Oct-1992 (8-4); Miran wanted -25bp; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan opposed easing-bias inclusion. Warsh nomination advanced from Senate Banking same day. The 2026-2027 setup: Powell on Board through term-end 2028 with Warsh in the Chair seat; the dissent posture compresses on rate calls because the Chair sets the framing; Powell's marginal vote becomes a governance signal whenever the Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome moves. Markets price a smaller forward-guidance volatility on rates but a larger institutional-risk premium on the Fed itself. The 1992-precedent comparison stops being a curiosity and starts being a structural reference point in financial-press explanations of the new Fed governance regime.
description.ja: **(жЮъТіђУАЊ) Powell сЂї 4/29 сЂФ Chair С╗╗ТюЪухѓС║є (5/15) тЙїсѓѓуљєС║ІС╝џсЂФТ«ІсѓІТ▒║т«џсЂї 2026т╣┤жЄЉУъЇТћ┐уГќтИѓта┤т┐ЃуљєсѓњтєЇТДІу»Ѕ Рђћ 2026т╣┤ Q4 сЂЙсЂДсЂФ FOMC сЂ» Warsh Chair СйЊтѕХСИІсЂДтЈЇт»ЙуЦе РЅц2 сЂ«сѓѕсѓіт░ЈсЂЋсЂётЈЇт»ЙУдЈу»ёсЂФТѕ╗сѓІсЂїсђЂPowell сЂ«уљєС║ІС╝џуХЎуХџтюеС╗╗сЂ»жЄЉтѕЕсЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂЈ Fed Уф┐ТЪ╗сѓгсЃљсЃісЃ│сѓ╣тЋЈжАїсЂ«сЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃісЃФсѓ╣сѓцсЃ│сѓ░уЦесЂесЂфсѓІсђѓ** 4/29 сЂ» 1992т╣┤10ТюѕС╗ЦТЮЦсЂ«ТюђтцџтЈЇт»Й FOMC (8-4); Miran сЂ» -25bp сѓњСИ╗т╝х; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan сЂ»уиЕтњїсЃљсѓцсѓбсѓ╣тљФсѓЂсѓІсЂЊсЂесЂФтЈЇт»ЙсђѓтљїТЌЦ Warsh ТїЄтљЇсЂїСИіжЎбжіђУАїтДћтЊАС╝џсѓњжђџжЂјсђѓ2026-2027т╣┤сѓ╗сЃЃсЃѕсѓбсЃЃсЃЌ: Warsh сЂї Chair тИГсЂД Powell сЂї 2028т╣┤С╗╗ТюЪТюФсЂЙсЂДуљєС║ІС╝џсЂФтюеС╗╗; Chair сЂїсЃЋсЃгсЃ╝сЃЪсЃ│сѓ░сѓњУеГт«џсЂЎсѓІсЂЪсѓЂсђЂтѕЕујЄсѓ│сЃ╝сЃФсЂДсЂ»тЈЇт»ЙтД┐тІбсЂїтюДуИ«; сЃѕсЃЕсЃ│сЃЌТћ┐ТеЕ Fed Уф┐ТЪ╗сЂ«ухљТъюсЂїтІЋсЂЈсЂЪсЂ│сЂФ Powell сЂ«сЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃісЃФуЦесЂ»сѓгсЃљсЃісЃ│сѓ╣сѓисѓ░сЃісЃФсЂФсЂфсѓІсђѓтИѓта┤сЂ»жЄЉтѕЕсЂ«сЃЋсѓЕсЃ»сЃ╝сЃЅсѓгсѓцсЃђсЃ│сѓ╣сЃюсЃЕсЃєсѓБсЃфсЃєсѓБсѓњСИІсЂњсђЂFed УЄфСйЊсЂ«тѕХт║дсЃфсѓ╣сѓ»сЃЌсЃгсЃЪсѓбсЃасѓњСИісЂњсѓІТќ╣тљЉсЂФтђцС╗ўсЂЉсЂЎсѓІсђѓ1992т╣┤сЂ«тЅЇСЙІТ»ћУ╝ЃсЂ»уЈЇтЦЄсЂфУЕ▒жАїсЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂЈсђЂТќ░сЂЌсЂё Fed сѓгсЃљсЃісЃ│сѓ╣СйЊтѕХсЂ«жЄЉУъЇсЃЌсЃгсѓ╣УДБУфгсЂФсЂісЂЉсѓІТДІжђауџётЈѓуЁДуѓ╣сЂФсЂфсѓІсђѓ
description.es: **(No tecnol├│gica) La decisi├│n de Powell del 29-abr de permanecer en la Junta de Gobernadores tras vencer su mandato como Chair (15-may) reconfigura la psicolog├Гa del mercado de pol├Гtica monetaria 2026 Рђћ para Q4 2026 el FOMC vuelve a una norma de menor disidencia (РЅц2 disidentes) bajo Warsh como Chair, pero la presencia continua de Powell en la Junta se convierte en el voto pivote marginal sobre la cuesti├│n de gobernanza de la investigaci├│n Fed, no sobre los tipos.** El 29-abr fue el FOMC con m├Аs disidentes desde oct-1992 (8-4); Miran quer├Гa -25pb; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan se opusieron a incluir sesgo de relajaci├│n. La nominaci├│n de Warsh avanz├│ del Comit├Е Bancario del Senado el mismo d├Гa. La configuraci├│n 2026-2027: Powell en la Junta hasta el final de su mandato en 2028 con Warsh en el sill├│n del Chair; la postura disidente se comprime en las decisiones de tipos porque el Chair fija el encuadre; el voto marginal de Powell se convierte en se├▒al de gobernanza siempre que se mueva el resultado de la investigaci├│n Fed de Trump. Los mercados ponen precio a una menor volatilidad de forward guidance sobre tipos pero a una mayor prima de riesgo institucional sobre la propia Fed. La comparaci├│n con el precedente de 1992 deja de ser una curiosidad y pasa a ser un punto de referencia estructural en las explicaciones de la prensa financiera del nuevo r├Еgimen de gobernanza Fed.
description.fil: **(Non-tech) Binabago ng desisyon ni Powell noong Apr 29 na manatili sa Board of Governors lampas sa pagtatapos ng Chair-term niya (May 15) ang 2026 monetary-policy market psychology Рђћ bago matapos ang Q4 2026, babalik ang FOMC sa mas maliit na dissent norm (РЅц2 dissenters) sa ilalim ni Warsh bilang Chair, ngunit ang patuloy na presensya ni Powell sa Board ang magiging marginal swing vote sa Fed-investigation governance question, hindi sa rates.** Ang Apr 29 ang highest-dissent FOMC mula Oct-1992 (8-4); gusto ni Miran ang -25bp; tutol sina Hammack/Kashkari/Logan sa pagsasama ng easing-bias. Umusad ang nominasyon ni Warsh mula Senate Banking sa parehong araw. Ang 2026-2027 setup: Powell sa Board hanggang term-end 2028 habang nasa Chair seat si Warsh; mag-co-compress ang dissent posture sa rate calls dahil itinatakda ng Chair ang framing; ang marginal vote ni Powell ang magiging governance signal kapag may galaw sa Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome. Pe-presyuhan ng markets ang mas maliit na forward-guidance volatility sa rates ngunit mas malaki ang institutional-risk premium sa Fed mismo. Hihinto na ang 1992-precedent comparison sa pagiging curiosity at magiging structural reference point sa financial-press explanations ng bagong Fed governance regime.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **(жЮъТіђУАЊ) Powell сЂї 4/29 сЂФ Chair С╗╗ТюЪухѓС║є (5/15) тЙїсѓѓуљєС║ІС╝џсЂФТ«ІсѓІТ▒║т«џсЂї 2026т╣┤жЄЉУъЇТћ┐уГќтИѓта┤т┐ЃуљєсѓњтєЇТДІу»Ѕ Рђћ 2026т╣┤ Q4 сЂЙсЂДсЂФ FOMC сЂ» Warsh Chair СйЊтѕХСИІсЂДтЈЇт»ЙуЦе РЅц2 сЂ«сѓѕсѓіт░ЈсЂЋсЂётЈЇт»ЙУдЈу»ёсЂФТѕ╗сѓІсЂїсђЂPowell сЂ«уљєС║ІС╝џуХЎуХџтюеС╗╗сЂ»жЄЉтѕЕсЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂЈ Fed Уф┐ТЪ╗сѓгсЃљсЃісЃ│сѓ╣тЋЈжАїсЂ«сЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃісЃФсѓ╣сѓцсЃ│сѓ░уЦесЂесЂфсѓІсђѓ** 4/29 сЂ» 1992т╣┤10ТюѕС╗ЦТЮЦсЂ«ТюђтцџтЈЇт»Й FOMC (8-4); Miran сЂ» -25bp сѓњСИ╗т╝х; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan сЂ»уиЕтњїсЃљсѓцсѓбсѓ╣тљФсѓЂсѓІсЂЊсЂесЂФтЈЇт»ЙсђѓтљїТЌЦ Warsh ТїЄтљЇсЂїСИіжЎбжіђУАїтДћтЊАС╝џсѓњжђџжЂјсђѓ2026-2027т╣┤сѓ╗сЃЃсЃѕсѓбсЃЃсЃЌ: Warsh сЂї Chair тИГсЂД Powell сЂї 2028т╣┤С╗╗ТюЪТюФсЂЙсЂДуљєС║ІС╝џсЂФтюеС╗╗; Chair сЂїсЃЋсЃгсЃ╝сЃЪсЃ│сѓ░сѓњУеГт«џсЂЎсѓІсЂЪсѓЂсђЂтѕЕујЄсѓ│сЃ╝сЃФсЂДсЂ»тЈЇт»ЙтД┐тІбсЂїтюДуИ«; сЃѕсЃЕсЃ│сЃЌТћ┐ТеЕ Fed Уф┐ТЪ╗сЂ«ухљТъюсЂїтІЋсЂЈсЂЪсЂ│сЂФ Powell сЂ«сЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃісЃФуЦесЂ»сѓгсЃљсЃісЃ│сѓ╣сѓисѓ░сЃісЃФсЂФсЂфсѓІсђѓтИѓта┤сЂ»жЄЉтѕЕсЂ«сЃЋсѓЕсЃ»сЃ╝сЃЅсѓгсѓцсЃђсЃ│сѓ╣сЃюсЃЕсЃєсѓБсЃфсЃєсѓБсѓњСИІсЂњсђЂFed УЄфСйЊсЂ«тѕХт║дсЃфсѓ╣сѓ»сЃЌсЃгсЃЪсѓбсЃасѓњСИісЂњсѓІТќ╣тљЉсЂФтђцС╗ўсЂЉсЂЎсѓІсђѓ1992т╣┤сЂ«тЅЇСЙІТ»ћУ╝ЃсЂ»уЈЇтЦЄсЂфУЕ▒жАїсЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂЈсђЂТќ░сЂЌсЂё Fed сѓгсЃљсЃісЃ│сѓ╣СйЊтѕХсЂ«жЄЉУъЇсЃЌсЃгсѓ╣УДБУфгсЂФсЂісЂЉсѓІТДІжђауџётЈѓуЁДуѓ╣сЂФсЂфсѓІсђѓ
prediction_summary_locales.es: **(No tecnol├│gica) La decisi├│n de Powell del 29-abr de permanecer en la Junta de Gobernadores tras vencer su mandato como Chair (15-may) reconfigura la psicolog├Гa del mercado de pol├Гtica monetaria 2026 Рђћ para Q4 2026 el FOMC vuelve a una norma de menor disidencia (РЅц2 disidentes) bajo Warsh como Chair, pero la presencia continua de Powell en la Junta se convierte en el voto pivote marginal sobre la cuesti├│n de gobernanza de la investigaci├│n Fed, no sobre los tipos.** El 29-abr fue el FOMC con m├Аs disidentes desde oct-1992 (8-4); Miran quer├Гa -25pb; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan se opusieron a incluir sesgo de relajaci├│n. La nominaci├│n de Warsh avanz├│ del Comit├Е Bancario del Senado el mismo d├Гa. La configuraci├│n 2026-2027: Powell en la Junta hasta el final de su mandato en 2028 con Warsh en el sill├│n del Chair; la postura disidente se comprime en las decisiones de tipos porque el Chair fija el encuadre; el voto marginal de Powell se convierte en se├▒al de gobernanza siempre que se mueva el resultado de la investigaci├│n Fed de Trump. Los mercados ponen precio a una menor volatilidad de forward guidance sobre tipos pero a una mayor prima de riesgo institucional sobre la propia Fed. La comparaci├│n con el precedente de 1992 deja de ser una curiosidad y pasa a ser un punto de referencia estructural en las explicaciones de la prensa financiera del nuevo r├Еgimen de gobernanza Fed.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **(Non-tech) Binabago ng desisyon ni Powell noong Apr 29 na manatili sa Board of Governors lampas sa pagtatapos ng Chair-term niya (May 15) ang 2026 monetary-policy market psychology Рђћ bago matapos ang Q4 2026, babalik ang FOMC sa mas maliit na dissent norm (РЅц2 dissenters) sa ilalim ni Warsh bilang Chair, ngunit ang patuloy na presensya ni Powell sa Board ang magiging marginal swing vote sa Fed-investigation governance question, hindi sa rates.** Ang Apr 29 ang highest-dissent FOMC mula Oct-1992 (8-4); gusto ni Miran ang -25bp; tutol sina Hammack/Kashkari/Logan sa pagsasama ng easing-bias. Umusad ang nominasyon ni Warsh mula Senate Banking sa parehong araw. Ang 2026-2027 setup: Powell sa Board hanggang term-end 2028 habang nasa Chair seat si Warsh; mag-co-compress ang dissent posture sa rate calls dahil itinatakda ng Chair ang framing; ang marginal vote ni Powell ang magiging governance signal kapag may galaw sa Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome. Pe-presyuhan ng markets ang mas maliit na forward-guidance volatility sa rates ngunit mas malaki ang institutional-risk premium sa Fed mismo. Hihinto na ang 1992-precedent comparison sa pagiging curiosity at magiging structural reference point sa financial-press explanations ng bagong Fed governance regime.

nodes.description: **(Tech) By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with РЅЦ50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer Рђћ once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.

description.en: **(Tech) By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with РЅЦ50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer Рђћ once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.
description.ja: **(Tech) 2026 Q3 сЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕтъІ AI сЂ« CVE сѓ»сЃЕсѓ╣сЂї CSAI уЎ║УАїсЂ« MITRE УфЇтЈ» CNA сѓњжђџсЂўсЂдтЏ║ТюЅсЂ«сѓхсЃќсѓ│сЃ╝сЃЉсѓ╣сЂесЂЌсЂдуб║уФІсЂЌсђЂсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕ / сѓ╣сѓГсЃФ / сЃЈсЃ╝сЃЇсѓ╣ / сѓхсЃ│сЃЅсЃюсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣уЅ╣ТюЅсЂ« CVE сЂї 50 С╗ХС╗ЦСИіуЎ║УАїсЂЋсѓїсѓІсђѓтљїТЎѓсЂФСИ╗УдЂсѓ╣сѓГсЃФсЃъсЃ╝сѓ▒сЃЃсЃѕсЃЌсЃгсЃ╝сѓ╣(Anthropic skillsсђЂClawHubсђЂMulticaсђЂHermesсђЂHugging Face skills)сЂ«сЂєсЂАт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1 уцЙсЂїсђїтЁгжќІтЅЇсЂ«уй▓тљЇ + тЄ║ТЅђУе╝Тўјсѓ▓сЃ╝сЃѕсђЇсѓњт┐ЁжаѕтїќсЂЎсѓІсђѓ** 4/29 сЂ« CSAI MITRE CNA УфЇтЈ»сЂїтѕХт║дуџёуЂФуе«сђЂ4/28 ATT&CK v19 сЂїТЅІТ│ЋсѓњтЉйтљЇ(сѓ│сЃ│сЃєсѓГсѓ╣сЃѕТ▒џТЪЊсђЂсЃёсЃ╝сЃФтЉ╝сЂ│тЄ║сЂЌТѓфућесђЂMCP сѓхсЃ╝сЃљСЙхт«│сђЂТѓфТёЈсЂѓсѓІсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕжЁЇтѓЎ)сђЂ4/30 OpenAI Agents SDK сЂї 7 сЂцсЂ«сѓхсЃ│сЃЅсЃюсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣сЃЌсЃГсЃљсѓцсЃђ(Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel)СИісЂДсЃЇсѓцсЃєсѓБсЃќсЃ╗сѓхсЃ│сЃЅсЃюсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣т«ЪУАїсѓњсЃЄсЃЋсѓЕсЃФсЃѕтїќсђЂ4/28 Novita Sandbox + 4/28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + 4/30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents сЂїсЃЎсЃ│сЃђтЂ┤сѓњУБют«їсђЂ4/26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208(SQLi 1 УАїсЂД OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock сѓГсЃ╝сЂїТ╝ЈТ┤Е)+ 4/28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + ТїЂсЂАУХісЂЌсЂ« SGLang CVE-2026-5760 сЂїсЃбсЃЄсЃФсЃёсЃ╝сЃФт▒цсѓцсЃ│сѓИсѓДсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│сЂ«УбФт«│УдЈТеАсѓњт«ЪУе╝сЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІсђѓжДєтІЋтіЏсЂ»сѓесЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓ║сЂ«сЃфсѓ╣сѓ»уД╗У╗б Рђћ AI сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕТўјуц║сЂ« CNA сЂїтГўтюесЂЎсѓІС╗ЦСИісђЂжќІуц║сѓхсѓцсѓ»сЃФсЂ»тЄ║уЅѕУђЁСЙЮтГўсЂІсѓЅуЎ║УАїУђЁСИ╗т░јсЂФтюДуИ«сЂЋсѓїсђЂсѓ╣сѓГсЃФсЃъсЃ╝сѓ▒сЃЃсЃѕсЃЌсЃгсЃ╝сѓ╣сЂ»уёАуй▓тљЇсЂ«сЂЙсЂЙсЂДсЂ»сѓесЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓ║жАДт«бсѓњтц▒сЂєсђѓCSAI сЂ«ТюђтѕЮсЂ«Т┤╗тІЋтЏЏтЇіТюЪ(2026 Q3)сЂїжќЙтђцУХЁсЂѕсЂ«сѓѓсЂБсЂесѓѓУЄфуёХсЂфуЮђтю░ТЎѓТюЪсђѓ
description.es: **(Tech) Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA ag├Еntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con РЅЦ50 CVE espec├Гficos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestaci├│n de procedencia antes de publicar.** La autorizaci├│n CNA de CSAI por MITRE el 29/abr es la chispa institucional; el 28/abr ATT&CK v19 nombra las t├Еcnicas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocaci├│n de herramientas, compromiso de MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); el 30/abr el Agents SDK de OpenAI hace de la ejecuci├│n en sandbox una primitiva por defecto sobre 7 proveedores (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Novita Sandbox del 28/abr + Bedrock Managed Agents del 28/abr + hosted agents de Microsoft Foundry del 30/abr forman la contraparte del lado proveedor; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 26/abr (una sola fila SQLi filtra claves OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock) + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 del 28/abr + SGLang CVE-2026-5760 en arrastre demuestran el radio de explosi├│n de la inyecci├│n a nivel de tooling del modelo. La fuerza motriz es la transferencia de riesgo empresarial Рђћ una vez existe una CNA con mandato expl├Гcito de IA ag├Еntica, el ritmo de divulgaci├│n se comprime de "publicador aleatorio" a "emisor coordinado" y los marketplaces de skills no podr├Аn seguir sin firma por defecto sin perder clientes empresariales. El primer trimestre operativo de CSAI (Q3 2026) es la zona de aterrizaje m├Аs probable.
description.fil: **(Tech) Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may РЅЦ50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; pinangalanan ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); nagsa-ship ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang vendor-side counterpart; ipinapakita ng Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (isang SQLi row ay nagla-leak ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ang model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay enterprise risk transfer Рђћ kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, ang disclosure cadence ay mauurong mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakapagdesign ang skill marketplaces na mananatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first operating quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para tumawid ang threshold.

The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer Рђћ once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.
summary.ja: **(Tech) 2026 Q3 сЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕтъІ AI сЂ« CVE сѓ»сЃЕсѓ╣сЂї CSAI уЎ║УАїсЂ« MITRE УфЇтЈ» CNA сѓњжђџсЂўсЂдтЏ║ТюЅсЂ«сѓхсЃќсѓ│сЃ╝сЃЉсѓ╣сЂесЂЌсЂдуб║уФІсЂЌсђЂсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕ / сѓ╣сѓГсЃФ / сЃЈсЃ╝сЃЇсѓ╣ / сѓхсЃ│сЃЅсЃюсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣уЅ╣ТюЅсЂ« CVE сЂї 50 С╗ХС╗ЦСИіуЎ║УАїсЂЋсѓїсѓІсђѓтљїТЎѓсЂФСИ╗УдЂсѓ╣сѓГсЃФсЃъсЃ╝сѓ▒сЃЃсЃѕсЃЌсЃгсЃ╝сѓ╣(Anthropic skillsсђЂClawHubсђЂMulticaсђЂHermesсђЂHugging Face skills)сЂ«сЂєсЂАт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1 уцЙсЂїсђїтЁгжќІтЅЇсЂ«уй▓тљЇ + тЄ║ТЅђУе╝Тўјсѓ▓сЃ╝сЃѕсђЇсѓњт┐ЁжаѕтїќсЂЎсѓІсђѓ** 4/29 сЂ« CSAI MITRE CNA УфЇтЈ»сЂїтѕХт║дуџёуЂФуе«сђЂ4/28 ATT&CK v19 сЂїТЅІТ│ЋсѓњтЉйтљЇ(сѓ│сЃ│сЃєсѓГсѓ╣сЃѕТ▒џТЪЊсђЂсЃёсЃ╝сЃФтЉ╝сЂ│тЄ║сЂЌТѓфућесђЂMCP сѓхсЃ╝сЃљСЙхт«│сђЂТѓфТёЈсЂѓсѓІсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕжЁЇтѓЎ)сђЂ4/30 OpenAI Agents SDK сЂї 7 сЂцсЂ«сѓхсЃ│сЃЅсЃюсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣сЃЌсЃГсЃљсѓцсЃђ(Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel)СИісЂДсЃЇсѓцсЃєсѓБсЃќсЃ╗сѓхсЃ│сЃЅсЃюсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣т«ЪУАїсѓњсЃЄсЃЋсѓЕсЃФсЃѕтїќсђЂ4/28 Novita Sandbox + 4/28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + 4/30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents сЂїсЃЎсЃ│сЃђтЂ┤сѓњУБют«їсђЂ4/26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208(SQLi 1 УАїсЂД OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock сѓГсЃ╝сЂїТ╝ЈТ┤Е)+ 4/28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + ТїЂсЂАУХісЂЌсЂ« SGLang CVE-2026-5760 сЂїсЃбсЃЄсЃФсЃёсЃ╝сЃФт▒цсѓцсЃ│сѓИсѓДсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│сЂ«УбФт«│УдЈТеАсѓњт«ЪУе╝сЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІсђѓжДєтІЋтіЏсЂ»сѓесЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓ║сЂ«сЃфсѓ╣сѓ»уД╗У╗б Рђћ AI сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕТўјуц║сЂ« CNA сЂїтГўтюесЂЎсѓІС╗ЦСИісђЂжќІуц║сѓхсѓцсѓ»сЃФсЂ»тЄ║уЅѕУђЁСЙЮтГўсЂІсѓЅуЎ║УАїУђЁСИ╗т░јсЂФтюДуИ«сЂЋсѓїсђЂсѓ╣сѓГсЃФсЃъсЃ╝сѓ▒сЃЃсЃѕсЃЌсЃгсЃ╝сѓ╣сЂ»уёАуй▓тљЇсЂ«сЂЙсЂЙсЂДсЂ»сѓесЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓ║жАДт«бсѓњтц▒сЂєсђѓCSAI сЂ«ТюђтѕЮсЂ«Т┤╗тІЋтЏЏтЇіТюЪ(2026 Q3)сЂїжќЙтђцУХЁсЂѕсЂ«сѓѓсЂБсЂесѓѓУЄфуёХсЂфуЮђтю░ТЎѓТюЪсђѓ
summary.es: **(Tech) Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA ag├Еntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con РЅЦ50 CVE espec├Гficos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestaci├│n de procedencia antes de publicar.** La autorizaci├│n CNA de CSAI por MITRE el 29/abr es la chispa institucional; el 28/abr ATT&CK v19 nombra las t├Еcnicas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocaci├│n de herramientas, compromiso de MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); el 30/abr el Agents SDK de OpenAI hace de la ejecuci├│n en sandbox una primitiva por defecto sobre 7 proveedores (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Novita Sandbox del 28/abr + Bedrock Managed Agents del 28/abr + hosted agents de Microsoft Foundry del 30/abr forman la contraparte del lado proveedor; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 26/abr (una sola fila SQLi filtra claves OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock) + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 del 28/abr + SGLang CVE-2026-5760 en arrastre demuestran el radio de explosi├│n de la inyecci├│n a nivel de tooling del modelo. La fuerza motriz es la transferencia de riesgo empresarial Рђћ una vez existe una CNA con mandato expl├Гcito de IA ag├Еntica, el ritmo de divulgaci├│n se comprime de "publicador aleatorio" a "emisor coordinado" y los marketplaces de skills no podr├Аn seguir sin firma por defecto sin perder clientes empresariales. El primer trimestre operativo de CSAI (Q3 2026) es la zona de aterrizaje m├Аs probable.
summary.fil: **(Tech) Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may РЅЦ50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; pinangalanan ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); nagsa-ship ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang vendor-side counterpart; ipinapakita ng Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (isang SQLi row ay nagla-leak ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ang model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay enterprise risk transfer Рђћ kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, ang disclosure cadence ay mauurong mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakapagdesign ang skill marketplaces na mananatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first operating quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para tumawid ang threshold.

nodes.label: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package РђћРђд
nodes.description: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package Рђћ no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 Рђћ reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense ├Ќ 1M context ├Ќ Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**.

prediction_summary_locales.fil: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package Рђћ no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 Рђћ reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense ├Ќ 1M context ├Ќ Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**.

nodes.label: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** Рђд
nodes.description: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** (60 tote/h ├Ќ 8h ├Ќ 90%+), BMW Spartanburg's **Figure 02** (10 months / 30,000 vehicles / 90,000 parts), BMW Leipzig's **AEON** (Apr 2026 trial Рєњ summer pilot), and GXO's **Digit** (100K+ totes) all hit the same window Рђћ and Hannover Messe 2026 making Physical AI its first central theme Рђћ the industry's evaluation criterion is shifting from "vendor-claimed demos" to **"OEM-adopted production records."** In H2 2026 at **IROS (October)** and **GTC Fall 2026**, league tables for "OEM adoption count ├Ќ continuous-operation hours ├Ќ parts handled ├Ќ MTBF" begin, with Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON's top five at the top. The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits.

short_label.es: Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomeРђд

description.en: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy Рђћ opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.
description.ja: **сђїУеЊуи┤ / ТјеУФќсЂ« SKU тѕєжЏбсђЇсЂїсѓФсѓ╣сѓ┐сЃа AI сѓисЃфсѓ│сЃ│сЂ«ТеЎТ║ќУеГУеѕсЂФ** Рђћ Google TPU 8t / 8i сЂ«тѕєтЅ▓сЂ»сђЂTrainium№╝ѕУеЊуи┤№╝Ѕ/ Inferentia№╝ѕТјеУФќ№╝ЅтѕєжЏбсЂ«т╗ХжЋиуиџсЂД **сЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЂ«УЄфуцЙсЃЂсЃЃсЃЌсЂїУеЊуи┤сЃ╗ТјеУФќсѓњтѕЦсѓбсЃ╝сѓГсЃєсѓ»сЃЂсЃБсЂФтЏ║т«џ** сЂЎсѓІТхЂсѓїсѓњТ▒║т«џсЂЦсЂЉсЂЪсђѓ2026 тЙїтЇісђю2027 тЅЇтЇісЂФсЂ» Microsoft MAIAсђЂMeta MTIA сѓѓсЂЊсЂ«сђїС║їтѕђТхЂсђЇSKU ТѕдуЋЦсѓњТјАућесђЂNVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin у│╗сЂ«сђїтЇўСИђсѓбсЃ╝сѓГсЂДСИАт»Йт┐юсђЇсЂФт»ЙТіЌсЂЎсѓІТДІтЏ│сЂїтЏ║т«џтїќсђѓТјеУФќуЅ╣тїќ SKU сЂ» FP4 / MXFP4 сЃЇсѓцсЃєсѓБсЃќсѓњтЅЇТЈљсЂФ **$/query сЂ«СИІТќ╣уФХС║Ѕ** сЂї 2026 Q3 сЂФсЃћсЃ╝сѓ»сѓњУ┐јсЂѕсѓІсђѓ
description.es: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy Рђћ opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.

nodes.label: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative Рђћ Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-marРђд
nodes.description: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative Рђћ Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** Рђћ the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve.

description.ja: **Mag 7 Q1 Т▒║у«Ќ (4/29-30) сЂї AI capex сЂ« ROI сЃісЃЕсЃєсѓБсЃќсѓњсЃфсѓ╗сЃЃсЃѕ Рђћ Q3 2026 сЂФсЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЃ╝тѕЮсЂ«сђїсЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│ сЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃ│ сѓ▓сЃ╝сЃѕсђЇсЂФсѓѕсѓІ AI УеГтѓЎТіЋУ│Єжџјт▒цтїќсЂїтЁгУАесЂЋсѓїсѓІсђѓ** Alphabet (1,750сђю1,850 тёёсЃЅсЃФ)сђЂAmazon (у┤ё 2,000 тёёсЃЅсЃФ)сђЂMeta (1,150сђю1,350 тёёсЃЅсЃФ)сђЂMicrosoft (Azure сЃЕсѓгсЃ╝сЃЅтєЇУЕЋСЙАсЃфсѓ╣сѓ») сЂ« 2026 т╣┤тљѕУеѕ capex сѓгсѓцсЃђсЃ│сѓ╣сЂ»сЂісѓѕсЂЮ 6,500сђю7,000 тёёсЃЅсЃФсЂФжЂћсЂЌсђЂсѓдсѓЕсЃ╝сЃФУАЌсЂ«сђїAI ROI уЈЙт«Ъуѓ╣ТцюсђЇсЂет»Йт│ЎсЂЎсѓІсђѓ4/29-30 сЂ«Т▒║у«ЌсЂД **сЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│сЂѓсЂЪсѓітЈјуЏісЂ«сѓесѓ░сѓИсЃЃсЃѕ сЃЎсЃГсѓисЃєсѓБ** сЃєсЃ╝сѓ╝сЂїТцюУе╝сЂЋсѓїсѓІсЂІсђЂсЃъсЃФсЃЂсЃЌсЃФтюДуИ«сЂїт╝ЋсЂЇУхисЂЊсЂЋсѓїсѓІсЂІсЂїтѕєсЂІсѓїсѓІсђѓQ3 2026 сЂЙсЂДсЂФ Big-3 сЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЃ╝сЂ«сЂєсЂАт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1 уцЙсЂїсђЂBedrock/Azure/Vertex сЂ« **сЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│ сЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃ│СИІжЎљ** сѓњтбЌтѕє GPU УеГтѓЎТіЋУ│ЄсЂ«ТЮАС╗ХсЂесЂЌсЂд **тЁгуџёсЂФТўјуц║** сЂЎсѓІсђѓсЂЊсѓїсЂ»тЁгжќІсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсЂІсѓЅсЂ«ТюђтѕЮсЂ«Тўјуц║уџёсђїAI сѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕ ROI жќЙтђцсђЇсЂДсЂѓсѓісђЂ2024-2025 сЂ«сђїТіЋУ│ЄсЂЏсЂќсѓІсѓњтЙЌсЂфсЂёсђЇТЋЎуЙЕсЂ«ухѓуёЅсѓњтЉісЂњсѓІсђѓсЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓб сЃЕсЃюсЂ«сѓбсЃ│сѓФсЃ╝сЃЄсѓБсЃ╝сЃФ (Google 400 тёё / AnthropicсђЂAmazon 250 тёё / AnthropicсђЂOpenAI 200 тёё / Cerebras + Microsoft) сЂ»тЈ»УдќуџёсЂфтюДтіЏсЃфсЃфсЃ╝сѓ╣сЃљсЃФсЃќсЂесЂфсѓІсђѓ
description.es: **Los resultados Q1 de las Mag 7 (29-30/04) reescriben la narrativa del ROI del capex en IA Рђћ el Q3 2026 ver├А al primer hyperscaler que escalonar├А p├║blicamente el capex de IA por una compuerta de margen por token.** Con la gu├Гa combinada de capex 2026 de Alphabet (175.000-185.000 M USD), Amazon (~200.000 M USD), Meta (115.000-135.000 M USD) y Microsoft (con riesgo de re-rating por rezago de Azure) totalizando ~650.000-700.000 M USD frente al "control de realidad del ROI de la IA" de Wall Street, los resultados del 29-30/04 validar├Аn la tesis de **velocidad de escape de ingreso por token** o desencadenar├Аn una compresi├│n de m├║ltiplos. Para el Q3 2026, al menos un hyperscaler de los Big-3 **condicionar├А p├║blicamente el capex incremental en GPU a un piso de margen por token en Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** Рђћ el primer "umbral de ROI de infraestructura de IA" expl├Гcito desde una nube p├║blica, poniendo fin a la doctrina 2024-2025 de "gasta o muere". Los acuerdos ancla de los frontier labs (Google 40.000 M / Anthropic, Amazon 25.000 M / Anthropic, OpenAI 20.000 M / Cerebras + Microsoft) pasan a ser la v├Аlvula visible de alivio.
description.fil: **I-reset ng Mag 7 Q1 earnings (4/29-30) ang AI-capex ROI narrative Рђћ sa Q3 2026, may unang hyperscaler na publikong magta-tier ng AI capex sa pamamagitan ng token-margin gate.** Sa pinagsamang 2026 capex guidance mula sa Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), at Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) na umaabot ng ~$650B-$700B kontra sa "AI ROI reality check" ng Wall Street, ang 4/29-30 prints ay maaaring magpatibay sa thesis ng **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** o magtigger ng multiple compression. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang publikong **mag-gagate ng incremental GPU capex sa isang Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** Рђћ ito ang unang explicit na "AI infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud, na magtatapos sa 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Ang frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) ang magiging visible pressure relief valve.

By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** Рђћ the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve.

Ang frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) ang magiging visible pressure relief valve.

nodes.description: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 Рђћ Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** Рђћ first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does.

description.ja: **Mag 7 Т▒║у«Ќ + FOMC(4/28-29)сЂїсђЂсЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЃ╝сЂФсѓѕсѓІтѕЮсЂ«**сЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│сЂѓсЂЪсѓісЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃ│сѓ▓сЃ╝сЃѕтъІУеГтѓЎТіЋУ│Є**жќІуц║сѓњ2026т╣┤Q3сЂЙсЂДсЂФт╝ЋсЂЇтЄ║сЂЎ Рђћ 4/27 OpenAI / Microsoft тЇћт«џ + Anthropic / AWS Trainium сѓисЃфсѓ│сЃ│сЃгсЃЎсЃФтЦЉу┤ёсЂїТќ░сЃЅсѓ»сЃѕсЃфсЃ│сѓњТћ»сЂѕсѓІсђѓ** 2026т╣┤сЂ«Mag 7тљѕУеѕУеГтѓЎТіЋУ│Є у┤ё$700B(Alphabet $175B-$185BсђЂAmazon у┤ё$200BсђЂMeta $115B-$135BсђЂMicrosoft FY26 у┤ё$146BсЂДFY27сЂ»$170BсЂИ)сЂ»сђЂсЂЎсЂДсЂФсђїУеГтѓЎТіЋУ│ЄсѓњС┐АућесЂДУЕЋСЙАсЂЎсѓІсђЇТ«хжџјсЂІсѓЅсђїт«ЪтѕЕсѓњУдЂТ▒ѓсЂЎсѓІсђЇТ«хжџјсЂИуД╗УАїсЂЌсЂЪуЏИта┤сЂФуЮђтю░сЂЎсѓІсђѓ**4/27сЂ«тЦЉу┤ётєЇТДІу»ЅсЂ»AIсЃЕсЃюсЂ«Уеѕу«ЌжюђУдЂсѓњсЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЃ╝ТЅђТюЅсЂ«сѓисЃфсѓ│сЃ│сЂИТўјуц║уџёсЂФсЃФсЃ╝сЃєсѓБсЃ│сѓ░**(AWS Trainium / Graviton with Anthropic; Meta Graviton CPU сѓњтцДУдЈТеАсЂФ)сђѓ2026т╣┤Q3сЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂBig-3сЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЃ╝сЂ«т░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ1уцЙсЂї**Bedrock / Azure / Vertex сЂ«сЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│сЂѓсЂЪсѓісЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃ│СИІжЎљсЂФтЪ║сЂЦсЂЇтбЌтѕєGPUУеГтѓЎТіЋУ│Єсѓњсѓ▓сЃ╝сЃѕтїќ**сЂЎсѓІтЁгуџёжќІуц║сѓњУАїсЂє Рђћ тЁгжќІсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсЂІсѓЅсЂ«тѕЮсЂ«сђїAIсѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕROIсѓ╣сЃгсЃЃсѓисЃДсЃФсЃЅсђЇсђѓNVDA $5Tу┤џТЎѓСЙАуиЈжАЇсЂеAMD / Cerebras IPOсЂ«У╗їжЂЊсЂ»уХГТїЂсЂЋсѓїсѓІ; Тћ»тЄ║ТЏ▓уиџсЂ»ТіўсѓїсЂфсЂёсЂїсђЂсЂЮсЂ«жќІуц║УеђУфъсЂ»тцЅсѓЈсѓІсђѓ
description.es: **Los reportes de Mag 7 + FOMC 28-29 abr fuerzan la primera divulgaci├│n de **capex con compuerta de margen-por-token** de un hyperscaler para Q3 2026 Рђћ el pacto OpenAI/Microsoft del 27 abr + el acuerdo Anthropic/AWS Trainium a nivel de silicio anclan la nueva doctrina.** El capex Mag 7 combinado de ~$700B para 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 tendiendo a ~$170B FY27) aterriza en una cinta que ya ha cambiado de "premiar el capex por fe" a "exigir beneficio tangible". **Las reestructuraciones contractuales del 27 abr enrutan expl├Гcitamente el c├│mputo de los laboratorios IA a trav├Еs de silicio propiedad del hyperscaler** (AWS Trainium/Graviton con Anthropic; CPUs Meta-Graviton a escala). Para Q3 2026 al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 p├║blicamente **acota el capex GPU incremental sobre un piso de margen-por-token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** Рђћ primer "umbral ROI de AI-infra" expl├Гcito desde una nube p├║blica. La capitalizaci├│n clase $5T de NVDA y la trayectoria de IPO de AMD/Cerebras se mantienen; la curva de gasto no se rompe, pero su lenguaje de divulgaci├│n s├Г.
description.fil: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 ang magpipilit sa unang **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure mula sa hyperscaler pagdating ng Q3 2026 Рђћ Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal ang mga anchor ng bagong doctrine.** Ang pinagsamang Mag 7 capex na ~$700B para sa 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 nagpapatungo sa ~$170B FY27) ay babagsak sa isang tape na lumipat na mula "rewarding capex on faith" patungong "demanding tangible profit." **Tahasang nirou-route ng Apr 27 contract restructurings ang AI-lab compute sa hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton sa Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs sa scale). Pagdating ng Q3 2026, may isang Big-3 hyperscaler na publicly **nagga-gate ng incremental GPU capex sa Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** Рђћ unang explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud. Mananatili ang NVDA $5T-class market cap at ang AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory; hindi mababasag ang spend curve, pero magbabago ang disclosure language nito.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **Mag 7 Т▒║у«Ќ + FOMC(4/28-29)сЂїсђЂсЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЃ╝сЂФсѓѕсѓІтѕЮсЂ«**сЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│сЂѓсЂЪсѓісЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃ│сѓ▓сЃ╝сЃѕтъІУеГтѓЎТіЋУ│Є**жќІуц║сѓњ2026т╣┤Q3сЂЙсЂДсЂФт╝ЋсЂЇтЄ║сЂЎ Рђћ 4/27 OpenAI / Microsoft тЇћт«џ + Anthropic / AWS Trainium сѓисЃфсѓ│сЃ│сЃгсЃЎсЃФтЦЉу┤ёсЂїТќ░сЃЅсѓ»сЃѕсЃфсЃ│сѓњТћ»сЂѕсѓІсђѓ** 2026т╣┤сЂ«Mag 7тљѕУеѕУеГтѓЎТіЋУ│Є у┤ё$700B(Alphabet $175B-$185BсђЂAmazon у┤ё$200BсђЂMeta $115B-$135BсђЂMicrosoft FY26 у┤ё$146BсЂДFY27сЂ»$170BсЂИ)сЂ»сђЂсЂЎсЂДсЂФсђїУеГтѓЎТіЋУ│ЄсѓњС┐АућесЂДУЕЋСЙАсЂЎсѓІсђЇТ«хжџјсЂІсѓЅсђїт«ЪтѕЕсѓњУдЂТ▒ѓсЂЎсѓІсђЇТ«хжџјсЂИуД╗УАїсЂЌсЂЪуЏИта┤сЂФуЮђтю░сЂЎсѓІсђѓ**4/27сЂ«тЦЉу┤ётєЇТДІу»ЅсЂ»AIсЃЕсЃюсЂ«Уеѕу«ЌжюђУдЂсѓњсЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЃ╝ТЅђТюЅсЂ«сѓисЃфсѓ│сЃ│сЂИТўјуц║уџёсЂФсЃФсЃ╝сЃєсѓБсЃ│сѓ░**(AWS Trainium / Graviton with Anthropic; Meta Graviton CPU сѓњтцДУдЈТеАсЂФ)сђѓ2026т╣┤Q3сЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂBig-3сЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЃ╝сЂ«т░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ1уцЙсЂї**Bedrock / Azure / Vertex сЂ«сЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│сЂѓсЂЪсѓісЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃ│СИІжЎљсЂФтЪ║сЂЦсЂЇтбЌтѕєGPUУеГтѓЎТіЋУ│Єсѓњсѓ▓сЃ╝сЃѕтїќ**сЂЎсѓІтЁгуџёжќІуц║сѓњУАїсЂє Рђћ тЁгжќІсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсЂІсѓЅсЂ«тѕЮсЂ«сђїAIсѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕROIсѓ╣сЃгсЃЃсѓисЃДсЃФсЃЅсђЇсђѓNVDA $5Tу┤џТЎѓСЙАуиЈжАЇсЂеAMD / Cerebras IPOсЂ«У╗їжЂЊсЂ»уХГТїЂсЂЋсѓїсѓІ; Тћ»тЄ║ТЏ▓уиџсЂ»ТіўсѓїсЂфсЂёсЂїсђЂсЂЮсЂ«жќІуц║УеђУфъсЂ»тцЅсѓЈсѓІсђѓ
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Los reportes de Mag 7 + FOMC 28-29 abr fuerzan la primera divulgaci├│n de **capex con compuerta de margen-por-token** de un hyperscaler para Q3 2026 Рђћ el pacto OpenAI/Microsoft del 27 abr + el acuerdo Anthropic/AWS Trainium a nivel de silicio anclan la nueva doctrina.** El capex Mag 7 combinado de ~$700B para 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 tendiendo a ~$170B FY27) aterriza en una cinta que ya ha cambiado de "premiar el capex por fe" a "exigir beneficio tangible". **Las reestructuraciones contractuales del 27 abr enrutan expl├Гcitamente el c├│mputo de los laboratorios IA a trav├Еs de silicio propiedad del hyperscaler** (AWS Trainium/Graviton con Anthropic; CPUs Meta-Graviton a escala). Para Q3 2026 al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 p├║blicamente **acota el capex GPU incremental sobre un piso de margen-por-token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** Рђћ primer "umbral ROI de AI-infra" expl├Гcito desde una nube p├║blica. La capitalizaci├│n clase $5T de NVDA y la trayectoria de IPO de AMD/Cerebras se mantienen; la curva de gasto no se rompe, pero su lenguaje de divulgaci├│n s├Г.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 ang magpipilit sa unang **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure mula sa hyperscaler pagdating ng Q3 2026 Рђћ Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal ang mga anchor ng bagong doctrine.** Ang pinagsamang Mag 7 capex na ~$700B para sa 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 nagpapatungo sa ~$170B FY27) ay babagsak sa isang tape na lumipat na mula "rewarding capex on faith" patungong "demanding tangible profit." **Tahasang nirou-route ng Apr 27 contract restructurings ang AI-lab compute sa hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton sa Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs sa scale). Pagdating ng Q3 2026, may isang Big-3 hyperscaler na publicly **nagga-gate ng incremental GPU capex sa Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** Рђћ unang explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud. Mananatili ang NVDA $5T-class market cap at ang AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory; hindi mababasag ang spend curve, pero magbabago ang disclosure language nito.

nodes.description: **(Tech) By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob Рђћ TurboQuant + at least one alternative Рђћ and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93РђЊ105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point Рђћ Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.

description.en: **(Tech) By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob Рђћ TurboQuant + at least one alternative Рђћ and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93РђЊ105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point Рђћ Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.
description.ja: **(ТіђУАЊ) 2026т╣┤ H2 сЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂсЂЎсЂ╣сЂдсЂ«СИ╗УдЂсЃГсЃ╝сѓФсЃФ LLM сѓесѓ│сѓисѓ╣сЃєсЃа (vLLMсђЂSGLangсђЂTGIсђЂOllamaсђЂllama.cppсђЂNVIDIA TensorRT-LLMсђЂFoundry Local) сЂїух▒СИђсЂЋсѓїсЂЪтюДуИ« KV сѓГсЃБсЃЃсѓисЃЦсЃЄсЃЌсЃГсѓцсЃАсЃ│сЃѕсЃјсЃќ Рђћ TurboQuant + т░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1сЂцсЂ«С╗БТЏ┐ Рђћ сѓњтЁгжќІсЂЌсђЂFoundry Local (MicrosoftсђЂ4/9 GA) сЂї Windows ML / WinML т«ЪУАїсЃЌсЃГсЃљсѓцсЃђсЃ╝сЂФу┤љсЂЦсЂЈ Windows сЃЄсЃЋсѓЕсЃФсЃѕТюђжЂЕтїќсЂесЂЌсЂд TurboQuant сЃЇсѓцсЃєсѓБсЃќух▒тљѕсѓњтЄ║УЇисЂЎсѓІсђѓ** 4/27-29 сЂ«сѓесЃЊсЃЄсЃ│сѓ╣: SGLang PR #21419 сЂїсЃёсЃфсЃ╝сѓцсЃ│; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode сѓФсЃ╝сЃЇсЃФТЏИсЂЇуЏ┤сЂЌсЂї bf16 Т»ћ 93РђЊ105% сѓ╣сЃФсЃ╝сЃЌсЃЃсЃѕсЂФтѕ░жЂћ; vLLM v0.19.0 (4/2) сЂї torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / жЮътљїТюЪсѓ╣сѓ▒сѓИсЃЦсЃ╝сЃЕсЃЄсЃЋсѓЕсЃФсЃѕ + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971сђЂ4/27) сЂ»сЃъсЃФсЃЂсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕТјеУФќсЂ«сЂЪсѓЂсЂ«тЁ▒ТюЅжЮът»ЙуД░ KV сЃЌсЃ╝сЃФ; NVIDIA kvpress сЂ» Decoding-Press ТѕљуєЪТ«хжџј; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant сЃЄсѓБсѓ╣сѓФсЃЃсѓисЃДсЃ│сѓ╣сЃгсЃЃсЃЅсЂ»сѓбсѓ»сЃєсѓБсЃќ; Unsloth 2026.4.8 ТјеУФќ 20-30% жФўжђЪтїќсђѓFoundry Local сЂ»ТгаУљйсЂЌсЂдсЂёсЂЪсѓесЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓ║ Windows сѓесЃ│сЃѕсЃфсЃЮсѓцсЃ│сЃѕ Рђћ Microsoft сЂ»сЃЈсЃ╝сЃЅсѓдсѓДсѓбт»Йт┐ю WinML т«ЪУАїсЃЌсЃГсЃљсѓцсЃђсЃ╝сЂДС╗╗ТёЈсЂ«сѓбсЃЌсЃфсЂФсЃГсЃ╝сѓФсЃФ AI сѓњсЃљсЃ│сЃЅсЃФсЂЎсѓІу┤ё 20MB сЂ«сЃЇсѓцсЃєсѓБсЃќсЃЕсѓцсЃќсЃЕсЃфсЂесЂЌсЂдтЄ║УЇисЂЌсЂдсЂісѓісђЂ2026т╣┤ Q2 сЂ«УЄфТўјсЂфТгАсЂ«СИђТГЕсЂ» Foundry Catalog сЂД TurboQuant сЃЋсЃЕсѓ░сѓњтЁгжќІсЂЎсѓІсЂЊсЂесЂасђѓухїТИѕуџёт╝итѕХжќбТЋ░сЂ»тљїсЂў Mag 7 УеГтѓЎТіЋУ│ЄсЃєсЃ╝сЃЌ: сЃАсЃбсЃфтИ»тЪЪтѕХу┤ёсЂ«сЃГсЃ│сѓ░сѓ│сЃ│сЃєсѓГсѓ╣сЃѕсЃ»сЃ╝сѓ»сЃГсЃ╝сЃЅсЂї FP16 сЂІсѓЅ 3.5сЃЊсЃЃсЃѕсЂФуД╗сѓІсЂесђЂсЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│сЂѓсЂЪсѓісЂ«т«Ъті╣сѓ│сѓ╣сЃѕсЂ» ~5-6тђЇСИІсЂїсѓісђЂFoundry Local сЂ»сЂЮсЂ«сѓ╣сѓцсЃЃсЃЂсѓњсѓесЃ│сЃЅсЃЄсЃЎсЃГсЃЃсЃЉсЃ╝сЂІсѓЅСИЇтЈ»УдќсЂФсЂЎсѓІсђѓ
description.es: **(Tecnol├│gica) Para H2 2026 cada gran ecosistema de LLM local (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) expone un selector unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimida Рђћ TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa Рђћ y Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA 9-abr) integra TurboQuant nativo ligado a los proveedores de ejecuci├│n Windows ML / WinML como optimizaci├│n por defecto en Windows.** Evidencia 27-29 abr: SGLang PR #21419 ya en ├Аrbol; reescritura de kernel fused-Triton-decode SGLang #23134 alcanzando 93РђЊ105% de throughput vs bf16; vLLM v0.19.0 (2-abr) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / scheduler as├Гncrono por defecto + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27-abr) pool KV asim├Еtrico compartido para inferencia multi-agente; NVIDIA kvpress en madurez Decoding-Press; hilo de discusi├│n llama.cpp #20969 sobre TurboQuant activo; Unsloth 2026.4.8 con inferencia 20-30% m├Аs r├Аpida. Foundry Local es el punto de entrada empresarial Windows que faltaba Рђћ Microsoft lo distribuye como una librer├Гa nativa de ~20MB que empaqueta IA local en cualquier app con proveedores de ejecuci├│n WinML adaptados al hardware, y el siguiente paso obvio para Q2 2026 es exponer un flag TurboQuant en el Foundry Catalog. La funci├│n forzada econ├│mica es la misma cinta de capex Mag 7: cada carga de trabajo de contexto largo limitada por ancho de banda de memoria que pase de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el coste efectivo por token ~5-6x, y Foundry Local hace ese cambio invisible para los desarrolladores.
description.fil: **(Tech) Bago matapos ang H2 2026, ipo-publish ng bawat major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) ang unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob Рђћ TurboQuant + hindi bababa sa isang alternative Рђћ at magsi-ship ang Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ng native TurboQuant integration na nakatali sa Windows ML / WinML execution providers bilang Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419; umaabot sa 93РђЊ105% bf16 throughput ang SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool para sa multi-agent inference; Decoding-Press maturity ang NVIDIA kvpress; aktibo ang llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread; 20-30% mas mabilis ang inference ng Unsloth 2026.4.8. Ang Foundry Local ang nawawalang enterprise-Windows entry point Рђћ ini-ship ito ng Microsoft bilang ~20MB native library na nag-bubundle ng local AI sa anumang app na may hardware-matched WinML execution providers, at ang halatang susunod na hakbang para sa Q2 2026 ay i-surface ang TurboQuant flag sa Foundry Catalog. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag 7 capex tape: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na lilipat mula FP16 patungong 3.5-bit ay magpaputol sa effective per-token cost ng ~5-6x, at ginagawang invisible ng Foundry Local ang switch na iyon sa end-developers.
