Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point Рђћ Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.
summary.ja: **(ТіђУАЊ) 2026т╣┤ H2 сЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂсЂЎсЂ╣сЂдсЂ«СИ╗УдЂсЃГсЃ╝сѓФсЃФ LLM сѓесѓ│сѓисѓ╣сЃєсЃа (vLLMсђЂSGLangсђЂTGIсђЂOllamaсђЂllama.cppсђЂNVIDIA TensorRT-LLMсђЂFoundry Local) сЂїух▒СИђсЂЋсѓїсЂЪтюДуИ« KV сѓГсЃБсЃЃсѓисЃЦсЃЄсЃЌсЃГсѓцсЃАсЃ│сЃѕсЃјсЃќ Рђћ TurboQuant + т░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1сЂцсЂ«С╗БТЏ┐ Рђћ сѓњтЁгжќІсЂЌсђЂFoundry Local (MicrosoftсђЂ4/9 GA) сЂї Windows ML / WinML т«ЪУАїсЃЌсЃГсЃљсѓцсЃђсЃ╝сЂФу┤љсЂЦсЂЈ Windows сЃЄсЃЋсѓЕсЃФсЃѕТюђжЂЕтїќсЂесЂЌсЂд TurboQuant сЃЇсѓцсЃєсѓБсЃќух▒тљѕсѓњтЄ║УЇисЂЎсѓІсђѓ** 4/27-29 сЂ«сѓесЃЊсЃЄсЃ│сѓ╣: SGLang PR #21419 сЂїсЃёсЃфсЃ╝сѓцсЃ│; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode сѓФсЃ╝сЃЇсЃФТЏИсЂЇуЏ┤сЂЌсЂї bf16 Т»ћ 93РђЊ105% сѓ╣сЃФсЃ╝сЃЌсЃЃсЃѕсЂФтѕ░жЂћ; vLLM v0.19.0 (4/2) сЂї torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / жЮътљїТюЪсѓ╣сѓ▒сѓИсЃЦсЃ╝сЃЕсЃЄсЃЋсѓЕсЃФсЃѕ + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971сђЂ4/27) сЂ»сЃъсЃФсЃЂсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕТјеУФќсЂ«сЂЪсѓЂсЂ«тЁ▒ТюЅжЮът»ЙуД░ KV сЃЌсЃ╝сЃФ; NVIDIA kvpress сЂ» Decoding-Press ТѕљуєЪТ«хжџј; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant сЃЄсѓБсѓ╣сѓФсЃЃсѓисЃДсЃ│сѓ╣сЃгсЃЃсЃЅсЂ»сѓбсѓ»сЃєсѓБсЃќ; Unsloth 2026.4.8 ТјеУФќ 20-30% жФўжђЪтїќсђѓFoundry Local сЂ»ТгаУљйсЂЌсЂдсЂёсЂЪсѓесЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓ║ Windows сѓесЃ│сЃѕсЃфсЃЮсѓцсЃ│сЃѕ Рђћ Microsoft сЂ»сЃЈсЃ╝сЃЅсѓдсѓДсѓбт»Йт┐ю WinML т«ЪУАїсЃЌсЃГсЃљсѓцсЃђсЃ╝сЂДС╗╗ТёЈсЂ«сѓбсЃЌсЃфсЂФсЃГсЃ╝сѓФсЃФ AI сѓњсЃљсЃ│сЃЅсЃФсЂЎсѓІу┤ё 20MB сЂ«сЃЇсѓцсЃєсѓБсЃќсЃЕсѓцсЃќсЃЕсЃфсЂесЂЌсЂдтЄ║УЇисЂЌсЂдсЂісѓісђЂ2026т╣┤ Q2 сЂ«УЄфТўјсЂфТгАсЂ«СИђТГЕсЂ» Foundry Catalog сЂД TurboQuant сЃЋсЃЕсѓ░сѓњтЁгжќІсЂЎсѓІсЂЊсЂесЂасђѓухїТИѕуџёт╝итѕХжќбТЋ░сЂ»тљїсЂў Mag 7 УеГтѓЎТіЋУ│ЄсЃєсЃ╝сЃЌ: сЃАсЃбсЃфтИ»тЪЪтѕХу┤ёсЂ«сЃГсЃ│сѓ░сѓ│сЃ│сЃєсѓГсѓ╣сЃѕсЃ»сЃ╝сѓ»сЃГсЃ╝сЃЅсЂї FP16 сЂІсѓЅ 3.5сЃЊсЃЃсЃѕсЂФуД╗сѓІсЂесђЂсЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│сЂѓсЂЪсѓісЂ«т«Ъті╣сѓ│сѓ╣сЃѕсЂ» ~5-6тђЇСИІсЂїсѓісђЂFoundry Local сЂ»сЂЮсЂ«сѓ╣сѓцсЃЃсЃЂсѓњсѓесЃ│сЃЅсЃЄсЃЎсЃГсЃЃсЃЉсЃ╝сЂІсѓЅСИЇтЈ»УдќсЂФсЂЎсѓІсђѓ
summary.es: **(Tecnol├│gica) Para H2 2026 cada gran ecosistema de LLM local (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) expone un selector unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimida Рђћ TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa Рђћ y Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA 9-abr) integra TurboQuant nativo ligado a los proveedores de ejecuci├│n Windows ML / WinML como optimizaci├│n por defecto en Windows.** Evidencia 27-29 abr: SGLang PR #21419 ya en ├Аrbol; reescritura de kernel fused-Triton-decode SGLang #23134 alcanzando 93РђЊ105% de throughput vs bf16; vLLM v0.19.0 (2-abr) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / scheduler as├Гncrono por defecto + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27-abr) pool KV asim├Еtrico compartido para inferencia multi-agente; NVIDIA kvpress en madurez Decoding-Press; hilo de discusi├│n llama.cpp #20969 sobre TurboQuant activo; Unsloth 2026.4.8 con inferencia 20-30% m├Аs r├Аpida. Foundry Local es el punto de entrada empresarial Windows que faltaba Рђћ Microsoft lo distribuye como una librer├Гa nativa de ~20MB que empaqueta IA local en cualquier app con proveedores de ejecuci├│n WinML adaptados al hardware, y el siguiente paso obvio para Q2 2026 es exponer un flag TurboQuant en el Foundry Catalog. La funci├│n forzada econ├│mica es la misma cinta de capex Mag 7: cada carga de trabajo de contexto largo limitada por ancho de banda de memoria que pase de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el coste efectivo por token ~5-6x, y Foundry Local hace ese cambio invisible para los desarrolladores.
summary.fil: **(Tech) Bago matapos ang H2 2026, ipo-publish ng bawat major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) ang unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob Рђћ TurboQuant + hindi bababa sa isang alternative Рђћ at magsi-ship ang Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ng native TurboQuant integration na nakatali sa Windows ML / WinML execution providers bilang Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419; umaabot sa 93РђЊ105% bf16 throughput ang SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool para sa multi-agent inference; Decoding-Press maturity ang NVIDIA kvpress; aktibo ang llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread; 20-30% mas mabilis ang inference ng Unsloth 2026.4.8. Ang Foundry Local ang nawawalang enterprise-Windows entry point Рђћ ini-ship ito ng Microsoft bilang ~20MB native library na nag-bubundle ng local AI sa anumang app na may hardware-matched WinML execution providers, at ang halatang susunod na hakbang para sa Q2 2026 ay i-surface ang TurboQuant flag sa Foundry Catalog. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag 7 capex tape: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na lilipat mula FP16 patungong 3.5-bit ay magpaputol sa effective per-token cost ng ~5-6x, at ginagawang invisible ng Foundry Local ang switch na iyon sa end-developers.

detail.title: Tech) By H2 2026 every major local-LLMРђд
detail.subtitle: Prediction ┬и Business
detail.description: **(Tech) By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob Рђћ TurboQuant + at least one alternative Рђћ and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93РђЊ105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point Рђћ Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.

nodes.label: **(Non-tech) The Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination cements 2026 as tРђд
nodes.description: **(Non-tech) The Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination cements 2026 as the year AI-capex disclosure splits into two reporting cadences Рђћ by Q4 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (most likely Microsoft, given the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) publishes audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) as a 10-Q footnote; the broader S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) follows with quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure.** Apr 29 Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate (+123%) was the disclosure precedent; Apr 30 Apple's record Services $30.98B (+16%) included no separate AI-services line; Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) on the way to $700B 2026 capex is the buyside-pressure number; mid-May Cerebras IPO at $22-25B with 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration is the disclosure stress-test. Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% on print day) shows public-market price discrimination is already operating on imprecise AI-revenue numbers; the path of least resistance is for the most-disclosing hyperscaler to set the precedent and force the cohort to follow. SEC will not need to act ahead of voluntary disclosure here Рђћ the buyside is the forcing function.

description.en: **(Non-tech) The Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination cements 2026 as the year AI-capex disclosure splits into two reporting cadences Рђћ by Q4 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (most likely Microsoft, given the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) publishes audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) as a 10-Q footnote; the broader S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) follows with quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure.** Apr 29 Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate (+123%) was the disclosure precedent; Apr 30 Apple's record Services $30.98B (+16%) included no separate AI-services line; Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) on the way to $700B 2026 capex is the buyside-pressure number; mid-May Cerebras IPO at $22-25B with 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration is the disclosure stress-test. Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% on print day) shows public-market price discrimination is already operating on imprecise AI-revenue numbers; the path of least resistance is for the most-disclosing hyperscaler to set the precedent and force the cohort to follow. SEC will not need to act ahead of voluntary disclosure here Рђћ the buyside is the forcing function.
description.ja: **(Non-tech) Mag 7 сѓдсѓБсЃ╝сѓ» + $700B AI УеГтѓЎТіЋУ│ЄТЋ░тђц + 4/30 Apple сЂ« +$1,000тёёУЄфуцЙТафУ▓исЂё + 4% тбЌжЁЇсЂ«ухёсЂ┐тљѕсѓЈсЂЏсЂДсђЂ2026т╣┤сЂ» AI УеГтѓЎТіЋУ│ЄсЂ«жќІуц║сЂїС║їу│╗ух▒сЂФтѕєтїќсЂЎсѓІт╣┤сЂесЂфсѓІ Рђћ 2026 Q4 сЂЙсЂДсЂФ Big-3 сЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕ(4/29 сЂФ AI сЃЕсЃ│сЃгсЃ╝сЃѕ $37B(+123%)сѓњжќІуц║ТИѕсЂ┐сЂ« Microsoft сЂїТюђТюЅтіЏ)сЂї AI С║ІТЦГ KPI(сЃЕсЃ│сЃгсЃ╝сЃѕсђЂУф▓жЄЉсѓисЃ╝сЃѕсђЂсЃЄсЃЌсЃГсѓцТИѕсЂ┐сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕ)сЂ«ТюѕТгА 10-Q УёџТ│ежќІуц║сЂФУИЈсЂ┐тѕЄсѓісђЂсѓѕсѓіт║ЃсЂё S&P AI сѓ│сЃЏсЃ╝сЃѕ(AppleсђЂСИіта┤тЙї CerebrasсђЂBroadcom)сЂї AI С║ІТЦГтѕЦсЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃ│тЏЏтЇіТюЪжќІуц║сЂДуХџсЂЈсђѓ** 4/29 Microsoft сЂ« $37B AI сЃЕсЃ│сЃгсЃ╝сЃѕ(+123%)сЂїжќІуц║сЂ«тЅЇСЙІсђЂ4/30 Apple сЂ«сѓхсЃ╝сЃЊсѓ╣тБ▓СИіжЂјтј╗ТюђжФў $30.98B(+16%)сЂФ AI сѓхсЃ╝сЃЊсѓ╣тѕЦУАїсЂ»сЂфсЂЌсђЂ4/30 Big Tech Q1 УеГтѓЎТіЋУ│Є $130B УХЁ Рєњ 2026т╣┤жђџТюЪ $700B сЂїУ▓исЂёТЅІтЂ┤сЂ«тюДтіЏТЋ░тђцсђЂ5ТюѕСИГТЌг Cerebras IPO сЂ« $22-25B(G42 24% / MBZUAI 62% сЂ«тЈјуЏіжЏєСИГ)сЂїжќІуц║сЂ«У▓аУЇиУЕджеЊсђѓ4/28 WSJ OpenAI тБ▓СИіТюфжЂћ + 4/29 Mag 7 сЂ«сЂЙсЂасѓЅТѕ╗сѓі(META -7.5%сђЂMSFT -3.8% on print day)сЂїуц║сЂЎсЂесЂісѓісђЂтЁгжќІтИѓта┤сЂ»СИЇТГБуб║сЂф AI тБ▓СИіТЋ░тђцсЂФт»ЙсЂЌсЂдТЌбсЂФСЙАТа╝ти«тѕЦсѓњтДІсѓЂсЂдсЂёсѓІсђѓSEC сЂ«С╗ІтЁЦсѓњтЙЁсЂЪсЂџсђЂТюђсѓѓжќІуц║сЂЎсѓІ 1 уцЙсЂїтЅЇСЙІсѓњТЅЊсЂАсђЂсѓ│сЃЏсЃ╝сЃѕсѓњУ┐йтЙЊсЂЋсЂЏсѓІухїУи»сЂїТюђт░ЈТіхТіЌсђѓУ▓исЂёТЅІтЂ┤сЂЊсЂЮсЂїжДєтІЋтіЏсђѓ
description.es: **(No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinaci├│n del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el a├▒o en que la divulgaci├│n del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte Рђћ para el Q4 de 2026, al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (probablemente Microsoft, dado el precedente del 29/abr de "AI run-rate" de 37.000 M) publica KPIs mensuales auditados del negocio AI (tasa anualizada, asientos pagos, agentes desplegados) en una nota al pie del 10-Q; la cohorte AI m├Аs amplia del S&P (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sigue con divulgaci├│n trimestral de margen por negocio AI.** La tasa AI de 37.000 M (+123%) de Microsoft del 29/abr fue el precedente de divulgaci├│n; los Servicios r├Еcord de 30.980 M (+16%) de Apple del 30/abr no incluyen l├Гnea separada de servicios AI; los >130.000 M de capex Q1 de Big Tech (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) en camino a 700.000 M en 2026 es el n├║mero de presi├│n del lado comprador; la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo a 22-25.000 M con concentraci├│n 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI es la prueba de estr├Еs de la divulgaci├│n. El WSJ del 28/abr sobre menores ingresos de OpenAI + el reset mixto de los Mag 7 del 29/abr (META -7,5%, MSFT -3,8% el d├Гa de la publicaci├│n) muestran que el mercado p├║blico ya est├А discriminando precios sobre cifras AI imprecisas; la senda de menor resistencia es que el hyperscaler m├Аs comunicativo siente el precedente y arrastre a la cohorte. La SEC no necesitar├А actuar antes de la divulgaci├│n voluntaria Рђћ la fuerza motriz es el lado comprador.
description.fil: **(Non-tech) Ang Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination ay magpapatibay sa 2026 bilang taon na hahati ang AI-capex disclosure sa dalawang reporting cadences Рђћ pagdating ng Q4 2026, magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (malamang ang Microsoft, dahil sa Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) ng audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) bilang 10-Q footnote; susunod ang mas malawak na S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sa quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure.** Ang Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate (+123%) ng Microsoft ang disclosure precedent; ang Apr 30 record na Services $30.98B (+16%) ng Apple ay walang hiwalay na linya ng AI services; ang Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) papuntang $700B 2026 capex ang buyside-pressure number; ang mid-May Cerebras IPO sa $22-25B na may 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration ang disclosure stress-test. Ipinapakita ng Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% sa print day) na ang public-market price discrimination ay umuusad na sa imprecise AI-revenue numbers; ang path of least resistance ay para sa pinakanagdi-disclose na hyperscaler na maglatag ng precedent at pumilit sa cohort na sumunod. Hindi na kailangang mag-act ang SEC bago ang voluntary disclosure Рђћ ang buyside ang forcing function.

prediction_summary_locales.es: **(No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinaci├│n del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el a├▒o en que la divulgaci├│n del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte Рђћ para el Q4 de 2026, al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (probablemente Microsoft, dado el precedente del 29/abr de "AI run-rate" de 37.000 M) publica KPIs mensuales auditados del negocio AI (tasa anualizada, asientos pagos, agentes desplegados) en una nota al pie del 10-Q; la cohorte AI m├Аs amplia del S&P (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sigue con divulgaci├│n trimestral de margen por negocio AI.** La tasa AI de 37.000 M (+123%) de Microsoft del 29/abr fue el precedente de divulgaci├│n; los Servicios r├Еcord de 30.980 M (+16%) de Apple del 30/abr no incluyen l├Гnea separada de servicios AI; los >130.000 M de capex Q1 de Big Tech (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) en camino a 700.000 M en 2026 es el n├║mero de presi├│n del lado comprador; la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo a 22-25.000 M con concentraci├│n 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI es la prueba de estr├Еs de la divulgaci├│n. El WSJ del 28/abr sobre menores ingresos de OpenAI + el reset mixto de los Mag 7 del 29/abr (META -7,5%, MSFT -3,8% el d├Гa de la publicaci├│n) muestran que el mercado p├║blico ya est├А discriminando precios sobre cifras AI imprecisas; la senda de menor resistencia es que el hyperscaler m├Аs comunicativo siente el precedente y arrastre a la cohorte. La SEC no necesitar├А actuar antes de la divulgaci├│n voluntaria Рђћ la fuerza motriz es el lado comprador.

Hindi na kailangang mag-act ang SEC bago ang voluntary disclosure Рђћ ang buyside ang forcing function.

nodes.description: **(Non-tech) Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility Рђћ by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (РЅц2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language.** Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2.

description.es: **(No tech) La decisi├│n de Powell de seguir en la Junta de la Fed hasta 2028 + la disensi├│n 8-4 del 29/abr (la mayor desde octubre de 1992) + el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may al inicio de la ventana de relevo del 15/may desplaza la psicolog├Гa del mercado de pol├Гtica monetaria de 2026 de "volatilidad de tipos" a "volatilidad institucional" Рђћ para el Q4 de 2026 el FOMC bajo Warsh como presidente vuelve a una norma de menor disensi├│n (РЅц2) en decisiones de tipos, pero el desacuerdo Powell-Warsh sobre la gobernanza de la investigaci├│n a la Fed se convierte en el voto pivote en cualquier cuesti├│n de independencia de la Fed; los eventos de re-rating del capex AI en bolsa se vuelven m├Аs sensibles a las se├▒ales de la Junta que al lenguaje del comunicado del FOMC.** El 29/abr fue el primer FOMC con 4 disidentes desde 1992; la permanencia de Powell en la Junta es in├Еdita desde 1948; Warsh fue confirmado por el Comit├Е Bancario del Senado el 29/abr con votaci├│n plenaria prevista antes del 15/may; el tape mensual del 30/abr de los Mag 7 (mejor mes desde 2020) est├А parcialmente puesto en precio sobre expectativas de bajadas de tipos que la postura disidente del FOMC a├║n no valida; el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may en consenso 135 K (vs 178 K de marzo) es el primer dato m├Аs d├Еbil dentro de la ventana de relevo. El r├│tulo "Powell como shadow chair" fue espec├Гficamente rechazado por Powell el 29/abr ("no ser├Е un shadow chair"), pero la realidad institucional de una Junta de 7 miembros con Powell como gobernador disidente bajo un presidente Warsh genera exactamente esa din├Аmica en cuestiones de independencia, aunque no en tipos. Los mercados comprimir├Аn el precio de la volatilidad de tipos e inflar├Аn el precio del riesgo institucional a lo largo de H2 2026.
description.fil: **(Non-tech) Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Federal Reserve Board hanggang 2028 + ang Apr 29 8-4 dissent (pinakamataas mula Oct-1992) + ang May 1 Apr-jobs print sa harap ng May 15 Chair handoff window ay magbabago ng 2026 monetary-policy market psychology mula rate-volatility patungong institutional-volatility Рђћ pagdating ng Q4 2026 babalik ang FOMC sa ilalim ni Warsh sa smaller-dissent norm (РЅц2) sa rate calls pero ang Powell-Warsh disagreement sa Fed-investigation governance ang magiging marginal swing-vote sa anumang Fed-independence question; mas magiging sensitibo ang equity-market AI-capex re-rating events sa Fed-Board signaling kaysa sa FOMC statement language.** Ang Apr 29 ang unang 4-dissenter FOMC mula 1992; ang Powell-staying-on-Board ay walang precedent mula 1948; nakumpirma si Warsh sa Senate Banking noong Apr 29 na may full-Senate vote bago ang May 15; ang Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (pinakamagandang buwan mula 2020) ay partly priced sa rate-cut hopes na hindi pa na-validate ng FOMC dissent posture; ang May 1 Apr jobs print sa consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) ang unang weakening data papasok sa handoff window. Ang "Powell as shadow chair" framing ay tinanggihan ni Powell sa Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") pero ang institutional reality ng 7-member Board na may Powell bilang dissenting governor sa ilalim ni Warsh chair ay gumagawa eksakto ng dynamic na iyon sa Fed-independence questions, kahit hindi sa rates. Pipilitin ng markets na liitin ang rate-volatility pricing at palakihin ang institutional-risk pricing sa buong H2 2026.

Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2.

summary.es: **(No tech) La decisi├│n de Powell de seguir en la Junta de la Fed hasta 2028 + la disensi├│n 8-4 del 29/abr (la mayor desde octubre de 1992) + el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may al inicio de la ventana de relevo del 15/may desplaza la psicolog├Гa del mercado de pol├Гtica monetaria de 2026 de "volatilidad de tipos" a "volatilidad institucional" Рђћ para el Q4 de 2026 el FOMC bajo Warsh como presidente vuelve a una norma de menor disensi├│n (РЅц2) en decisiones de tipos, pero el desacuerdo Powell-Warsh sobre la gobernanza de la investigaci├│n a la Fed se convierte en el voto pivote en cualquier cuesti├│n de independencia de la Fed; los eventos de re-rating del capex AI en bolsa se vuelven m├Аs sensibles a las se├▒ales de la Junta que al lenguaje del comunicado del FOMC.** El 29/abr fue el primer FOMC con 4 disidentes desde 1992; la permanencia de Powell en la Junta es in├Еdita desde 1948; Warsh fue confirmado por el Comit├Е Bancario del Senado el 29/abr con votaci├│n plenaria prevista antes del 15/may; el tape mensual del 30/abr de los Mag 7 (mejor mes desde 2020) est├А parcialmente puesto en precio sobre expectativas de bajadas de tipos que la postura disidente del FOMC a├║n no valida; el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may en consenso 135 K (vs 178 K de marzo) es el primer dato m├Аs d├Еbil dentro de la ventana de relevo. El r├│tulo "Powell como shadow chair" fue espec├Гficamente rechazado por Powell el 29/abr ("no ser├Е un shadow chair"), pero la realidad institucional de una Junta de 7 miembros con Powell como gobernador disidente bajo un presidente Warsh genera exactamente esa din├Аmica en cuestiones de independencia, aunque no en tipos. Los mercados comprimir├Аn el precio de la volatilidad de tipos e inflar├Аn el precio del riesgo institucional a lo largo de H2 2026.
summary.fil: **(Non-tech) Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Federal Reserve Board hanggang 2028 + ang Apr 29 8-4 dissent (pinakamataas mula Oct-1992) + ang May 1 Apr-jobs print sa harap ng May 15 Chair handoff window ay magbabago ng 2026 monetary-policy market psychology mula rate-volatility patungong institutional-volatility Рђћ pagdating ng Q4 2026 babalik ang FOMC sa ilalim ni Warsh sa smaller-dissent norm (РЅц2) sa rate calls pero ang Powell-Warsh disagreement sa Fed-investigation governance ang magiging marginal swing-vote sa anumang Fed-independence question; mas magiging sensitibo ang equity-market AI-capex re-rating events sa Fed-Board signaling kaysa sa FOMC statement language.** Ang Apr 29 ang unang 4-dissenter FOMC mula 1992; ang Powell-staying-on-Board ay walang precedent mula 1948; nakumpirma si Warsh sa Senate Banking noong Apr 29 na may full-Senate vote bago ang May 15; ang Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (pinakamagandang buwan mula 2020) ay partly priced sa rate-cut hopes na hindi pa na-validate ng FOMC dissent posture; ang May 1 Apr jobs print sa consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) ang unang weakening data papasok sa handoff window. Ang "Powell as shadow chair" framing ay tinanggihan ni Powell sa Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") pero ang institutional reality ng 7-member Board na may Powell bilang dissenting governor sa ilalim ni Warsh chair ay gumagawa eksakto ng dynamic na iyon sa Fed-independence questions, kahit hindi sa rates. Pipilitin ng markets na liitin ang rate-volatility pricing at palakihin ang institutional-risk pricing sa buong H2 2026.

detail.title: Non-tech) Powell's decision to stay onРђд
detail.subtitle: Prediction ┬и Business
detail.description: **(Non-tech) Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility Рђћ by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (РЅц2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language.** Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2.

nodes.label: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for РЅЦ30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, bРђд
nodes.description: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for РЅЦ30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** Рђћ local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" Рђћ and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact.

description.en: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for РЅЦ30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** Рђћ local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" Рђћ and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact.
description.ja: **сђїсѓ│сЃ│сѓисЃЦсЃ╝сЃъ GPU СИісЂ«сѓ│сЃ╝сЃЄсѓБсЃ│сѓ░сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсђЇсЂї Q3 2026 сЂЙсЂДсЂФжќІуЎ║сЃ»сЃ╝сѓ»сЃГсЃ╝сЃЅсЂ« 30% С╗ЦСИісЂДсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсѓфсЃ│сЃфсЃ╝ API сѓњуй«сЂЇТЈЏсЂѕсѓІсђѓ** 4/22 сЂ« Qwen3.6-27B (DenseсђЂSWE-bench Verified сЂД 397B-A17B сѓњТњЃуа┤сђЂ**RTX 3090 + Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB сЂД 40 tok/s**) + 4/23 сЂ« Ollama MLX сЃЌсЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝ (M5 Max + Qwen3.5-35B-A3B сЂД prefill 1.57 тђЇ / decode 1.93 тђЇ) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75% сѓфсЃЋ API (**Claude Opus 4.7 Т»ћсЂДт«Ъті╣ ~28 тђЇт«ЅСЙА**) сЂїуІгУЄфсЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓб API SaaS сЃбсЃЄсЃФсЂИсЂ« **3 Тќ╣тљЉсЂ«ТїЪТњЃ**сѓњТДІТѕљсђѓQ3 2026 сЂЙсЂДсЂФ **сѓесЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓ║жќІуЎ║сЃёсЃ╝сЃФсЂ»сЃЈсѓцсЃќсЃфсЃЃсЃЅсЃЈсЃ╝сЃЇсѓ╣сЂїсЃЄсЃЋсѓЕсЃФсЃѕ** Рђћ сђїсѓ│сЃ╝сЃЄсѓБсЃ│сѓ░сђЂсЃфсЃЋсѓАсѓ»сѓ┐сЃфсЃ│сѓ░сђЂLintсђЂсЃєсѓ╣сЃѕсђЇсЂ»сЃГсЃ╝сѓФсЃФ Qwen 3.6 сѓ»сЃЕсѓ╣сђЂсђїжЋиТюЪУеѕућ╗ / сЃъсЃФсЃЂсЃёсЃ╝сЃФТјеУФќсђЇсЂ«сЂ┐сЃфсЃбсЃ╝сЃѕ сЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓб API Рђћ сЂїТеЎТ║ќтїќсђѓBig-3 IDE (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) сЂ»сЂЎсЂ╣сЂд **сЃГсЃ╝сѓФсЃФсЃЋсѓАсЃ╝сѓ╣сЃѕтѕЄТЏ┐** сѓњсЃЄсЃЋсѓЕсЃФсЃѕсЂДТљГУ╝Ѕсђѓсђїсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсѓфсЃ│сЃфсЃ╝ сѓ│сЃ╝сЃЄсѓБсЃ│сѓ░сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсђЇсЂ» 2024 т╣┤жЂ║уЅЕсЂесЂфсѓІсђѓ
description.es: **El "agente de coding sobre GPU de consumo" desplaza a la API de coding solo-cloud en РЅЦ30 % de las cargas dev para el T3 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B del 22/4 (denso, supera al 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s en RTX 3090 con Q4_K_M ~16,8 GB**) + el preview MLX de Ollama del 23/4 (1,57x prefill / 1,93x decode en M5 Max sobre Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + la API DeepSeek V4-Pro 75 % off (**efectivamente ~28x m├Аs barata que Claude Opus 4.7**) componen un **acoso a tres bandas** sobre el modelo SaaS de API frontera propietaria. Para el T3 2026, **las herramientas dev empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness h├Гbrido** Рђћ Qwen 3.6 local para "coding, refactor, lint, test" + API frontera remota solo para "planificaci├│n de horizonte largo / razonamiento multi-tool" Рђћ y los Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) traen un **conmutador local-first** activado por defecto. El "agente de coding solo-cloud" queda como reliquia de 2024.
description.fil: **Papalitan ng "consumer-GPU coding agent" ang cloud-only coding API sa РЅЦ30% ng dev workloads pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B (dense, nakahihigit sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s sa RTX 3090 sa Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max para sa Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x mas mura kaysa Claude Opus 4.7**) ay bumubuo ng **3-corner squeeze** sa proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **gagamit ang enterprise dev tools ng hybrid harness bilang default** Рђћ local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" Рђћ at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay maglalabas ng **local-first toggle** bilang default. Magiging 2024-era artifact na lang ang "cloud-only coding agent".

nodes.label: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive Рђћ Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + ageРђд
nodes.description: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive Рђћ Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence Рђћ **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** Рђћ is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3.

short_label.es: La "clase CVE de infraestructura de IA"Рђд

description.en: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive Рђћ Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence Рђћ **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** Рђћ is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3.
description.ja: **сђїAI сѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕ CVE сѓ»сЃЕсѓ╣сђЇсЂїУдЈтѕХсЃЌсЃфсЃЪсЃєсѓБсЃќсЂИТўЄТа╝ Рђћ Q4 2026 сЂФ CISA / NIST сЂї KEV сЂІсѓЅуІгуФІсЂЌсЂЪсђїТјеУФќсѓхсЃ╝сЃљ + сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃєсѓБсЃЃсѓ» CI сЃЕсЃ│сѓ┐сѓцсЃасђЇсѓхсЃќсѓФсѓ┐сЃГсѓ░сѓњтЁгжќІсђѓ** 4/19-27 сЂ«сѓисЃ╝сѓ▒сЃ│сѓ╣ Рђћ **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 ТЎѓжќЊ 31 тѕє)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (СЙЮуёХТюфсЃЉсЃЃсЃЂ)** + **Pillar сЂ« Antigravity сѓхсЃ│сЃЅсЃюсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣ сѓесѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЌ (`find_by_name -X` ухїућ▒)** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE (CI/CD тЪ║уЏцСЙЮтГў)** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control сЃЌсЃГсЃ│сЃЌсЃѕ сѓцсЃ│сѓИсѓДсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│ сЃЂсѓДсЃ╝сЃ│ (Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 сѓхсЃ│сЃЅсЃюсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣ сЃљсѓцсЃЉсѓ╣** Рђћ сЂ»сѓѓсЂ»сѓёсђїсѓФсЃєсѓ┤сЃфтйбТѕљСИГсђЇсЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂёсђѓNIST сЂ« 4 ТюѕсѓфсЃџсЃгсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│ТЏ┤Тќ░ (CVE тЁгжќІТЋ░сЂ«Уеўжї▓уџётбЌтіасђЂAI жДєтІЋУЕЋСЙАсѓхсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕ) сЂе Google сЂ« **жЄјућЪ IPI сѓ│сЃ│сЃєсЃ│сЃётЅЇт╣┤Т»ћ 32% тбЌ** сѓњтЈЌсЂЉсЂдсђЂCISA/NVD сЂї Q4 2026 сЂЙсЂДсЂФ **т░ѓућесЂ«сђїТјеУФќсѓхсЃ╝сЃљ + сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃєсѓБсЃЃсѓ» сЃёсЃ╝сЃФсђЇCVE сѓхсЃќсѓФсѓ┐сЃГсѓ░** сѓњ SBOM сѓ┐сѓ░С╗ўсЂЉт┐ЁжаѕсЂДсЃфсЃфсЃ╝сѓ╣сђѓOWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 сЂ»сђїInference Server Template / Loader RCEсђЇсѓњсЃѕсЃЃсЃЌ 3 сЂФТа╝СИісЂњсђѓ
description.es: **La "clase CVE de infraestructura de IA" se grad├║a como primitiva regulatoria Рђћ el Q4 2026 ver├А a CISA / NIST publicar un subcat├Аlogo para runtimes de servidores de inferencia + CI agente, separado del KEV.** La secuencia 19-27/04 Рђћ **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (sigue sin parche)** + **escape de sandbox en Antigravity v├Гa `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + **CVE-2026-6951 RCE en simple-git, dependencia fundacional de CI/CD** + **cadena de inyecci├│n Comment-and-Control del 21/04 en Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **bypass de sandbox en OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329** Рђћ ya no es una "categor├Гa emergente". La actualizaci├│n de operaciones de NIST de abril (crecimiento r├Еcord de publicaci├│n de CVE, soporte de evaluaci├│n basado en IA) m├Аs el **aumento del 32% interanual de inyecciones indirectas en la wild de Google** obligan a CISA/NVD a entregar un **subcat├Аlogo CVE dedicado a servidores de inferencia + herramientas agente** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio para el Q4 2026. El OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" al top 3.
description.fil: **Mag-graduate ang "AI-Infra CVE class" papuntang regulatory primitive Рђћ sa Q4 2026, mag-publish ang CISA / NIST ng sub-catalog para sa inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, hiwalay sa KEV.** Ang sequence ng 4/19-27 Рђћ **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (hindi pa rin na-patch)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa foundational CI/CD dep** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** Рђћ hindi na "category emerging." Ang April ops update ng NIST (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus ang **32% YoY na pagtaas ng indirect-prompt-injection sa wild ng Google** ang magpipilit sa CISA/NVD na mag-ship ng **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging pagdating ng Q4 2026. I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" papuntang top-3.

OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3.

prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Mag-graduate ang "AI-Infra CVE class" papuntang regulatory primitive Рђћ sa Q4 2026, mag-publish ang CISA / NIST ng sub-catalog para sa inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, hiwalay sa KEV.** Ang sequence ng 4/19-27 Рђћ **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (hindi pa rin na-patch)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa foundational CI/CD dep** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** Рђћ hindi na "category emerging." Ang April ops update ng NIST (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus ang **32% YoY na pagtaas ng indirect-prompt-injection sa wild ng Google** ang magpipilit sa CISA/NVD na mag-ship ng **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging pagdating ng Q4 2026. I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" papuntang top-3.

nodes.label: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here. Amazon-Anthropic's 10-year $100B commit becomes the secondРђд
nodes.description: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here. Amazon-Anthropic's 10-year $100B commit becomes the second "hardware-codesigned + platform-exclusive" contract after MS-OpenAI. Through H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect the **5-pole regime** Рђћ GoogleРђЊ(in-house Gemini), AnthropicРђЊAWS, OpenAIРђЊMS, MetaРђЊinternal (Llama), xAIРђЊOracle/NVDA Рђћ to lock in. Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X design differences will translate directly into model-behavior differences, and developers will reassess **backend portability** (a runtime-agnostic layer like MCP) as a hard requirement.

nodes.description: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura ├Ќ AWS, DEEPX ├Ќ Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.**

nodes.label: **OAuth trust between AI SaaS becomes the top enterprise risk.** The Vercel-Context.ai case shows how an employee's personal AI Office SaaS Рђд
nodes.short_label: OAuth trust between AI SaaS becomes theРђд
nodes.description: **OAuth trust between AI SaaS becomes the top enterprise risk.** The Vercel-Context.ai case shows how an employee's personal AI Office SaaS connection can turn into the breach path for the company's whole Google Workspace. By Q3 2026, major SSO providers (Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace) will **carve out an "AI extension" OAuth scope category**, letting administrators block "Allow All" defaults wholesale. CASB / SSPM vendors will report "data volume read by AI integrations" as an independent metric.

description.en: **OAuth trust between AI SaaS becomes the top enterprise risk.** The Vercel-Context.ai case shows how an employee's personal AI Office SaaS connection can turn into the breach path for the company's whole Google Workspace. By Q3 2026, major SSO providers (Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace) will **carve out an "AI extension" OAuth scope category**, letting administrators block "Allow All" defaults wholesale. nodes.label: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS BedrocРђд
nodes.short_label: The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the nРђд
nodes.description: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. CASB / SSPM vendors will measure "API calls touched by AI agents" with a separate SLO / risk score from human-user baselines.

description.en: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. description.ja: **сђїAgent Control PlaneсђЇсЂїсЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕуФХС║ЅсЂ«Тќ░СИ╗Тѕдта┤сЂФ** Рђћ Google сЂ« Gemini Enterprise Agent PlatformсђЂAWS Bedrock AgentCore сЂ«Тќ░ Managed Harness / CLI / skillsсђЂOpenAI сЂ« Workspace Agents сЂ»сђЂсЂёсЂџсѓїсѓѓсђїсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсЂ«сЃЕсѓцсЃЋсѓхсѓцсѓ»сЃФу«АуљєсЃ╗уЏБТЪ╗сЃ╗сѓгсЃљсЃісЃ│сѓ╣сђЇсѓњтЇўСИђсѓ│сЃ│сЃѕсЃГсЃ╝сЃФсЃЌсЃгсЃ╝сЃ│сЂФТЮЪсЂГсѓІтљїСИђТќ╣тљЉсЂ«ТѕдуЋЦсђѓ2026 Q3 сЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂOkta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace сЂ« SSO сЃгсѓцсЃцсЂ»сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕУГўтѕЦтГљсѓњС║║жќЊ / сѓхсЃ╝сЃЊсѓ╣сѓбсѓФсѓдсЃ│сЃѕсЂетљїуГЅсЂ«уггСИђу┤џсѓфсЃќсѓИсѓДсѓ»сЃѕсЂесЂЌсЂдТЅ▒сЂёсђЂCASB / SSPM сЃЎсЃ│сЃђсЂ»сђїAI сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсЂїУДдсѓїсѓІ API тЉ╝сЂ│тЄ║сЂЌжЄЈсђЇсѓњС║║жќЊсЃдсЃ╝сѓХтЪ║Т║ќсЂесЂ»тѕЦсЂ« SLO / сЃфсѓ╣сѓ»сѓ╣сѓ│сѓбсЂДУеѕТИгсЂЎсѓІТеЎТ║ќсЂФуД╗УАїсЂЎсѓІсђѓ

nodes.description: **The "frontier AI lab ├Ќ Tier-1 cloud capacity capture" splits the field cleanly by Q3 2026.** With Google Cloud confirming three deals in a single month Рђћ Anthropic (GB300 + large TPU), Meta (GB300 capacity), Thinking Machines Lab (A4X Max) Рђћ the structure crystallizes: clouds with enough capacity for frontier model development narrow to three (AWS / Azure / GCP). Amazon counters with **another $25B + 5GW Trainium2/3 capacity + 10-year $100B commit** for Anthropic; Azure holds OpenAI / Mistral / Inflection; GCP adds Anthropic / TML / Meta. By Q3 2026, "fourth-hyperscaler candidates without their own cloud or long-term capacity contracts with frontier labs" (Oracle Cloud / IBM / Coreweave) shift fully to **"unable to train frontier-scale, specialize on inference."** AI silicon ecosystems lock into a two-tier shape: training capacity = three-cloud oligopoly / inference = layered.

description.en: **The "frontier AI lab ├Ќ Tier-1 cloud capacity capture" splits the field cleanly by Q3 2026.** With Google Cloud confirming three deals in a single month Рђћ Anthropic (GB300 + large TPU), Meta (GB300 capacity), Thinking Machines Lab (A4X Max) Рђћ the structure crystallizes: clouds with enough capacity for frontier model development narrow to three (AWS / Azure / GCP). Amazon counters with **another $25B + 5GW Trainium2/3 capacity + 10-year $100B commit** for Anthropic; Azure holds OpenAI / Mistral / Inflection; GCP adds Anthropic / TML / Meta. By Q3 2026, "fourth-hyperscaler candidates without their own cloud or long-term capacity contracts with frontier labs" (Oracle Cloud / IBM / Coreweave) shift fully to **"unable to train frontier-scale, specialize on inference."** AI silicon ecosystems lock into a two-tier shape: training capacity = three-cloud oligopoly / inference = layered.
description.ja: **сђїсЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓб AI сЃЕсЃю ├Ќ Tier-1 сѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсЂ«т«╣жЄЈтЏ▓сЂёУЙ╝сЂ┐сђЇсЂї 2026 Q3 сЂЙсЂДсЂФт«їтЁетѕєтЅ▓уиџсЂесЂЌсЂдуб║т«џ** Рђћ Google Cloud тЇўТюѕсЂД Anthropic№╝ѕGB300 + TPU тцДтъІтЦЉу┤ё№╝ЅсђЂMeta№╝ѕGB300 т«╣жЄЈ№╝ЅсђЂThinking Machines Lab№╝ѕA4X Max№╝ЅсЂ« 3 С╗Хсѓњуб║т«џсЂЋсЂЏсЂЪС║Іт«ЪсЂ»сђЂсђїсЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбсЃбсЃЄсЃФжќІуЎ║сЂФтЇЂтѕєсЂфт«╣жЄЈсѓњТїЂсЂцсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсЂ» 3 уцЙ№╝ѕAWS / Azure / GCP№╝ЅсЂФухъсѓЅсѓїсѓІсђЇТДІжђасЂ«тЏ║т«џтїќсѓњТёЈтЉ│сЂЎсѓІсђѓAmazon сЂї Anthropic сЂФ **У┐йтіа $25B + 5GW Trainium2/3 т«╣жЄЈ + 10 т╣┤ $100B сѓ│сЃЪсЃЃсЃѕ** сЂДт»ЙТіЌсђЂAzure сЂ» OpenAI / Mistral / Inflection у│╗сѓњТЈАсѓісђЂGCP сЂ» Anthropic / TML / Meta сѓњтіасЂѕсѓІсђѓ2026 Q3 сЂЙсЂДсЂФсђїУЄфуцЙсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсѓњТїЂсЂЪсЂфсЂё / сЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбсЃЕсЃюсЂесЂ«жЋиТюЪт«╣жЄЈтЦЉу┤ёсѓњТїЂсЂЪсЂфсЂёугг 4 сЂ«сЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕтђЎУБюсђЇ№╝ѕOracle Cloud / IBM / Coreweave сЂфсЂЕ№╝ЅсЂ» **сђїсЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбУеЊуи┤СИЇтЈ»УЃйсЂасЂїТјеУФќТюђжЂЕтїќсЂФуЅ╣тїќсђЇ** сЂИСйЇуй«С╗ўсЂЉсЂїт«їтЁесѓисЃЋсЃѕсЂЌсђЂAI сЃЂсЃЃсЃЌућЪТЁІу│╗сЂ»сђїУеЊуи┤т«╣жЄЈ = 3 уцЙт»АтЇа / ТјеУФќ = тцџт▒цтїќсђЇсЂ«С║їт▒цТДІжђасЂФтЏ║сЂЙсѓІсђѓ

nodes.description: **"Hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" graduates from finance pact to compute-stack lock-in by Q3 2026.** Apr 24's Google **$40B + 5GW** to Anthropic + the prior Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft's existing $13B+ to OpenAI mean the **top 3 frontier labs each have a hyperscaler underwriter Рђћ paid partly in compute capacity, not cash**. By Q3 2026, **frontier-model serving topology becomes dictated by funding origin**: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 ships natively on Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 stays Azure-first, and Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) double down on Huawei Ascend (per the Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). The "model-portability promise" of 2024-2025 quietly ends; **enterprise multi-cloud LLM strategy shifts from "multi-runtime" to "multi-frontier-vendor."**

description.en: **"Hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" graduates from finance pact to compute-stack lock-in by Q3 2026.** Apr 24's Google **$40B + 5GW** to Anthropic + the prior Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft's existing $13B+ to OpenAI mean the **top 3 frontier labs each have a hyperscaler underwriter Рђћ paid partly in compute capacity, not cash**. By Q3 2026, **frontier-model serving topology becomes dictated by funding origin**: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 ships natively on Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 stays Azure-first, and Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) double down on Huawei Ascend (per the Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). The "model-portability promise" of 2024-2025 quietly ends; **enterprise multi-cloud LLM strategy shifts from "multi-runtime" to "multi-frontier-vendor."**

description.es: **El "acoplamiento de capital hyperscaler-laboratorio AI" deja de ser pacto financiero para convertirse en bloqueo de la pila de c├│mputo durante el T3 2026.** El compromiso del 24/4 de Google **40.000 M$ + 5 GW** a Anthropic + el previo Amazon **25.000 M$ + 5 GW de Trainium2/3** + los m├Аs de 13.000 M$ hist├│ricos de Microsoft a OpenAI suponen que **los tres laboratorios frontera tienen un padrino hyperscaler Рђћ pagado en parte con capacidad de c├│mputo, no en met├Аlico**. Para el T3 2026, **la topolog├Гa de servicio de modelos frontera quedar├А dictada por el origen de la financiaci├│n**: Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nativo en Trainium2 + TPU v8 (v├Гas Amazon + Google), GPT-5.5 / 6 sigue Azure-first y los laboratorios chinos (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) doblan apuesta por Huawei Ascend (seg├║n el art├Гculo Bloomberg-CCTV del 26/4). La "promesa de portabilidad de modelos" de 2024-2025 se apaga; **la estrategia LLM multi-cloud de la empresa pasa de "multi-runtime" a "multi-vendor frontera"**.
description.fil: **Magmamadali ang "hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" mula sa finance pact tungo sa compute-stack lock-in pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 24 Google **$40B + 5GW** sa Anthropic + ang naunang Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + ang umiiral na $13B+ ng Microsoft sa OpenAI ay nangangahulugang **bawat isa sa tatlong frontier labs ay may hyperscaler underwriter Рђћ bahagyang binabayaran sa pamamagitan ng compute capacity, hindi cash**. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **ang serving topology ng frontier models ay didiktahan ng pinanggalingan ng pondo**: Mag-ship ang Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nang native sa Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), magiging Azure-first pa rin ang OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6, at lalong magpopokus ang Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) sa Huawei Ascend (gaya ng nasa Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). Tahimik na matatapos ang "model-portability promise" ng 2024-2025; **ang multi-cloud LLM strategy ng enterprise ay lilipat mula "multi-runtime" tungo sa "multi-frontier-vendor"**.

The "model-portability promise" of 2024-2025 quietly ends; **enterprise multi-cloud LLM strategy shifts from "multi-runtime" to "multi-frontier-vendor."**

prediction_summary_locales.es: **El "acoplamiento de capital hyperscaler-laboratorio AI" deja de ser pacto financiero para convertirse en bloqueo de la pila de c├│mputo durante el T3 2026.** El compromiso del 24/4 de Google **40.000 M$ + 5 GW** a Anthropic + el previo Amazon **25.000 M$ + 5 GW de Trainium2/3** + los m├Аs de 13.000 M$ hist├│ricos de Microsoft a OpenAI suponen que **los tres laboratorios frontera tienen un padrino hyperscaler Рђћ pagado en parte con capacidad de c├│mputo, no en met├Аlico**. Para el T3 2026, **la topolog├Гa de servicio de modelos frontera quedar├А dictada por el origen de la financiaci├│n**: Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nativo en Trainium2 + TPU v8 (v├Гas Amazon + Google), GPT-5.5 / 6 sigue Azure-first y los laboratorios chinos (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) doblan apuesta por Huawei Ascend (seg├║n el art├Гculo Bloomberg-CCTV del 26/4). La "promesa de portabilidad de modelos" de 2024-2025 se apaga; **la estrategia LLM multi-cloud de la empresa pasa de "multi-runtime" a "multi-vendor frontera"**.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Magmamadali ang "hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" mula sa finance pact tungo sa compute-stack lock-in pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 24 Google **$40B + 5GW** sa Anthropic + ang naunang Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + ang umiiral na $13B+ ng Microsoft sa OpenAI ay nangangahulugang **bawat isa sa tatlong frontier labs ay may hyperscaler underwriter Рђћ bahagyang binabayaran sa pamamagitan ng compute capacity, hindi cash**. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **ang serving topology ng frontier models ay didiktahan ng pinanggalingan ng pondo**: Mag-ship ang Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nang native sa Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), magiging Azure-first pa rin ang OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6, at lalong magpopokus ang Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) sa Huawei Ascend (gaya ng nasa Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). Tahimik na matatapos ang "model-portability promise" ng 2024-2025; **ang multi-cloud LLM strategy ng enterprise ay lilipat mula "multi-runtime" tungo sa "multi-frontier-vendor"**.

nodes.description: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template Рђћ by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab ├Ќ hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop a discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, replaced by fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Apr 27's Microsoft/OpenAI rewrite is no longer just about Azure exclusivity Рђћ it converts a binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk into a **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** and **multi-cloud distribution as the new default**. Google ├Ќ Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon ├Ќ Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI ├Ќ Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** Рђћ fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one.

Google ├Ќ Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon ├Ќ Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI ├Ќ Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** Рђћ fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. description.es: **El "deshilado de la cl├Аusula AGI" sienta una plantilla Рђћ para Q4 2026 al menos otro contrato laboratorio-fundacional ├Ќ hyperscaler se reformula p├║blicamente para abandonar una cl├Аusula discrecional de "gatillo de capacidad", reemplazada por reparto de ingresos con fecha fija + distribuci├│n multi-cloud no exclusiva.** La reescritura Microsoft / OpenAI del 27 abr ya no se trata s├│lo de exclusividad de Azure Рђћ convierte un riesgo binario, discrecional para el directorio, de revocaci├│n de PI en un **techo de ingresos basado en calendario (2030)** y **distribuci├│n multi-cloud como nuevo predeterminado**. El acuerdo Google ├Ќ Anthropic de $40B / 5GW, el compromiso Amazon ├Ќ Anthropic de $5B + $25B / $100B AWS, OpenAI ├Ќ Cerebras + Microsoft, y la pr├│xima IPO de Cerebras ($22B-$25B mediados de may) descansan sobre un lenguaje similar de gatillo de capacidad. **Para Q4 2026 veremos al menos uno de esos contratos p├║blicamente reestructurado para reflejar el patr├│n del 27 abr** Рђћ techo de ingresos con fecha fija, licencia no exclusiva, cl├Аusula de distribuci├│n multi-cloud. La palabra "AGI" se vuelve una primitiva de instrumento financiero, no una metaf├Гsica.
description.fil: **Ang "AGI-clause unwind" ay nagtatakda ng template Рђћ pagdating ng Q4 2026, may isa pang foundation-lab ├Ќ hyperscaler contract na publicly amended para alisin ang isang discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, pinalitan ng fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Hindi na lang tungkol sa Azure exclusivity ang Apr 27 Microsoft / OpenAI rewrite Рђћ kino-convert nito ang binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk sa **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** at **multi-cloud distribution bilang bagong default**. Ang Google ├Ќ Anthropic na $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon ├Ќ Anthropic na $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI ├Ќ Cerebras + Microsoft, at ang papalapit na Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) lahat nakaupo sa parehong capability-trigger language. **Pagdating ng Q4 2026 makikita natin ang isa man lang sa mga kontratang ito na publicly restructured para tumugma sa pattern ng Apr 27** Рђћ fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. Magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI", hindi metaphysical.

Google ├Ќ Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon ├Ќ Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI ├Ќ Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** Рђћ fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one.
summary.ja: **сђїAGIТЮАжаЁУДБТХѕсђЇсЂїсЃєсЃ│сЃЌсЃгсЃ╝сЃѕтїќ Рђћ 2026т╣┤Q4сЂЙсЂДсЂФт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓсѓѓсЂє1С╗ХсЂ«тЪ║уЏцсЃбсЃЄсЃФсЃЕсЃю ├Ќ сЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЃ╝тЦЉу┤ёсЂїсђЂУБЂжЄЈуџёсЂфсђїУЃйтіЏсЃѕсЃфсѓгсЃ╝сђЇТЮАжаЁсѓњуа┤ТБёсЂЌсђЂтЏ║т«џТюЪжЎљсЂ«тЈјуЏісѓисѓДсѓб + жЮъуІгтЇауџёсЂфсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅжЁЇС┐АсЂФуй«сЂЇТЈЏсЂѕсѓЅсѓїсѓІсђѓ** 4/27сЂ«Microsoft / OpenAIтєЇТДІу»ЅсЂ»тЇўсЂфсѓІAzureуІгтЇасЂ«тЋЈжАїсЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂЈсђЂС║їУђЁТіъСИђсЂ«тЈќуиатй╣С╝џУБЂжЄЈсЂФсѓѕсѓІIPТХѕТ╗ЁсЃфсѓ╣сѓ»сѓњ**сѓФсЃгсЃ│сЃђсЃ╝сЃЎсЃ╝сѓ╣сЂ«тЈјуЏісѓГсЃБсЃЃсЃЌ(2030т╣┤)**сЂе**сЃъсЃФсЃЂсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅжЁЇС┐АсѓњТќ░сЂЪсЂфсЃЄсЃЋсѓЕсЃФсЃѕ**сЂФтцЅТЈЏсЂЌсЂЪсђѓGoogle ├Ќ Anthropic сЂ«$40B / 5GWтЦЉу┤ёсђЂAmazon ├Ќ Anthropic сЂ«$5B + $25B / $100B AWSсѓ│сЃЪсЃЃсЃѕсђЂOpenAI ├Ќ Cerebras + MicrosoftсђЂсЂЮсЂЌсЂдУ┐ЉТЌЦСИГсЂФС║ѕт«џсЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂёсѓІCerebras IPO($22B-$25BсђЂ5ТюѕСИГТЌг)сЂ»сЂЎсЂ╣сЂдтљїТДўсЂ«УЃйтіЏсЃѕсЃфсѓгсЃ╝ТќЄУеђсѓњтљФсѓђсђѓ**2026т╣┤Q4сЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂсЂЊсѓїсѓЅсЂ«тЦЉу┤ёсЂ«сЂєсЂАт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ1С╗ХсЂї4/27сЂ«сЃЉсѓ┐сЃ╝сЃ│сѓњтЈЇТўасЂЎсѓІтйбсЂДтЁгсЂФтєЇТДІу»ЅсЂЋсѓїсѓІ** Рђћ тЏ║т«џТЌЦС╗ўсЂ«тЈјуЏісѓГсЃБсЃЃсЃЌсђЂжЮъуІгтЇасЃЕсѓцсѓ╗сЃ│сѓ╣сђЂсЃъсЃФсЃЂсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅжЁЇС┐АТЮАжаЁсђѓсђїAGIсђЇсЂесЂёсЂєУфъсЂ»тйбУђїСИіуџёТдѓт┐хсЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂЈсђЂжЄЉУъЇтЋєтЊЂсЃЌсЃфсЃЪсЃєсѓБсЃќсЂесЂфсѓІсђѓ
summary.es: **El "deshilado de la cl├Аusula AGI" sienta una plantilla Рђћ para Q4 2026 al menos otro contrato laboratorio-fundacional ├Ќ hyperscaler se reformula p├║blicamente para abandonar una cl├Аusula discrecional de "gatillo de capacidad", reemplazada por reparto de ingresos con fecha fija + distribuci├│n multi-cloud no exclusiva.** La reescritura Microsoft / OpenAI del 27 abr ya no se trata s├│lo de exclusividad de Azure Рђћ convierte un riesgo binario, discrecional para el directorio, de revocaci├│n de PI en un **techo de ingresos basado en calendario (2030)** y **distribuci├│n multi-cloud como nuevo predeterminado**. El acuerdo Google ├Ќ Anthropic de $40B / 5GW, el compromiso Amazon ├Ќ Anthropic de $5B + $25B / $100B AWS, OpenAI ├Ќ Cerebras + Microsoft, y la pr├│xima IPO de Cerebras ($22B-$25B mediados de may) descansan sobre un lenguaje similar de gatillo de capacidad. **Para Q4 2026 veremos al menos uno de esos contratos p├║blicamente reestructurado para reflejar el patr├│n del 27 abr** Рђћ techo de ingresos con fecha fija, licencia no exclusiva, cl├Аusula de distribuci├│n multi-cloud. La palabra "AGI" se vuelve una primitiva de instrumento financiero, no una metaf├Гsica.
summary.fil: **Ang "AGI-clause unwind" ay nagtatakda ng template Рђћ pagdating ng Q4 2026, may isa pang foundation-lab ├Ќ hyperscaler contract na publicly amended para alisin ang isang discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, pinalitan ng fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Hindi na lang tungkol sa Azure exclusivity ang Apr 27 Microsoft / OpenAI rewrite Рђћ kino-convert nito ang binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk sa **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** at **multi-cloud distribution bilang bagong default**. Ang Google ├Ќ Anthropic na $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon ├Ќ Anthropic na $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI ├Ќ Cerebras + Microsoft, at ang papalapit na Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) lahat nakaupo sa parehong capability-trigger language. **Pagdating ng Q4 2026 makikita natin ang isa man lang sa mga kontratang ito na publicly restructured para tumugma sa pattern ng Apr 27** Рђћ fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. Magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI", hindi metaphysical.

detail.title: The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template
detail.subtitle: Prediction ┬и Business
detail.description: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template Рђћ by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab ├Ќ hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop a discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, replaced by fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Apr 27's Microsoft/OpenAI rewrite is no longer just about Azure exclusivity Рђћ it converts a binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk into a **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** and **multi-cloud distribution as the new default**. Google ├Ќ Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon ├Ќ Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI ├Ќ Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** Рђћ fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one.

nodes.label: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack Рђћ vLLM, SGLang, TGI, OllaРђд
nodes.description: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack Рђћ vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.

The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.
description.ja: **Q4 2026сЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂKVсѓГсЃБсЃЃсѓисЃЦтюДуИ«dtypeсЂ»сЂЎсЂ╣сЂдсЂ«СИ╗УдЂТјеУФќсѓ╣сѓ┐сЃЃсѓ»сЂДсЃЋсѓАсЃ╝сѓ╣сЃѕсѓ»сЃЕсѓ╣сЂ«сЃЄсЃЌсЃГсѓцсЃ╗сЃјсЃќсЂесЂЌсЂджю▓тЄ║сЂЎсѓІ Рђћ vLLMсђЂSGLangсђЂTGIсђЂOllamaсђЂllama.cppсђЂNVIDIA TensorRT-LLMсЂї TurboQuant + 1сЂцС╗ЦСИісЂ«С╗БТЏ┐(KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention)сѓњтљїТб▒сЂЌсЂЪ`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`(сЂЙсЂЪсЂ»тљїуГЅ)сЃЋсЃЕсѓ░сѓњтЄ║УЇисЂЎсѓІсђѓ** 4/27РђЊ29сЂїсЂЊсѓїсѓњсЂ╗сЂ╝уб║т«ЪсЂФсЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІ: **TurboQuantсЂїICLR 2026 + Google ResearchсЃќсЃГсѓ░сЂФуЮђтю░**сђЂ**SGLang PR #21419сЂ»ТЌбсЂФсЃёсЃфсЃ╝тєЁ**(УъЇтљѕсѓФсЃ╝сЃЇсЃФТЏИсЂЇТЈЏсЂѕ#23134сЂДbf16Т»ћ93РђЊ105%сѓ╣сЃФсЃ╝сЃЌсЃЃсЃѕ)сђЂ**NVIDIA kvpress**сЂ»Decoding-PressТѕљуєЪсђЂ**PolyKV(arxiv 2604.24971)**сЂїсЃъсЃФсЃЂсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕтЁ▒ТюЅсЃЌсЃ╝сЃФжЄЈтГљтїќсѓњт«ЪУе╝сђЂ**сѓ│сЃЪсЃЦсЃІсЃєсѓБMLX + Triton + vLLMуД╗ТцЇ**сЂїGoogleсЂ«тЁгт╝ЈPythonт«ЪУБЁ(Q2 2026С║ѕт«џ)сЂФтЁѕУАїсЂЌсЂдТхЂжђџсђѓухїТИѕуџёсЂфт╝итѕХтіЏсЂ»4/28сЂ«WSJ OpenAIТюфжЂћсЂїтЅ▓сЂБсЂЪMag 7сѓГсЃБсЃџсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣уЏИта┤сЂетљїСИђ: сЃАсЃбсЃфтИ»тЪЪтЙІжђЪсЂ«жЋисѓ│сЃ│сЃєсѓГсѓ╣сЃѕсЃ╗сЃ»сЃ╝сѓ»сЃГсЃ╝сЃЅсЂїFP16сЂІсѓЅ3.5сЃЊсЃЃсЃѕсЂИуД╗сѓїсѓїсЂ░сђЂсЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│тйЊсЂЪсѓіт«Ъті╣сѓ│сѓ╣сЃѕсЂ»у┤ё5РђЊ6тђЇсѓФсЃЃсЃѕсЂДсЂЇсѓІсђѓQ4 2026сЂЙсЂДсЂФсЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЂ»Bedrock/Azure/VertexсЂ«сЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│Уф▓жЄЉсѓњтюДуИ«сѓГсЃБсЃЃсѓисЃЦсЃ╗сЃєсѓБсѓбсЂФсѓфсЃЌсЃѕсѓцсЃ│СЙЮтГўсЂЋсЂЏсђЂТўеТЌЦсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕсЂ«сђїсѓцсЃ│сѓ»сЃфсЃАсЃ│сѓ┐сЃФGPUсѓГсЃБсЃџсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣сЂИсЂ«сЃЈсЃ╝сЃЅсѓГсЃБсЃЃсЃЌсђЇсЃєсЃ╝сѓ╝сЂ» GPUсѓњТИЏсѓЅсЂЎсЂ«сЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂЈсЂЊсЂ«сЃгсЃљсЃ╝сЂДуиасЂЙсѓІсђѓ
description.es: **Para Q4 2026 el dtype de compresi├│n de KV-cache se expone como un knob de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia mayor Рђћ vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM lanzan un flag `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o equivalente) con TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** El periodo 27РђЊ29 abr lo vuelve casi seguro: **TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026 + blog de Google Research**, **el PR #21419 de SGLang ya est├А in-tree** con una rescritura de fused-kernel (#23134) llegando a 93РђЊ105% del throughput bf16, **NVIDIA kvpress** alcanza madurez en Decoding-Press, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demuestra cuantizaci├│n con pool compartido multi-agente y **ports comunitarios MLX + Triton + vLLM** circulan antes de que llegue la liberaci├│n oficial Python de Google en Q2 2026. La funci├│n forzante econ├│mica es el mismo tape de capex Mag-7 que el reporte del WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI acaba de fracturar: cada workload long-context limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pueda mover de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el costo efectivo por token unas 5РђЊ6x. Para Q4 2026 los hyperscalers condicionan los precios por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex a tiers opt-in de cache comprimido, y la tesis de hard-cap a capex GPU incremental del reporte de ayer aprieta v├Гa esta palanca y no por menos GPUs.
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, isang first-class deployment knob na ang KV-cache-compression dtype sa bawat major inference stack Рђћ magla-launch ang vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM ng `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o katumbas) flag na may TurboQuant + di bababa sa isang alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Ginagawang halos siguradong ito ng Apr 27РђЊ29: **pumasok ang TurboQuant sa ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419** na may fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) na umabot ng 93РђЊ105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** sa Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** na nag-demo ng multi-agent shared-pool quantization, at **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** na umiikot bago pa man dumating ang opisyal na Python release ng Google sa Q2 2026. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binitak ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na puwedeng lumipat mula FP16 patungo sa 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5РђЊ6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ipo-condition ng hyperscalers ang per-token pricing ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at higpit ang thesis ng kahapon na hard-cap sa incremental GPU capex sa pamamagitan nitong lever, hindi sa pamamagitan ng pagbawas ng GPU.

summary.en: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack Рђћ vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **Q4 2026сЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂKVсѓГсЃБсЃЃсѓисЃЦтюДуИ«dtypeсЂ»сЂЎсЂ╣сЂдсЂ«СИ╗УдЂТјеУФќсѓ╣сѓ┐сЃЃсѓ»сЂДсЃЋсѓАсЃ╝сѓ╣сЃѕсѓ»сЃЕсѓ╣сЂ«сЃЄсЃЌсЃГсѓцсЃ╗сЃјсЃќсЂесЂЌсЂджю▓тЄ║сЂЎсѓІ Рђћ vLLMсђЂSGLangсђЂTGIсђЂOllamaсђЂllama.cppсђЂNVIDIA TensorRT-LLMсЂї TurboQuant + 1сЂцС╗ЦСИісЂ«С╗БТЏ┐(KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention)сѓњтљїТб▒сЂЌсЂЪ`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`(сЂЙсЂЪсЂ»тљїуГЅ)сЃЋсЃЕсѓ░сѓњтЄ║УЇисЂЎсѓІсђѓ** 4/27РђЊ29сЂїсЂЊсѓїсѓњсЂ╗сЂ╝уб║т«ЪсЂФсЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІ: **TurboQuantсЂїICLR 2026 + Google ResearchсЃќсЃГсѓ░сЂФуЮђтю░**сђЂ**SGLang PR #21419сЂ»ТЌбсЂФсЃёсЃфсЃ╝тєЁ**(УъЇтљѕсѓФсЃ╝сЃЇсЃФТЏИсЂЇТЈЏсЂѕ#23134сЂДbf16Т»ћ93РђЊ105%сѓ╣сЃФсЃ╝сЃЌсЃЃсЃѕ)сђЂ**NVIDIA kvpress**сЂ»Decoding-PressТѕљуєЪсђЂ**PolyKV(arxiv 2604.24971)**сЂїсЃъсЃФсЃЂсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕтЁ▒ТюЅсЃЌсЃ╝сЃФжЄЈтГљтїќсѓњт«ЪУе╝сђЂ**сѓ│сЃЪсЃЦсЃІсЃєсѓБMLX + Triton + vLLMуД╗ТцЇ**сЂїGoogleсЂ«тЁгт╝ЈPythonт«ЪУБЁ(Q2 2026С║ѕт«џ)сЂФтЁѕУАїсЂЌсЂдТхЂжђџсђѓухїТИѕуџёсЂфт╝итѕХтіЏсЂ»4/28сЂ«WSJ OpenAIТюфжЂћсЂїтЅ▓сЂБсЂЪMag 7сѓГсЃБсЃџсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣уЏИта┤сЂетљїСИђ: сЃАсЃбсЃфтИ»тЪЪтЙІжђЪсЂ«жЋисѓ│сЃ│сЃєсѓГсѓ╣сЃѕсЃ╗сЃ»сЃ╝сѓ»сЃГсЃ╝сЃЅсЂїFP16сЂІсѓЅ3.5сЃЊсЃЃсЃѕсЂИуД╗сѓїсѓїсЂ░сђЂсЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│тйЊсЂЪсѓіт«Ъті╣сѓ│сѓ╣сЃѕсЂ»у┤ё5РђЊ6тђЇсѓФсЃЃсЃѕсЂДсЂЇсѓІсђѓQ4 2026сЂЙсЂДсЂФсЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЂ»Bedrock/Azure/VertexсЂ«сЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│Уф▓жЄЉсѓњтюДуИ«сѓГсЃБсЃЃсѓисЃЦсЃ╗сЃєсѓБсѓбсЂФсѓфсЃЌсЃѕсѓцсЃ│СЙЮтГўсЂЋсЂЏсђЂТўеТЌЦсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕсЂ«сђїсѓцсЃ│сѓ»сЃфсЃАсЃ│сѓ┐сЃФGPUсѓГсЃБсЃџсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣сЂИсЂ«сЃЈсЃ╝сЃЅсѓГсЃБсЃЃсЃЌсђЇсЃєсЃ╝сѓ╝сЂ» GPUсѓњТИЏсѓЅсЂЎсЂ«сЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂЈсЂЊсЂ«сЃгсЃљсЃ╝сЂДуиасЂЙсѓІсђѓ
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para Q4 2026 el dtype de compresi├│n de KV-cache se expone como un knob de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia mayor Рђћ vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM lanzan un flag `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o equivalente) con TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** El periodo 27РђЊ29 abr lo vuelve casi seguro: **TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026 + blog de Google Research**, **el PR #21419 de SGLang ya est├А in-tree** con una rescritura de fused-kernel (#23134) llegando a 93РђЊ105% del throughput bf16, **NVIDIA kvpress** alcanza madurez en Decoding-Press, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demuestra cuantizaci├│n con pool compartido multi-agente y **ports comunitarios MLX + Triton + vLLM** circulan antes de que llegue la liberaci├│n oficial Python de Google en Q2 2026. La funci├│n forzante econ├│mica es el mismo tape de capex Mag-7 que el reporte del WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI acaba de fracturar: cada workload long-context limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pueda mover de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el costo efectivo por token unas 5РђЊ6x. Para Q4 2026 los hyperscalers condicionan los precios por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex a tiers opt-in de cache comprimido, y la tesis de hard-cap a capex GPU incremental del reporte de ayer aprieta v├Гa esta palanca y no por menos GPUs.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, isang first-class deployment knob na ang KV-cache-compression dtype sa bawat major inference stack Рђћ magla-launch ang vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM ng `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o katumbas) flag na may TurboQuant + di bababa sa isang alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Ginagawang halos siguradong ito ng Apr 27РђЊ29: **pumasok ang TurboQuant sa ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419** na may fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) na umabot ng 93РђЊ105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** sa Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** na nag-demo ng multi-agent shared-pool quantization, at **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** na umiikot bago pa man dumating ang opisyal na Python release ng Google sa Q2 2026. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binitak ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na puwedeng lumipat mula FP16 patungo sa 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5РђЊ6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ipo-condition ng hyperscalers ang per-token pricing ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at higpit ang thesis ng kahapon na hard-cap sa incremental GPU capex sa pamamagitan nitong lever, hindi sa pamamagitan ng pagbawas ng GPU.

nodes.short_label: The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiatesРђд
nodes.description: **The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" Рђћ by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, or xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Mag-7 hyperscaler publishes Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure separated from raw cloud revenue.** WSJ Apr 28 was decisive: a single off-target-leak dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (which already removed the discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A.

description.es: **El reporte WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI inicia una "reescritura de la disclosure de revenue AI" en 2026 Рђћ para Q3 2026 al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) lanza una cadencia auditada de revenue mensual + WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Mag-7 publica disclosure de margen por token Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex separado del revenue cloud crudo.** El WSJ del 28-abr fue decisivo: una sola filtraci├│n de off-target tumb├│ Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% en una sola sesi├│n, sumado al **rewind del AGI clause OpenAI/Microsoft del 27-abr** (que ya retir├│ el riesgo discrecional de revocaci├│n de IP por declaraci├│n AGI). Combinado con la colisi├│n de reportes Mag-7 hoy + ~700 mil millones USD agregados de capex 2026 + el IPO Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22BРђЊ$25B (concentraci├│n 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), Wall Street ahora **exige expl├Гcitamente disclosure de econom├Гa AI tangible, no narrativa**. Para Q3 2026 la presi├│n SEC + analistas produce (a) al menos un foundation lab movi├Еndose a una cadencia p├║blica de dashboard de revenue mensual / WAU, y (b) al menos uno de los Big-3 cloud separando margen por token de plataforma AI en notas al pie del 10-Q. La palabra "AGI" pasa de metaf├Гsica a primitiva de instrumento financiero; "DAU/WAU" pasa de KPI de producto a MD&A.
description.fil: **Sinisimulan ng OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report ang isang 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" Рђћ pagsapit ng Q3 2026, magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) ng audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, at maglalathala ng di bababa sa isang Mag-7 hyperscaler ng Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure na hiwalay sa raw cloud revenue.** Mapagpasya ang WSJ Apr 28: isang off-target leak lang ay nagpababa kay Oracle ng 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% sa isang session, plus pa rin ng **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (na inalis na ang discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Kasabay ng Mag-7 prints collision ngayon + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22BРђЊ$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), **buong-buo at hayagang hinihingi na ng Wall Street ang tangible AI-economics disclosure, hindi narrative**. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang SEC + analyst pressure ay magbubunga ng (a) di bababa sa isang foundation lab na lumipat sa public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, at (b) di bababa sa isang Big-3 cloud na ihihiwalay ang per-token AI-platform margin sa 10-Q footnotes. Mula metaphysical ay magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI"; mula product KPI ay magiging MD&A material ang "DAU/WAU".
