By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A.
summary.ja: **OpenAI 4/28 WSJта▒жЂЊсЂ»2026т╣┤сЂ«сђїAIтБ▓СИіжќІуц║сЂ«ТЏИсЂЇТЈЏсЂѕсђЇсѓњУхитІЋсЂЎсѓІ Рђћ Q3 2026сЂЙсЂДсЂФт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ1сЂцсЂ«сЃЋсѓАсѓдсЃ│сЃЄсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│сЃЕсЃю(OpenAIсђЂAnthropicсђЂxAI)сЂїуЏБТЪ╗ТИѕсЂ┐сЂ«ТюѕТгАтБ▓СИі + WAUжќІуц║сѓ▒сѓцсЃЄсЃ│сѓ╣сѓњтЄ║УЇисЂЌсђЂMag 7сЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЂ«т░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ1уцЙсЂїBedrock/Azure-OpenAI/VertexсЂ«сЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│тйЊсЂЪсѓісЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃ│сѓњућЪсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅтБ▓СИісЂІсѓЅтѕєжЏбсЂЌсЂджќІуц║сЂЎсѓІсђѓ** 4/28сЂ«WSJсЂ»Т▒║т«џуџёсЂасЂБсЂЪ: тЇўСИђсЂ«ТеЎуџёТюфжЂћсЃфсЃ╝сѓ»сЂДOracleсЂї4%сђЂAMDсЂї3%сђЂBroadcomсЂї4%сђЂсѓйсЃЋсЃѕсЃљсЃ│сѓ»сЂї10%СИІУљйсђЂсЂЌсЂІсѓѓ**4/27сЂ«OpenAI/Microsoft AGIТЮАжаЁТњцтЏъ**(С╗╗ТёЈсЂ«сђїAGIт«БУеђсђЇсЂФсѓѕсѓІIPтЈќТХѕсЃфсѓ╣сѓ»сЂ»ТЌбсЂФТХѕТ╗Ё)сЂФжЄЇсЂГсЂдсЂ«тЈЇт┐юсђѓMag 7Т▒║у«ЌсЂ«жЏєСИГ + тљѕу«Ќу┤ё7,000тёёсЃЅсЃФсЂ«2026сѓГсЃБсЃџсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣ + 5ТюѕСИГТЌгсЂ« Cerebras IPO ($22BРђЊ$25BсђЂG42 24% / MBZUAI 62%сЂ«тБ▓СИіжЏєСИГ)сѓњтљѕсѓЈсЂЏсѓІсЂесђЂсѓдсѓЕсЃ╝сЃФУАЌсЂ»С╗ісѓё**сЃісЃЕсЃєсѓБсЃќсЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂЈтЁиСйЊуџёсЂфAIтЈјуЏітГдуџёжќІуц║сѓњТўјуц║уџёсЂФУдЂТ▒ѓ**сЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІсђѓQ3 2026сЂЙсЂДсЂФSEC + сѓбсЃісЃфсѓ╣сЃѕтюДтіЏсЂД(a)т░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ1сЃЕсЃюсЂїтЁгжќІТюѕТгАтБ▓СИі / WAUсЃђсЃЃсѓисЃЦсЃюсЃ╝сЃЅсЃ╗сѓ▒сѓцсЃЄсЃ│сѓ╣сЂИсђЂ(b)Big-3сѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсЂ«т░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ1уцЙсЂї10-QУёџТ│есЂДсЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│тйЊсЂЪсѓіAIсЃЌсЃЕсЃЃсЃѕсЃЋсѓЕсЃ╝сЃасЃ╗сЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃ│сѓњтѕєжЏбжќІуц║сђЂсѓњућЪсѓђсђѓсђїAGIсђЇсЂ»тйбУђїСИітГдуџёТдѓт┐хсЂІсѓЅжЄЉУъЇтЋєтЊЂсЃЌсЃфсЃЪсЃєсѓБсЃќсЂИсђЂсђїDAU/WAUсђЇсЂ»сЃЌсЃГсЃђсѓ»сЃѕKPIсЂІсѓЅMD&AсЂИТўЄТа╝сЂЎсѓІсђѓ
summary.es: **El reporte WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI inicia una "reescritura de la disclosure de revenue AI" en 2026 Рђћ para Q3 2026 al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) lanza una cadencia auditada de revenue mensual + WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Mag-7 publica disclosure de margen por token Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex separado del revenue cloud crudo.** El WSJ del 28-abr fue decisivo: una sola filtraci├│n de off-target tumb├│ Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% en una sola sesi├│n, sumado al **rewind del AGI clause OpenAI/Microsoft del 27-abr** (que ya retir├│ el riesgo discrecional de revocaci├│n de IP por declaraci├│n AGI). Combinado con la colisi├│n de reportes Mag-7 hoy + ~700 mil millones USD agregados de capex 2026 + el IPO Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22BРђЊ$25B (concentraci├│n 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), Wall Street ahora **exige expl├Гcitamente disclosure de econom├Гa AI tangible, no narrativa**. Para Q3 2026 la presi├│n SEC + analistas produce (a) al menos un foundation lab movi├Еndose a una cadencia p├║blica de dashboard de revenue mensual / WAU, y (b) al menos uno de los Big-3 cloud separando margen por token de plataforma AI en notas al pie del 10-Q. La palabra "AGI" pasa de metaf├Гsica a primitiva de instrumento financiero; "DAU/WAU" pasa de KPI de producto a MD&A.
summary.fil: **Sinisimulan ng OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report ang isang 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" Рђћ pagsapit ng Q3 2026, magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) ng audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, at maglalathala ng di bababa sa isang Mag-7 hyperscaler ng Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure na hiwalay sa raw cloud revenue.** Mapagpasya ang WSJ Apr 28: isang off-target leak lang ay nagpababa kay Oracle ng 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% sa isang session, plus pa rin ng **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (na inalis na ang discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Kasabay ng Mag-7 prints collision ngayon + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22BРђЊ$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), **buong-buo at hayagang hinihingi na ng Wall Street ang tangible AI-economics disclosure, hindi narrative**. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang SEC + analyst pressure ay magbubunga ng (a) di bababa sa isang foundation lab na lumipat sa public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, at (b) di bababa sa isang Big-3 cloud na ihihiwalay ang per-token AI-platform margin sa 10-Q footnotes. Mula metaphysical ay magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI"; mula product KPI ay magiging MD&A material ang "DAU/WAU".

detail.title: The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiatesРђд
detail.subtitle: Prediction ┬и Business
detail.description: **The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" Рђћ by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, or xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Mag-7 hyperscaler publishes Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure separated from raw cloud revenue.** WSJ Apr 28 was decisive: a single off-target-leak dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (which already removed the discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A.

nodes.label: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (AnthropicРђд
nodes.short_label: By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surfРђд
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off Рђћ Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish Рђћ with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates.

Con Corpus2Skill volviendo mainstream "skills como artefacto navegable" y la encuesta Externalization-in-LLM-Agents (arxiv 2604.08224) llamando skills/harness/protocol la capa de dise├▒o dominante de 2026, la superficie de ataque ahora es **infraestructura de primera clase**, no un side-channel. description.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE ATT&CK-style sub-matrix ang attack surface ng agent skills, at magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (official skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ng enforced signing + provenance gate.** Hindi na one-off ang 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc sa ClawHub + ang **36% prompt-injection rate ng Cisco sa OpenClaw skill marketplace** Рђћ ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na purposely-built para sa OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. Sa pagiging mainstream ng "skills bilang navigable artifact" ng Corpus2Skill at sa pagturing ng Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) sa skills/harness/protocol bilang dominant 2026 design layer, **first-class infrastructure** na ang attack surface, hindi na side-channel. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, makikita natin (a) isang published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style o NIST-led) na sumasakop ng skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, at (b) di bababa sa isang major marketplace na nag-mandate ng signed-and-provenance-attested skills bago publish Рђћ kasama ang 17-skill repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, marketplace ng Multica, at agent-trace surface ng Hugging Face bilang unang kandidato.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **H2 2026сЂЙсЂДсЂФсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсЃ╗сѓ╣сѓГсЃФсЂ«Тћ╗ТњЃжЮбсЂїуІгУЄфсЂ«MITRE ATT&CKсѓ╣сѓ┐сѓцсЃФсЂ«сѓхсЃќсЃъсЃѕсЃфсѓ»сѓ╣сѓњтЈќтЙЌсЂЌсђЂт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ1сЂцсЂ«СИ╗УдЂсѓ╣сѓГсЃФсЃ╗сЃъсЃ╝сѓ▒сЃЃсЃѕсЃЌсЃгсѓцсѓ╣(AnthropicтЁгт╝ЈskillsсђЂClawHubсђЂMulticaсђЂHermesсђЂHugging Face skills/agent traces)сЂїуй▓тљЇ + сЃЌсЃГсЃЊсЃісЃ│сѓ╣т┐Ёжаѕсѓ▓сЃ╝сЃѕсѓњтЄ║УЇисЂЎсѓІсђѓ** ClawHavocсЂ«ClawHubтєЁ1,184тђІсЂ«ТѓфТђДсѓ╣сѓГсЃФ + OpenClawсЃъсЃ╝сѓ▒сЃЃсЃѕсЃЌсЃгсѓцсѓ╣тЁеСйЊсЂДсЂ«**Cisco 36%сЃЌсЃГсЃ│сЃЌсЃѕсѓцсЃ│сѓИсѓДсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│ујЄ**сЂ»сђЂсѓѓсЂ»сѓёСИђжЂјТђДсЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂё Рђћ 4/28сЂ«Novita SandboxсЂ»OpenClaw + Hermes + УЄфтЙІсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсЃ╗сЃЕсЃ│сѓ┐сѓцсЃат░ѓућесЂФСйюсѓЅсѓїсЂЪТюђтѕЮсЂ«тЋєућеуиЕтњїсЃЌсЃГсЃђсѓ»сЃѕсђѓCorpus2SkillсЂїсђїсЃісЃЊсѓ▓сЃ╝сЃѕтЈ»УЃйсЂфсѓбсЃ╝сЃєсѓБсЃЋсѓАсѓ»сЃѕсЂесЂЌсЂдсЂ«сѓ╣сѓГсЃФсђЇсѓњСИ╗ТхЂтїќсЂЌсђЂExternalization-in-LLM-AgentsсѓхсЃ╝сЃЎсѓц(arxiv 2604.08224)сЂїskills/harness/protocolсѓњ2026Тћ»жЁЇуџёУеГУеѕт▒цсЂеСйЇуй«С╗ўсЂЉсЂЪсЂЊсЂесЂДсђЂТћ╗ТњЃжЮбсЂ»**сѓхсѓцсЃЅсЃЂсЃБсЃЇсЃФсЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂЈсЃЋсѓАсЃ╝сѓ╣сЃѕсѓ»сЃЕсѓ╣сЃ╗сѓцсЃ│сЃЋсЃЕ**сЂФсЂфсЂБсЂЪсђѓH2 2026сЂЙсЂДсЂФ(a)сѓ╣сѓГсЃФТ▒џТЪЊ + сѓ╣сѓГсЃФухїућ▒сЂ«жќЊТјЦсЃЌсЃГсЃ│сЃЌсЃѕсѓцсЃ│сѓИсѓДсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│ + сѓ»сЃГсѓ╣сѓ╣сѓГсЃФуЅ╣ТеЕсЃЂсѓДсЃ╝сЃ│сѓњуХ▓уЙЁсЂЌсЂЪтЁгжќІсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсЃ╗сѓ╣сѓГсЃФУёЁтеЂсЃъсЃѕсЃфсѓ»сѓ╣(MITREсѓ╣сѓ┐сѓцсЃФсЂЙсЂЪсЂ»NISTСИ╗т░ј)сђЂсЂісѓѕсЂ│(b)тЁгжќІтЅЇсЂФуй▓тљЇ + сЃЌсЃГсЃЊсЃісЃ│сѓ╣Уе╝ТўјТИѕсЂ┐сѓ╣сѓГсЃФсѓњуЙЕтІЎтїќсЂЎсѓІСИ╗УдЂсЃъсЃ╝сѓ▒сЃЃсЃѕсЃЌсЃгсѓцсѓ╣сђЂсѓњAnthropicсЂ«17сѓ╣сѓГсЃФсЃгсЃЮсђЂClawHubсђЂMulticaсЃъсЃ╝сѓ▒сЃЃсЃѕсЃЌсЃгсѓцсѓ╣сђЂHugging FaceсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсЃ╗сЃѕсЃгсЃ╝сѓ╣жЮбсЂ«СИГсЂІсѓЅТюђтѕЮсЂ«тђЎУБюсЂїтЄ║сЂЎсђѓ
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para H2 2026 la superficie de ataque skills-de-agente aterriza su propia sub-matriz estilo MITRE ATT&CK y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (skills oficiales de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills/agent traces de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance.** Los 1.184 skills maliciosos de ClawHavoc en ClawHub + el **36% de prompt-injection rate de Cisco en el marketplace OpenClaw** ya no es un evento aislado Рђћ el Sandbox de Novita del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigaci├│n construido de prop├│sito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes + agentes aut├│nomos. Con Corpus2Skill volviendo mainstream "skills como artefacto navegable" y la encuesta Externalization-in-LLM-Agents (arxiv 2604.08224) llamando skills/harness/protocol la capa de dise├▒o dominante de 2026, la superficie de ataque ahora es **infraestructura de primera clase**, no un side-channel. Para H2 2026 vemos (a) una matriz de amenazas agent-skills publicada (estilo MITRE o liderada por NIST) cubriendo poisoning de skills + indirect-prompt-injection v├Гa skill + cadenas de privilegios cross-skill, y (b) al menos un marketplace mayor obligando skills firmadas y atestadas con provenance antes de publicar Рђћ con el repo 17-skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, el marketplace de Multica y la superficie agent-trace de Hugging Face como primeros candidatos.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE ATT&CK-style sub-matrix ang attack surface ng agent skills, at magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (official skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ng enforced signing + provenance gate.** Hindi na one-off ang 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc sa ClawHub + ang **36% prompt-injection rate ng Cisco sa OpenClaw skill marketplace** Рђћ ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na purposely-built para sa OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. Sa pagiging mainstream ng "skills bilang navigable artifact" ng Corpus2Skill at sa pagturing ng Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) sa skills/harness/protocol bilang dominant 2026 design layer, **first-class infrastructure** na ang attack surface, hindi na side-channel. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, makikita natin (a) isang published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style o NIST-led) na sumasakop ng skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, at (b) di bababa sa isang major marketplace na nag-mandate ng signed-and-provenance-attested skills bago publish Рђћ kasama ang 17-skill repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, marketplace ng Multica, at agent-trace surface ng Hugging Face bilang unang kandidato.

nodes.description: **(Tech) By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.

The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.

description.es: **(Tecnol├│gica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensi├│n MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestaci├│n de procedencia antes de publicar.** ATT&CK v19 del 28-abr + el marco v5.4 ya nombran envenenamiento de contexto de agentes IA, abuso de invocaci├│n de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP y despliegue de agentes maliciosos como t├Еcnicas; Novita Sandbox del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigaci├│n construido a prop├│sito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes; SuiteCloud Agent Skills del 28-abr (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) es el primer gran proveedor no-foundation-lab que distribuye habilidades como producto con distribuci├│n firmada como marco de seguridad; arxiv 2604.24026 (representaci├│n SSL para habilidades) del 28-abr + arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint del 24-abr aportan el andamiaje acad├Еmico. La funci├│n forzada es el hallazgo de Cisco RSAC 2026 del 36% de inyecci├│n de prompts + las 1.184 habilidades maliciosas de ClawHavoc + el repunte +32% IPI de Google del 23-29 abr; combinado, es el mismo arco de brecha de gobernanza que produjo MITRE ATT&CK Mobile en 2017 y MITRE ATLAS en 2021. La primera de estas obligaciones probablemente venga de CISA / NIST o directamente de los operadores del marketplace bajo presi├│n de clientes empresariales, no de un foundation lab.
description.fil: **(Tech) Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Pinangalanan na ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework ang AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, at malicious agent deployment bilang techniques; ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na ginawa para sa OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; ang Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) ang unang major non-foundation-lab vendor na nag-ship ng skills-as-a-product na may signed-distribution bilang security frame; ang Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint ang nagbibigay ng academic scaffolding. Ang forcing function ay ang Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; pinagsama-sama, ito ang parehong governance-gap arc na nagbunga ng MITRE ATT&CK Mobile noong 2017 at MITRE ATLAS noong 2021. Ang una sa mga mandates na ito ay malamang manggagaling sa CISA / NIST o direkta mula sa marketplace operators sa ilalim ng enterprise-customer pressure, hindi mula sa foundation lab.

The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.
summary.ja: **(ТіђУАЊ) 2026т╣┤ Q3 сЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсѓ╣сѓГсЃФУёЁтеЂсѓхсЃќсЃъсЃѕсЃфсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣сЂї MITRE ATT&CK ТІАт╝хсЂЙсЂЪсЂ» NIST AI-RMF С╗ўжї▓сЂесЂЌсЂдТюђтѕЮсЂ«ТГБт╝ЈтЁгжќІсѓњУ┐јсЂѕсђЂт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1сЂцсЂ«СИ╗УдЂсѓ╣сѓГсЃФсЃъсЃ╝сѓ▒сЃЃсЃѕсЃЌсЃгсѓцсѓ╣ (Anthropic тЁгт╝Јсѓ╣сѓГсЃФсЃфсЃЮсѓИсЃѕсЃфсђЂClawHubсђЂMulticaсђЂHermesсђЂHugging Face сѓ╣сѓГсЃФ) сЂїтЁгжќІтЅЇсЂФуй▓тљЇ + сЃЌсЃГсЃЎсЃісЃ│сѓ╣ТцюУе╝сѓ▓сЃ╝сЃѕсѓњт╝итѕХсЂЎсѓІсђѓ** 4/28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 сЃЋсЃгсЃ╝сЃасЃ»сЃ╝сѓ»сЂ» AI сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсѓ│сЃ│сЃєсѓГсѓ╣сЃѕТ▒џТЪЊсђЂсЃёсЃ╝сЃФтЉ╝сЂ│тЄ║сЂЌТѓфућесђЂMCP сѓхсЃ╝сЃљсЃ╝СЙхт«│сђЂТѓфТёЈсЂѓсѓІсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсЃЄсЃЌсЃГсѓцсѓњТЌбсЂФсЃєсѓ»сЃІсЃЃсѓ»сЂесЂЌсЂдтЉйтљЇТИѕсЂ┐; 4/28 Novita Sandbox сЂ» OpenClaw + Hermes сЃЕсЃ│сѓ┐сѓцсЃат░ѓућесЂФТДІу»ЅсЂЋсѓїсЂЪтѕЮсЂ«тЋєућеуиЕтњїУБйтЊЂ; 4/28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuiteсђЂSuiteConnect SF) сЂ»уй▓тљЇжЁЇтИЃсѓњсѓ╗сѓГсЃЦсЃфсЃєсѓБсЃЋсЃгсЃ╝сЃасЂесЂЌсЂдсѓ╣сѓГсЃФсѓњУБйтЊЂтїќсЂЌсЂЪтѕЮсЂ«СИ╗УдЂжЮъсЃЋсѓАсѓдсЃ│сЃЄсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│сЃЕсЃюсЃЎсЃ│сЃђсЃ╝; 4/28 arxiv 2604.24026 (сѓ╣сѓГсЃФсЂ« SSL УАеуЈЙ) + 4/24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint сЂїтГдУАЊуџёУХ│та┤сѓњТЈљСЙЏсђѓт╝итѕХжќбТЋ░сЂ» Cisco RSAC 2026 36% сЃЌсЃГсЃ│сЃЌсЃѕсѓцсЃ│сѓИсѓДсѓ»сѓисЃДсЃ│ујЄсЂ«уЎ║УдІ + ClawHavoc 1,184С╗ХсЂ«ТѓфТёЈсЂѓсѓІсѓ╣сѓГсЃФ + 4/23-29 Google +32% IPI тбЌтіа; тљѕсѓЈсЂЏсѓІсЂесђЂсЂЊсѓїсЂ» 2017т╣┤сЂ« MITRE ATT&CK Mobile сЂе 2021т╣┤сЂ« MITRE ATLAS сѓњућЪсЂ┐тЄ║сЂЌсЂЪсЂ«сЂетљїсЂўсѓгсЃљсЃісЃ│сѓ╣сѓ«сЃБсЃЃсЃЌсЂ«У╗їУиАсђѓсЂЊсѓїсѓЅсЂ«ТюђтѕЮсЂ«уЙЕтІЎтїќсЂ»сЃЋсѓАсѓдсЃ│сЃЄсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│сЃЕсЃюсЂІсѓЅсЂДсЂ»сЂфсЂЈсђЂCISA / NIST сЂІсѓЅсђЂсЂѓсѓІсЂёсЂ»сѓесЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓ║жАДт«бтюДтіЏСИІсЂ«сЃъсЃ╝сѓ▒сЃЃсЃѕсЃЌсЃгсѓцсѓ╣С║ІТЦГУђЁсЂІсѓЅуЏ┤ТјЦтЄ║сѓІтЈ»УЃйТђДсЂїжФўсЂёсђѓ
summary.es: **(Tecnol├│gica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensi├│n MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestaci├│n de procedencia antes de publicar.** ATT&CK v19 del 28-abr + el marco v5.4 ya nombran envenenamiento de contexto de agentes IA, abuso de invocaci├│n de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP y despliegue de agentes maliciosos como t├Еcnicas; Novita Sandbox del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigaci├│n construido a prop├│sito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes; SuiteCloud Agent Skills del 28-abr (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) es el primer gran proveedor no-foundation-lab que distribuye habilidades como producto con distribuci├│n firmada como marco de seguridad; arxiv 2604.24026 (representaci├│n SSL para habilidades) del 28-abr + arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint del 24-abr aportan el andamiaje acad├Еmico. La funci├│n forzada es el hallazgo de Cisco RSAC 2026 del 36% de inyecci├│n de prompts + las 1.184 habilidades maliciosas de ClawHavoc + el repunte +32% IPI de Google del 23-29 abr; combinado, es el mismo arco de brecha de gobernanza que produjo MITRE ATT&CK Mobile en 2017 y MITRE ATLAS en 2021. La primera de estas obligaciones probablemente venga de CISA / NIST o directamente de los operadores del marketplace bajo presi├│n de clientes empresariales, no de un foundation lab.
summary.fil: **(Tech) Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Pinangalanan na ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework ang AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, at malicious agent deployment bilang techniques; ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na ginawa para sa OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; ang Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) ang unang major non-foundation-lab vendor na nag-ship ng skills-as-a-product na may signed-distribution bilang security frame; ang Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint ang nagbibigay ng academic scaffolding. Ang forcing function ay ang Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; pinagsama-sama, ito ang parehong governance-gap arc na nagbunga ng MITRE ATT&CK Mobile noong 2017 at MITRE ATLAS noong 2021. Ang una sa mga mandates na ito ay malamang manggagaling sa CISA / NIST o direkta mula sa marketplace operators sa ilalim ng enterprise-customer pressure, hindi mula sa foundation lab.

detail.description: **(Tech) By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. nodes.label: **(Non-tech) The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue discРђд
nodes.description: **(Non-tech) The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite Рђћ by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler separates Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes from raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) was the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints were a mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints close the Mag 7 cycle. Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly Рђћ that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.

short_label.es: No tecnol├│gica) El reportaje del WSJ deРђд

description.en: **(Non-tech) The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite Рђћ by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler separates Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes from raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) was the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints were a mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints close the Mag 7 cycle. Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly Рђћ that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.
description.ja: **(жЮъТіђУАЊ) 4/28 WSJ OpenAI тБ▓СИіТюфжЂћта▒жЂЊ + 4/29 Mag 7 Т▒║у«ЌтљїТЎѓуЎ║УАесЂї 2026т╣┤сЂФ SEC + сѓбсЃісЃфсѓ╣сЃѕсЂ« AI тБ▓СИіжќІуц║ТЏИсЂЇТЈЏсЂѕтюДтіЏсѓњуЎ║тІЋ Рђћ 2026т╣┤ Q3 сЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1сЂцсЂ«сЃЋсѓАсѓдсЃ│сЃЄсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│сЃЕсЃю (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) сЂїуЏБТЪ╗ТИѕсЂ┐ТюѕТгАтБ▓СИісЂЙсЂЪсЂ» WAU жќІуц║сѓхсѓцсѓ»сЃФсѓњтЄ║УЇисЂЌсђЂт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1сЂцсЂ« Big-3 сЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЃ╝сЂї Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex сЂ«сЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│тЇўСЙАсЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃ│сѓњ 10-Q УёџТ│есЂДућЪсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅтБ▓СИісЂІсѓЅтѕєжЏбсЂЎсѓІсђѓ** 4/28 сЂ«тБ▓сѓі (S&P -0.49%сђЂNasdaq -0.9%сђЂOracle -4%сђЂAMD -3%сђЂBroadcom -4%сђЂSoftBank -10%) сЂ» AI УеГтѓЎТіЋУ│ЄсѓфсЃ│С┐АућесЃєсЃ╝сЃЌсЂФТюђтѕЮсЂ«уЅЕуљєуџёС║ђУБѓ; 4/29 Т▒║у«ЌсЂ»ТиитљѕсЃфсѓ╗сЃЃсЃѕ (MSFT/GOOGL сЂ»т╝иТ░ЌсЃЊсЃ╝сЃѕсђЂMETA AH -7%); 4/30 AAPL Т▒║у«ЌсЂД Mag 7 сѓхсѓцсѓ»сЃФухѓС║єсђѓMicrosoft сЂ»ТЌбсЂФ AI т╣┤ТЈЏу«ЌтБ▓СИі $37B (+123%) сѓњТўјуц║уџёсЂФт╝Ћуће Рђћ сЂЮсѓїсЂїжќІуц║сЂ«тЅЇСЙІсђѓCerebras IPO 5ТюѕСИГТЌг $22B-$25B (G42 24% / MBZUAI 62% тБ▓СИіжЏєСИГ) сѓњУЃїТЎ»сЂФсђЂSEC + сЃљсѓцсѓхсѓцсЃЅсЂ«сЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│тЇўСЙАсЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃ│ + WAU жќІуц║УдЂТ▒ѓсЂ» 2026т╣┤ Q2-Q3 Т▒║у«Ќсѓхсѓцсѓ»сЃФтЅЇтЙїсЂФжЏєСИГсЂЎсѓІсђѓPowell сЂїсЃѕсЃЕсЃ│сЃЌТћ┐ТеЕ Fed Уф┐ТЪ╗сЂИсЂ«ТіЉТГбсЂесЂЌсЂдуљєС║ІС╝џсЂФТ«ІсѓІТ▒║т«џсѓѓ AI УеГтѓЎТіЋУ│ЄсЃєсЃ╝сЃЌтЁеСйЊсЂ«Тћ┐Т▓╗сЃфсѓ╣сѓ»сЃЌсЃгсЃЪсѓбсЃасѓњт╝ЋсЂЇСИісЂњсѓІ; сѓѕсѓітј│сЂЌсЂёТЋ░тГЌсѓњУдЂТ▒ѓсЂЎсѓІсЂ«сЂїтЁгуџётИѓта┤сЂ«сЃгсЃљсЃ╝сђѓ
description.es: **(No tecnol├│gica) El reportaje del WSJ del 28-abr sobre incumplimiento de ingresos de OpenAI + la colisi├│n de resultados Mag 7 del 29-abr disparan una reescritura del r├Еgimen de divulgaci├│n de ingresos de IA por parte de la SEC y los analistas en 2026 Рђћ para Q3 2026, al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) publica una cadencia de divulgaci├│n auditada de ingresos mensuales o WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 separa el margen por token de Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex en las notas al pie del 10-Q de los ingresos cloud brutos.** La ca├Гda del 28-abr (S&P -0,49%, Nasdaq -0,9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) fue la primera grieta material en la cinta ┬Фcapex IA por fe┬╗; los resultados del 29-abr fueron un reset mixto (MSFT/GOOGL batieron con fuerza, META -7% AH); los resultados de AAPL del 30-abr cierran el ciclo Mag 7. Microsoft ya cit├│ expl├Гcitamente una tasa anual de IA de $37B (+123%) Рђћ ese es el precedente de divulgaci├│n. Con la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B-$25B (concentraci├│n de ingresos 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), la presi├│n SEC + buyside para divulgaci├│n expl├Гcita de margen por token + WAU converge alrededor de los ciclos de resultados Q2-Q3 2026. La decisi├│n de Powell de quedarse en la Junta como freno a la investigaci├│n Fed de Trump tambi├Еn eleva la prima de riesgo pol├Гtico sobre toda la cinta de capex IA; exigir cifras m├Аs duras es la palanca que tienen los mercados p├║blicos.
description.fil: **(Non-tech) Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision ay magti-trigger ng 2026 SEC + analyst push para sa AI-revenue disclosure rewrite Рђћ bago matapos ang Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ang magsi-ship ng audited monthly-revenue o WAU disclosure cadence, at hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang magbubukod ng Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin sa 10-Q footnotes mula sa raw cloud revenue.** Ang Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) ang unang material crack sa AI-capex-on-faith tape; ang Apr 29 prints ay mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL malakas na beat, META -7% AH); ang Apr 30 AAPL prints ang nagsasara sa Mag 7 cycle. Tahasang sinipi na ng Microsoft ang $37B AI run rate (+123%) Рђћ iyon ang disclosure precedent. Sa Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang SEC + buyside pressure para sa explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure ay magko-converge sa Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Board bilang check sa Trump-admin Fed investigation ay nagdadagdag din ng political-risk premium sa buong AI-capex tape; ang paghingi ng mas matitigas na numero ang lever ng public markets.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **(жЮъТіђУАЊ) 4/28 WSJ OpenAI тБ▓СИіТюфжЂћта▒жЂЊ + 4/29 Mag 7 Т▒║у«ЌтљїТЎѓуЎ║УАесЂї 2026т╣┤сЂФ SEC + сѓбсЃісЃфсѓ╣сЃѕсЂ« AI тБ▓СИіжќІуц║ТЏИсЂЇТЈЏсЂѕтюДтіЏсѓњуЎ║тІЋ Рђћ 2026т╣┤ Q3 сЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1сЂцсЂ«сЃЋсѓАсѓдсЃ│сЃЄсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│сЃЕсЃю (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) сЂїуЏБТЪ╗ТИѕсЂ┐ТюѕТгАтБ▓СИісЂЙсЂЪсЂ» WAU жќІуц║сѓхсѓцсѓ»сЃФсѓњтЄ║УЇисЂЌсђЂт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1сЂцсЂ« Big-3 сЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЃ╝сЂї Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex сЂ«сЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│тЇўСЙАсЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃ│сѓњ 10-Q УёџТ│есЂДућЪсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅтБ▓СИісЂІсѓЅтѕєжЏбсЂЎсѓІсђѓ** 4/28 сЂ«тБ▓сѓі (S&P -0.49%сђЂNasdaq -0.9%сђЂOracle -4%сђЂAMD -3%сђЂBroadcom -4%сђЂSoftBank -10%) сЂ» AI УеГтѓЎТіЋУ│ЄсѓфсЃ│С┐АућесЃєсЃ╝сЃЌсЂФТюђтѕЮсЂ«уЅЕуљєуџёС║ђУБѓ; 4/29 Т▒║у«ЌсЂ»ТиитљѕсЃфсѓ╗сЃЃсЃѕ (MSFT/GOOGL сЂ»т╝иТ░ЌсЃЊсЃ╝сЃѕсђЂMETA AH -7%); 4/30 AAPL Т▒║у«ЌсЂД Mag 7 сѓхсѓцсѓ»сЃФухѓС║єсђѓMicrosoft сЂ»ТЌбсЂФ AI т╣┤ТЈЏу«ЌтБ▓СИі $37B (+123%) сѓњТўјуц║уџёсЂФт╝Ћуће Рђћ сЂЮсѓїсЂїжќІуц║сЂ«тЅЇСЙІсђѓCerebras IPO 5ТюѕСИГТЌг $22B-$25B (G42 24% / MBZUAI 62% тБ▓СИіжЏєСИГ) сѓњУЃїТЎ»сЂФсђЂSEC + сЃљсѓцсѓхсѓцсЃЅсЂ«сЃѕсЃ╝сѓ»сЃ│тЇўСЙАсЃъсЃ╝сѓИсЃ│ + WAU жќІуц║УдЂТ▒ѓсЂ» 2026т╣┤ Q2-Q3 Т▒║у«Ќсѓхсѓцсѓ»сЃФтЅЇтЙїсЂФжЏєСИГсЂЎсѓІсђѓPowell сЂїсЃѕсЃЕсЃ│сЃЌТћ┐ТеЕ Fed Уф┐ТЪ╗сЂИсЂ«ТіЉТГбсЂесЂЌсЂдуљєС║ІС╝џсЂФТ«ІсѓІТ▒║т«џсѓѓ AI УеГтѓЎТіЋУ│ЄсЃєсЃ╝сЃЌтЁеСйЊсЂ«Тћ┐Т▓╗сЃфсѓ╣сѓ»сЃЌсЃгсЃЪсѓбсЃасѓњт╝ЋсЂЇСИісЂњсѓІ; сѓѕсѓітј│сЂЌсЂёТЋ░тГЌсѓњУдЂТ▒ѓсЂЎсѓІсЂ«сЂїтЁгуџётИѓта┤сЂ«сЃгсЃљсЃ╝сђѓ
prediction_summary_locales.es: **(No tecnol├│gica) El reportaje del WSJ del 28-abr sobre incumplimiento de ingresos de OpenAI + la colisi├│n de resultados Mag 7 del 29-abr disparan una reescritura del r├Еgimen de divulgaci├│n de ingresos de IA por parte de la SEC y los analistas en 2026 Рђћ para Q3 2026, al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) publica una cadencia de divulgaci├│n auditada de ingresos mensuales o WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 separa el margen por token de Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex en las notas al pie del 10-Q de los ingresos cloud brutos.** La ca├Гda del 28-abr (S&P -0,49%, Nasdaq -0,9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) fue la primera grieta material en la cinta ┬Фcapex IA por fe┬╗; los resultados del 29-abr fueron un reset mixto (MSFT/GOOGL batieron con fuerza, META -7% AH); los resultados de AAPL del 30-abr cierran el ciclo Mag 7. Microsoft ya cit├│ expl├Гcitamente una tasa anual de IA de $37B (+123%) Рђћ ese es el precedente de divulgaci├│n. Con la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B-$25B (concentraci├│n de ingresos 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), la presi├│n SEC + buyside para divulgaci├│n expl├Гcita de margen por token + WAU converge alrededor de los ciclos de resultados Q2-Q3 2026. La decisi├│n de Powell de quedarse en la Junta como freno a la investigaci├│n Fed de Trump tambi├Еn eleva la prima de riesgo pol├Гtico sobre toda la cinta de capex IA; exigir cifras m├Аs duras es la palanca que tienen los mercados p├║blicos.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **(Non-tech) Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision ay magti-trigger ng 2026 SEC + analyst push para sa AI-revenue disclosure rewrite Рђћ bago matapos ang Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ang magsi-ship ng audited monthly-revenue o WAU disclosure cadence, at hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang magbubukod ng Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin sa 10-Q footnotes mula sa raw cloud revenue.** Ang Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) ang unang material crack sa AI-capex-on-faith tape; ang Apr 29 prints ay mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL malakas na beat, META -7% AH); ang Apr 30 AAPL prints ang nagsasara sa Mag 7 cycle. Tahasang sinipi na ng Microsoft ang $37B AI run rate (+123%) Рђћ iyon ang disclosure precedent. Sa Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang SEC + buyside pressure para sa explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure ay magko-converge sa Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Board bilang check sa Trump-admin Fed investigation ay nagdadagdag din ng political-risk premium sa buong AI-capex tape; ang paghingi ng mas matitigas na numero ang lever ng public markets.

nodes.description: **(Tech) By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave Рђћ at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) publishes per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs as a single comparable disclosure, and at least one non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ships a mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal with parallel SLA disclosure.** Apr 27 MicrosoftРђЊOpenAI partnership reset removed the cloud-exclusivity clause; Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) is the first cross-cloud frontier-model deployment in the post-exclusivity world; Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure is the developer-side primitive; Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview is the orchestration substrate; Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview is the parallel non-Bedrock path. The forcing function is enterprise procurement Рђћ once frontier models cross-deploy, the buyer's first comparison stops being "model" and starts being "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals.

The forcing function is enterprise procurement Рђћ once frontier models cross-deploy, the buyer's first comparison stops being "model" and starts being "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals.
description.ja: **(Tech) 2026т╣┤СИІТюЪсЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂOpenAI on AWS Bedrock + Microsoft сЃЕсѓцсѓ╗сЃ│сѓ╣жЮъуІгтЇатїќсЂ«сЃфсѓ╗сЃЃсЃѕсЂїсЃъсЃФсЃЂсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсЂ«сЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбсЃбсЃЄсЃФ SLA ТеЎТ║ќтїќсѓњт╝ЋсЂЇУхисЂЊсЂЎ Рђћ Big-3 сЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕ(AWS, Azure, GCP)сЂ«сЂєсЂАт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1 уцЙсЂїсЃбсЃЄсЃФтѕЦсЃгсѓцсЃєсЃ│сѓи / сѓ╣сЃФсЃ╝сЃЌсЃЃсЃѕ / тЈ»ућеТђД SLA сѓњТ»ћУ╝ЃтЈ»УЃйсЂфтЇўСИђсЃЋсѓЕсЃ╝сЃъсЃЃсЃѕсЂДтЁгжќІсЂЌсђЂжЮъ OpenAI сЂ«сЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбсЃЕсЃю(AnthropicсђЂGoogle DeepMindсђЂxAI)сЂ«сЂєсЂАт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1 уцЙсЂїсђїтЁесѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсЂФсЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбсђЇтъІсЂ«сЃЪсЃЕсЃ╝тЦЉу┤ёсѓњ SLA жќІуц║сЂетЁ▒сЂФуиаухљсЂЎсѓІсђѓ** 4/27 MicrosoftРђЊOpenAI тєЇТДІТѕљсЂДсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅуІгтЇасЂїтцќсѓїсђЂ4/28 OpenAI on Bedrock(жЎљт«џсЃЌсЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝)сЂїуІгтЇаУДБжЎцтЙїтѕЮсЂ«сѓ»сЃГсѓ╣сѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсЃ╗сЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбжЁЇтѓЎсђЂ4/30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 сЂ«сЃбсЃЄсЃФсЃЌсЃГсЃљсѓцсЃђСИ╗т░јсЃбсЃЄсЃФуЎ║УдІ + Bedrock сѓбсѓФсѓдсЃ│сЃѕуіХТЁІтЁгжќІсЂїжќІуЎ║УђЁтЂ┤сЃЌсЃфсЃЪсЃєсѓБсЃќсђЂ4/28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14 сЃфсЃ╝сѓИсЃДсЃ│ GA + Managed Harness 4 сЃфсЃ╝сѓИсЃДсЃ│сЃЌсЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝сЂїсѓфсЃ╝сѓ▒сѓ╣сЃѕсЃгсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│тЪ║уЏцсђЂ4/30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox сЃЌсЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝сЂїжЮъ Bedrock у│╗сЂ«СИдУх░ухїУи»сђѓжДєтІЋтіЏсЂ»сѓесЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓ║сЂ«Уф┐жЂћ Рђћ сЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбсЃбсЃЄсЃФсЂїсѓ»сЃГсѓ╣т▒ЋжќІсЂЋсѓїсЂЪуъгжќЊсђЂУ│╝У▓иТІЁтйЊсЂ«ТюђтѕЮсЂ«Т»ћУ╝ЃУ╗ИсЂ»сђїсЃбсЃЄсЃФсђЇсЂІсѓЅсђїсЃбсЃЄсЃФ + SLA on cloud-of-recordсђЇсЂФтцЅсѓЈсѓІсђѓSLA ТеЎТ║ќтїќсЂ«ТюђтѕЮсЂ«ТЅЊсЂАТЅІсЂ» AWS Bedrock(сЃбсЃЄсЃФжЂИТіъУѓбсЂїт║ЃсЂЈсђЂсѓесЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓ║сѓ│сЃ│сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓбсЃ│сѓ╣тД┐тІбсЂїТюђт╝и)сЂїТюЅтіЏсђЂжЮъ OpenAI сЂ«сЃЪсЃЕсЃ╝сЂ» 4/27 Microsoft сЂ«жЮъуІгтЇаТќЄУеђсЂїсђїOpenAI УБйтЊЂсђЇсЂФТўјуц║уџёсЂФжЎљт«џсЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂісѓісђЂAnthropic сЂФуЕ║уЎйсѓњТ«ІсЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІсЂЪсѓЂ Anthropic сЂїТюђТюЅтіЏсђѓ
description.es: **(Tech) Para el segundo semestre de 2026 el reset OpenAI-en-AWS-Bedrock + licencia de Microsoft no exclusiva desencadena una ola de estandarizaci├│n de SLA para modelos frontier multinube Рђћ al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) publica SLA por modelo (latencia / rendimiento / disponibilidad) como una divulgaci├│n comparable ├║nica, y al menos un laboratorio frontier no-OpenAI (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) cierra un acuerdo espejo de "frontier en cualquier nube" con divulgaci├│n paralela de SLA.** El reset MicrosoftРђЊOpenAI del 27/abr elimin├│ la cl├Аusula de exclusividad cloud; OpenAI en Bedrock del 28/abr (vista previa limitada) es el primer despliegue cross-cloud frontier en el mundo post-exclusividad; el 30/abr Codex CLI 0.128.0 con descubrimiento de modelos a cargo del proveedor + exposici├│n de estado de cuenta de Bedrock es la primitiva del lado desarrollador; el 28/abr AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI GA en 14 regiones + Managed Harness en 4 regiones en preview es el sustrato de orquestaci├│n; el 30/abr Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + preview de Toolbox es el camino paralelo no-Bedrock. La fuerza motriz es la procura empresarial Рђћ una vez que los modelos frontier despliegan en varias nubes, la primera comparaci├│n del comprador deja de ser "modelo" y pasa a ser "modelo + SLA en cloud-of-record". El primero en estandarizar SLA es muy probablemente AWS Bedrock (mayor selecci├│n de modelos y postura de cumplimiento empresarial m├Аs fuerte); el primer espejo no-OpenAI es muy probablemente Anthropic, dado que el lenguaje no-exclusivo de Microsoft del 27/abr aplica expl├Гcitamente a "productos de OpenAI" y deja espacio en blanco para acuerdos paralelos.
description.fil: **(Tech) Pagdating ng H2 2026, ang OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset ay maglulunsad ng multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave Рђћ magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) ng per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs bilang single comparable disclosure, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ng mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal na may parallel SLA disclosure.** Tinanggal ng Apr 27 MicrosoftРђЊOpenAI partnership reset ang cloud-exclusivity clause; ang Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) ang unang cross-cloud frontier-model deployment sa post-exclusivity world; ang Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure ang developer-side primitive; ang Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview ang orchestration substrate; ang Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview ang parallel non-Bedrock path. Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement Рђћ kapag nag-cross-deploy na ang frontier models, ang unang comparison ng buyer ay hindi na "model" kundi "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". Ang unang SLA-standardization mover ay malamang AWS Bedrock (dahil pinakamarami ang model selection at pinaka-strong ang enterprise compliance posture); ang unang non-OpenAI mirror ay malamang Anthropic dahil ang Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language ay nag-aapply lang sa "OpenAI products" at gumagawa ng white-space para sa parallel deals.

The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals.
summary.ja: **(Tech) 2026т╣┤СИІТюЪсЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂOpenAI on AWS Bedrock + Microsoft сЃЕсѓцсѓ╗сЃ│сѓ╣жЮъуІгтЇатїќсЂ«сЃфсѓ╗сЃЃсЃѕсЂїсЃъсЃФсЃЂсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсЂ«сЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбсЃбсЃЄсЃФ SLA ТеЎТ║ќтїќсѓњт╝ЋсЂЇУхисЂЊсЂЎ Рђћ Big-3 сЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕ(AWS, Azure, GCP)сЂ«сЂєсЂАт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1 уцЙсЂїсЃбсЃЄсЃФтѕЦсЃгсѓцсЃєсЃ│сѓи / сѓ╣сЃФсЃ╝сЃЌсЃЃсЃѕ / тЈ»ућеТђД SLA сѓњТ»ћУ╝ЃтЈ»УЃйсЂфтЇўСИђсЃЋсѓЕсЃ╝сЃъсЃЃсЃѕсЂДтЁгжќІсЂЌсђЂжЮъ OpenAI сЂ«сЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбсЃЕсЃю(AnthropicсђЂGoogle DeepMindсђЂxAI)сЂ«сЂєсЂАт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ 1 уцЙсЂїсђїтЁесѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсЂФсЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбсђЇтъІсЂ«сЃЪсЃЕсЃ╝тЦЉу┤ёсѓњ SLA жќІуц║сЂетЁ▒сЂФуиаухљсЂЎсѓІсђѓ** 4/27 MicrosoftРђЊOpenAI тєЇТДІТѕљсЂДсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅуІгтЇасЂїтцќсѓїсђЂ4/28 OpenAI on Bedrock(жЎљт«џсЃЌсЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝)сЂїуІгтЇаУДБжЎцтЙїтѕЮсЂ«сѓ»сЃГсѓ╣сѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсЃ╗сЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбжЁЇтѓЎсђЂ4/30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 сЂ«сЃбсЃЄсЃФсЃЌсЃГсЃљсѓцсЃђСИ╗т░јсЃбсЃЄсЃФуЎ║УдІ + Bedrock сѓбсѓФсѓдсЃ│сЃѕуіХТЁІтЁгжќІсЂїжќІуЎ║УђЁтЂ┤сЃЌсЃфсЃЪсЃєсѓБсЃќсђЂ4/28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14 сЃфсЃ╝сѓИсЃДсЃ│ GA + Managed Harness 4 сЃфсЃ╝сѓИсЃДсЃ│сЃЌсЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝сЂїсѓфсЃ╝сѓ▒сѓ╣сЃѕсЃгсЃ╝сѓисЃДсЃ│тЪ║уЏцсђЂ4/30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox сЃЌсЃгсЃЊсЃЦсЃ╝сЂїжЮъ Bedrock у│╗сЂ«СИдУх░ухїУи»сђѓжДєтІЋтіЏсЂ»сѓесЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓ║сЂ«Уф┐жЂћ Рђћ сЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбсЃбсЃЄсЃФсЂїсѓ»сЃГсѓ╣т▒ЋжќІсЂЋсѓїсЂЪуъгжќЊсђЂУ│╝У▓иТІЁтйЊсЂ«ТюђтѕЮсЂ«Т»ћУ╝ЃУ╗ИсЂ»сђїсЃбсЃЄсЃФсђЇсЂІсѓЅсђїсЃбсЃЄсЃФ + SLA on cloud-of-recordсђЇсЂФтцЅсѓЈсѓІсђѓSLA ТеЎТ║ќтїќсЂ«ТюђтѕЮсЂ«ТЅЊсЂАТЅІсЂ» AWS Bedrock(сЃбсЃЄсЃФжЂИТіъУѓбсЂїт║ЃсЂЈсђЂсѓесЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓ║сѓ│сЃ│сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓбсЃ│сѓ╣тД┐тІбсЂїТюђт╝и)сЂїТюЅтіЏсђЂжЮъ OpenAI сЂ«сЃЪсЃЕсЃ╝сЂ» 4/27 Microsoft сЂ«жЮъуІгтЇаТќЄУеђсЂїсђїOpenAI УБйтЊЂсђЇсЂФТўјуц║уџёсЂФжЎљт«џсЂЋсѓїсЂдсЂісѓісђЂAnthropic сЂФуЕ║уЎйсѓњТ«ІсЂЌсЂдсЂёсѓІсЂЪсѓЂ Anthropic сЂїТюђТюЅтіЏсђѓ
summary.es: **(Tech) Para el segundo semestre de 2026 el reset OpenAI-en-AWS-Bedrock + licencia de Microsoft no exclusiva desencadena una ola de estandarizaci├│n de SLA para modelos frontier multinube Рђћ al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) publica SLA por modelo (latencia / rendimiento / disponibilidad) como una divulgaci├│n comparable ├║nica, y al menos un laboratorio frontier no-OpenAI (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) cierra un acuerdo espejo de "frontier en cualquier nube" con divulgaci├│n paralela de SLA.** El reset MicrosoftРђЊOpenAI del 27/abr elimin├│ la cl├Аusula de exclusividad cloud; OpenAI en Bedrock del 28/abr (vista previa limitada) es el primer despliegue cross-cloud frontier en el mundo post-exclusividad; el 30/abr Codex CLI 0.128.0 con descubrimiento de modelos a cargo del proveedor + exposici├│n de estado de cuenta de Bedrock es la primitiva del lado desarrollador; el 28/abr AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI GA en 14 regiones + Managed Harness en 4 regiones en preview es el sustrato de orquestaci├│n; el 30/abr Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + preview de Toolbox es el camino paralelo no-Bedrock. La fuerza motriz es la procura empresarial Рђћ una vez que los modelos frontier despliegan en varias nubes, la primera comparaci├│n del comprador deja de ser "modelo" y pasa a ser "modelo + SLA en cloud-of-record". El primero en estandarizar SLA es muy probablemente AWS Bedrock (mayor selecci├│n de modelos y postura de cumplimiento empresarial m├Аs fuerte); el primer espejo no-OpenAI es muy probablemente Anthropic, dado que el lenguaje no-exclusivo de Microsoft del 27/abr aplica expl├Гcitamente a "productos de OpenAI" y deja espacio en blanco para acuerdos paralelos.
summary.fil: **(Tech) Pagdating ng H2 2026, ang OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset ay maglulunsad ng multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave Рђћ magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) ng per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs bilang single comparable disclosure, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ng mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal na may parallel SLA disclosure.** Tinanggal ng Apr 27 MicrosoftРђЊOpenAI partnership reset ang cloud-exclusivity clause; ang Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) ang unang cross-cloud frontier-model deployment sa post-exclusivity world; ang Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure ang developer-side primitive; ang Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview ang orchestration substrate; ang Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview ang parallel non-Bedrock path. Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement Рђћ kapag nag-cross-deploy na ang frontier models, ang unang comparison ng buyer ay hindi na "model" kundi "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". Ang unang SLA-standardization mover ay malamang AWS Bedrock (dahil pinakamarami ang model selection at pinaka-strong ang enterprise compliance posture); ang unang non-OpenAI mirror ay malamang Anthropic dahil ang Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language ay nag-aapply lang sa "OpenAI products" at gumagawa ng white-space para sa parallel deals.

nodes.short_label: Tech) By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 36Рђд
nodes.description: **(Tech) By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model Рђћ at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel.

description.en: **(Tech) By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model Рђћ at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel.
description.ja: **(ТіђУАЊ) 2026т╣┤угг4тЏЏтЇіТюЪсЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂMicrosoft Agent 365 GA(ТюѕжАЇ$15сђЂM365 E7)+ Cisco DefenseClaw сѓфсЃ╝сЃЌсЃ│сѓйсЃ╝сѓ╣(3Тюѕ23ТЌЦ)+ CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA(4Тюѕ29ТЌЦ)+ AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness(4Тюѕ28ТЌЦ)сЂ«сѓ╣сѓ┐сЃЃсѓ»сЂїсѓесЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓ║ AI сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсЃ╗сѓ│сЃ│сЃѕсЃГсЃ╝сЃФсЃЌсЃгсЃ╝сЃ│сЂ«тЈѓуЁДсЃбсЃЄсЃФсЂИтЈјТќѓсЂЎсѓІсђѓBig-3 сЃЈсѓцсЃЉсЃ╝сѓ╣сѓ▒сЃ╝сЃЕсЃ╝(AWS, Azure, GCP)сЂ«сЂєсЂАт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ2уцЙсЂїсЃєсЃісЃ│сЃѕсЃгсЃЎсЃФсЂДсЃЮсЃфсѓисЃ╝сЃЎсЃ╝сѓ╣сЂ« MCP сѓхсЃ╝сЃљсЃ╝Уе▒тЈ»сЃ╗сЃќсЃГсЃЃсѓ»тѕХтЙАсЂеуЏБТЪ╗ТИѕсЂ┐сЃёсЃ╝сЃФтЉ╝сЂ│тЄ║сЂЌсЃГсѓ░сѓњсЃЄсЃЋсѓЕсЃФсЃѕсѓфсЃ│тЪ║ТюгТЕЪУЃйсЂесЂЌсЂдТЈљСЙЏсђѓт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ1сЂцсЂ«уІгуФІсѓ│сЃ│сЃѕсЃГсЃ╝сЃФсЃЌсЃгсЃ╝сЃ│сЃЎсЃ│сЃђсЃ╝(Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI)сЂї Sec-Labels тйбт╝ЈсЂ«сѓбсЃ╝сЃєсѓБсЃЋсѓАсѓ»сЃѕуй▓тљЇсѓ▓сЃ╝сЃѕсѓњтЁгжќІсЂЎсѓІсђѓ** т╝итѕХУдЂтЏасЂ»сѓесЃ│сѓ┐сЃ╝сЃЌсЃЕсѓцсѓ║Уф┐жЂћсђѓMicrosoft сЂ»сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсЃ╗сѓ│сЃ│сЃѕсЃГсЃ╝сЃФсЃЌсЃгсЃ╝сЃ│тѕєжЄјсЂФсЃдсЃ╝сѓХсЃ╝тЇўСЙА($15/user/Тюѕ)сѓњС╗ўсЂЉсђЂAWS сЂе Google сЂїтљїуГЅсЂ«жќІуц║сЂДт┐юсЂўсѓІт┐ЁУдЂсЂїућЪсЂўсѓІСЙАТа╝сѓбсЃ│сѓФсЃ╝сѓњУеГт«џсЂЌсЂЪсђѓ4Тюѕ30ТЌЦсЂ« OpenAI Agents SDK + 7сЂцсЂ«сѓхсЃ│сЃЅсЃюсЃЃсѓ»сѓ╣сЃЌсЃГсЃљсѓцсЃђсЃ╝сЂїсЃЕсЃ│сѓ┐сѓцсЃатЂ┤сѓњсђЂ5Тюѕ1ТЌЦсЂ« GA сЂїсЃЮсЃфсѓисЃ╝тЂ┤сѓњТЌбтГў M365 у«АуљєжЮб(Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender)сЂФТјЦуХџсЂЎсѓІсђѓ5Тюѕ1ТЌЦ GA сЂ« Defender У│ЄућБсѓ│сЃ│сЃєсѓГсѓ╣сЃѕсЃъсЃЃсЃћсЃ│сѓ░(сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсЂћсЂесЂ«сЃЄсЃљсѓцсѓ╣ + MCP сѓхсЃ╝сЃљсЃ╝ + ID + сѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсЃфсѓйсЃ╝сѓ╣)сЂї2026т╣┤6ТюѕсЂФтЄ║УЇисЂЋсѓїсѓІсЂеС║Іт«ЪСИісЂ«сѓ╣сѓГсЃ╝сЃъсЂесЂфсѓІсђѓM365 УеГуй«тЪ║уЏцсЂесЂёсЂєсѓбсЃ│сѓФсЃ╝сѓњтц▒сѓЈсЂфсЂёсЂЪсѓЂсђЂAWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden сЂїугг4тЏЏтЇіТюЪтЅЇсЂФСИдУАїсѓ╣сѓГсЃ╝сЃъсѓњтЁгжќІсЂЎсѓІсЂ«сЂїТюђт░ЈТіхТіЌуиџсђѓCSAI сЂ« MITRE-CNA сЃфсѓ║сЃасЂїжќІуц║тЂ┤сѓњСИдУАїсЂЌсЂдтюДуИ«сЂЎсѓІсђѓ

Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel.

prediction_summary_locales.es: **(Tecnolog├Гa) Para el Q4 2026, la pila Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/usuario, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (23 de marzo) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (29 de abril) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (28 de abril) converge en un modelo de referencia de plano de control de agentes empresariales Рђћ al menos 2 de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) lanzan aplicaci├│n basada en pol├Гticas de permitir/bloquear de servidores MCP a nivel de tenant con logs auditados de invocaci├│n de herramientas como primitiva activada por defecto; al menos un proveedor independiente de plano de control (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publica una puerta de atestaci├│n de artefactos al estilo Sec-Labels.** El forzamiento es la adquisici├│n empresarial: Microsoft acaba de poner una etiqueta de precio por usuario ($15/usuario/mes) a la categor├Гa de plano de control de agentes, fijando el ancla de precio a la que AWS + Google deben responder con divulgaciones comparables; el Agents SDK de OpenAI del 30 de abril + 7 proveedores de sandbox preconfeccionaron el lado runtime, y el GA del 1 de mayo cablea el lado de pol├Гticas a una superficie M365 admin existente (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Cuando el mapeo de contexto de activos de Defender del GA del 1 de mayo (dispositivos + servidores MCP + identidades + recursos cloud por agente) se lance en junio de 2026 se convierte en el esquema de facto; la ruta de menor resistencia es que AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden publiquen esquemas paralelos antes del Q4 para no perder el ancla de la base instalada de M365. La cadencia de MITRE-CNA de CSAI comprimir├А el lado de divulgaci├│n en paralelo.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **(Tech) Sa Q4 2026, ang stack na Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (March 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (April 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (April 28) ay magtatagpo sa enterprise agent-control-plane reference model Рђћ kahit 2 sa Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ay maglalabas ng policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement sa tenant level na may audited tool-invocation logs bilang default-on primitive; kahit isang independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) ay maglalabas ng Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: nag-set ang Microsoft ng per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) sa agent-control-plane category, na nagiging pricing-anchor na kailangang sagutin ng AWS + Google ng comparable disclosures; ang April 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers ang nag-pre-bake sa runtime side, at ang May 1 GA ay nag-wire sa policy side patungo sa existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Kapag nag-ship sa Hunyo 2026 ang Defender asset-context mapping ng May 1 GA (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources kada agent) ay magiging de-facto schema; pinakamadaling daan na maglabas ng parallel schemas ang AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden bago Q4 para hindi mawala ang M365-installed-base anchor. Pa-compress ng disclosure side parallel ang CSAI MITRE-CNA cadence.

nodes.description: **(Tech) By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern Рђћ at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way.

description.es: **(Tecnolog├Гa) Para el H2 2026 el tr├Гo plazo BOD-22-01 de 14 d├Гas del Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) del 1 de mayo + ventana de explotaci├│n de 26 horas del LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 30 de abril + el sin parchar al 1 de mayo SGLang CVE-2026-5760 hace de la "armamentizaci├│n de cadena de suministro de CVEs en la capa de tooling LLM" el patr├│n de atacante dominante Рђћ al menos una firma de IR importante publica un post-mortem p├║blico de una intrusi├│n real que empareja un CVE de gateway-LLM/agent-harness/inference-runtime con un LPE de kernel Linux (Copy Fail o su sucesor) para una cadena completa root-en-inferencia-multi-tenant, y al menos una advisory emitida por CSAI-CNA carve-out expl├Гcitamente la cadena LLM-tooling + kernel como t├Еcnica nombrada dentro del Defense Impairment de ATT&CK v19.** ATT&CK v19 del 28 de abril ya nombra las t├Еcnicas ag├Еnticas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocaci├│n de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); la ola Copy Fail del 1 de mayo da a los atacantes un LPE Linux universal con uso confirmado in-the-wild contra proveedores cloud (seg├║n divulgaci├│n del Microsoft Security Blog); el precedente de SQLi-fila-fuga-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys de LiteLLM les da el vector de movimiento lateral. La autorizaci├│n CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI es el lado de emisi├│n de divulgaciones; la ruta de menor resistencia para un informe de incidente del Q3 de una firma IR es una intrusi├│n cloud multi-tenant ensamblada exactamente as├Г.
description.fil: **(Tech) Sa H2 2026, ang trio ng May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + April 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + ang unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay magpapadominante sa "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" bilang attacker pattern Рђћ kahit isang major IR firm ay maglalabas ng public post-mortem ng totoong intrusion na pinagsasama ang LLM-gateway/agent-harness/inference-runtime CVE sa Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail o ang successor nito) para sa full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, at kahit isang CSAI-CNA-issued advisory ay explicitly mag-carve-out ng LLM-tooling + kernel chain bilang named technique sa loob ng Defense Impairment ng ATT&CK v19.** Pinangalanan na ng April 28 ATT&CK v19 ang agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); binibigyan ng May 1 Copy Fail wave ang attackers ng universal-Linux LPE na may confirmed in-the-wild use laban sa cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); ang LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent ang nagbibigay sa kanila ng lateral-movement vector. Ang April 29 CSAI CNA authorization ang disclosure-issuance side; pinakamadaling daan para sa Q3 incident report ng IR firm ay isang cloud-multi-tenant intrusion na pinagsama-sama nang ganito.

summary.en: **(Tech) By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern Рђћ at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way.
summary.ja: **(ТіђУАЊ) 2026т╣┤СИІтЇіТюЪсЂЙсЂДсЂФсђЂ5Тюѕ1ТЌЦ Copy Fail(CVE-2026-31431)BOD-22-01 14ТЌЦТюЪжЎљ + 4Тюѕ30ТЌЦ LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26ТЎѓжќЊТѓфућесѓдсѓБсЃ│сЃЅсѓд + 5Тюѕ2ТЌЦТЎѓуѓ╣сЂДТюфсЃЉсЃЃсЃЂсЂ« SGLang CVE-2026-5760 сЂесЂёсЂє3уѓ╣сѓ╗сЃЃсЃѕсЂїсђїLLMсЃёсЃ╝сЃфсЃ│сѓ░т▒ц CVE сЂ«сѓхсЃЌсЃЕсѓцсЃЂсѓДсЃ╝сЃ│ТГдтЎетїќсђЇсѓњТћ»жЁЇуџёсЂфТћ╗ТњЃУђЁсЃЉсѓ┐сЃ╝сЃ│сЂФТі╝сЂЌСИісЂњсѓІсђѓт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ1сЂцсЂ«СИ╗УдЂ IR С╝ЂТЦГсЂїсђЂLLMсѓ▓сЃ╝сЃѕсѓдсѓДсѓцсЃ╗сѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕсЃЈсЃ╝сЃЇсѓ╣сЃ╗ТјеУФќсЃЕсЃ│сѓ┐сѓцсЃасЂ« CVE сЂе Linux сѓФсЃ╝сЃЇсЃФ LPE(Copy Fail сЂЙсЂЪсЂ»сЂЮсЂ«тЙїуХЎ)сѓњухёсЂ┐тљѕсѓЈсЂЏсЂдсЃъсЃФсЃЂсЃєсЃісЃ│сЃѕТјеУФќтЪ║уЏцсЂФт»ЙсЂЎсѓІт«їтЁесЃЂсѓДсЃ╝сЃ│ root сѓњт«ЪуЈЙсЂЌсЂЪт«ЪжџЏсЂ«СЙхт«│сЂФсЂцсЂёсЂдтЁгжќІсЃЮсѓ╣сЃѕсЃбсЃ╝сЃєсЃасѓњуЎ║УАесЂЎсѓІсђѓт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓ1С╗ХсЂ« CSAI-CNA уЎ║УАїсѓбсЃЅсЃљсѓцсѓХсЃфсЂї LLMсЃёсЃ╝сЃфсЃ│сѓ░+сѓФсЃ╝сЃЇсЃФсЃЂсѓДсЃ╝сЃ│сѓњ ATT&CK v19 сЂ« Defense Impairment тєЁсЂ«тљЇтЅЇС╗ўсЂЇТЅІТ│ЋсЂесЂЌсЂдТўјуц║сЂЎсѓІсђѓ** 4Тюѕ28ТЌЦсЂ« ATT&CK v19 сЂїТЌбсЂФсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕТЅІТ│Ћ(сѓ│сЃ│сЃєсѓГсѓ╣сЃѕТ▒џТЪЊсђЂсЃёсЃ╝сЃФтЉ╝сЂ│тЄ║сЂЌТѓфућесђЂMCP сѓхсЃ╝сЃљсЃ╝СЙхт«│сђЂТѓфТёЈсЂѓсѓІсѓесЃ╝сѓИсѓДсЃ│сЃѕт▒ЋжќІ)сѓњтЉйтљЇТИѕсЂ┐сђѓ5Тюѕ1ТЌЦсЂ« Copy Fail сЂ»Тћ╗ТњЃУђЁсЂФсЃдсЃІсЃљсЃ╝сѓхсЃФ Linux LPE сѓњТЈљСЙЏсЂЌсђЂMicrosoft Security Blog сЂїсѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсѓхсЃ╝сЃЊсѓ╣сЃЌсЃГсЃљсѓцсЃђсЃ╝сЂИсЂ«т«Ъуњ░тбЃтѕЕућесѓњуб║УфЇТИѕсЂ┐сђѓLiteLLM сЂ« SQLi 1УАїТ╝ЈсЂѕсЂёсЂї OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock сѓГсЃ╝сѓњТхЂтЄ║сЂЋсЂЏсѓІтЁѕСЙІсЂїТефт▒ЋжќІсЃЎсѓ»сЃѕсЃФсѓњСИјсЂѕсѓІсђѓCSAI сЂ«4Тюѕ29ТЌЦ CNA УфЇт«џсЂїжќІуц║уЎ║УАїтЂ┤сЂДсђЂIR С╝ЂТЦГсЂ«угг3тЏЏтЇіТюЪсѓцсЃ│сѓисЃЄсЃ│сЃѕсЃгсЃЮсЃ╝сЃѕсЂДсЂЊсЂ«ухёсЂ┐тљѕсѓЈсЂЏсЂї1С╗ХсЂ«сѓ»сЃЕсѓдсЃЅсЃ╗сЃъсЃФсЃЂсЃєсЃісЃ│сЃѕСЙхт«│сЂесЂЌсЂдуЎ╗та┤сЂЎсѓІсЂ«сЂїТюђт░ЈТіхТіЌуиџсђѓ

prediction_summary_locales.es: **(Tecnolog├Гa) Para el H2 2026 el tr├Гo plazo BOD-22-01 de 14 d├Гas del Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) del 1 de mayo + ventana de explotaci├│n de 26 horas del LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 30 de abril + el sin parchar al 1 de mayo SGLang CVE-2026-5760 hace de la "armamentizaci├│n de cadena de suministro de CVEs en la capa de tooling LLM" el patr├│n de atacante dominante Рђћ al menos una firma de IR importante publica un post-mortem p├║blico de una intrusi├│n real que empareja un CVE de gateway-LLM/agent-harness/inference-runtime con un LPE de kernel Linux (Copy Fail o su sucesor) para una cadena completa root-en-inferencia-multi-tenant, y al menos una advisory emitida por CSAI-CNA carve-out expl├Гcitamente la cadena LLM-tooling + kernel como t├Еcnica nombrada dentro del Defense Impairment de ATT&CK v19.** ATT&CK v19 del 28 de abril ya nombra las t├Еcnicas ag├Еnticas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocaci├│n de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); la ola Copy Fail del 1 de mayo da a los atacantes un LPE Linux universal con uso confirmado in-the-wild contra proveedores cloud (seg├║n divulgaci├│n del Microsoft Security Blog); el precedente de SQLi-fila-fuga-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys de LiteLLM les da el vector de movimiento lateral. La autorizaci├│n CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI es el lado de emisi├│n de divulgaciones; la ruta de menor resistencia para un informe de incidente del Q3 de una firma IR es una intrusi├│n cloud multi-tenant ensamblada exactamente as├Г.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **(Tech) Sa H2 2026, ang trio ng May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + April 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + ang unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay magpapadominante sa "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" bilang attacker pattern Рђћ kahit isang major IR firm ay maglalabas ng public post-mortem ng totoong intrusion na pinagsasama ang LLM-gateway/agent-harness/inference-runtime CVE sa Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail o ang successor nito) para sa full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, at kahit isang CSAI-CNA-issued advisory ay explicitly mag-carve-out ng LLM-tooling + kernel chain bilang named technique sa loob ng Defense Impairment ng ATT&CK v19.** Pinangalanan na ng April 28 ATT&CK v19 ang agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); binibigyan ng May 1 Copy Fail wave ang attackers ng universal-Linux LPE na may confirmed in-the-wild use laban sa cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); ang LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent ang nagbibigay sa kanila ng lateral-movement vector. Ang April 29 CSAI CNA authorization ang disclosure-issuance side; pinakamadaling daan para sa Q3 incident report ng IR firm ay isang cloud-multi-tenant intrusion na pinagsama-sama nang ganito.

nodes.description: **(Non-tech) The May 1 Pentagon-snubs-Anthropic + 7-vendor classified-network AI deal becomes the first US presidential-administration vs frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons-use line in the sand Рђћ by Q3 2026 at least two other frontier labs (Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere) explicitly publish a use-of-force / autonomous-weapons carve-out in their public ToS or DoD bid responses; Anthropic's federal-judge-blocked Trump-admin freeze (April CA ruling) becomes the operative procurement-law precedent; Q3 earnings calls add an "autonomous-weapons exposure" disclosure line for the cohort.** Forcing function is litigation precedent: the federal-judge block already exists, so any future DoD freeze action against a competing lab now has a court-tested predicate. Trump's "deal is possible" framing on Apr 17 + the May 1 contract signings are the carrot-and-stick choreography; once a deal-or-no-deal binary becomes visible to the buyside, capital-allocation pressure will force every frontier-lab board to formally adopt either the Anthropic posture (carve-out, accept exclusion) or the OpenAI/Microsoft/Google posture (no carve-out, accept full DoD use). The middle position becomes untenable as soon as Q3 earnings cycle starts.

description.es: **(No t├Еcnico) El "Pent├Аgono excluye a Anthropic" del 1 de mayo + acuerdo de IA de 7 proveedores se convierte en la primera l├Гnea presidencial de EE. UU. vs laboratorio frontera de IA sobre uso en armas aut├│nomas Рђћ para el Q3 2026 al menos otros dos laboratorios frontera (Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere) publican expl├Гcitamente un carve-out de uso de fuerza/armas aut├│nomas en sus ToS p├║blicos o respuestas a licitaciones del DoD; la congelaci├│n de la administraci├│n Trump bloqueada por juez federal de Anthropic (sentencia CA de abril) se convierte en el precedente de derecho de adquisici├│n operativo; las llamadas de resultados del Q3 a├▒aden una l├Гnea de divulgaci├│n de "exposici├│n a armas aut├│nomas" para la cohorte.** El forzamiento es el precedente litigioso: el bloqueo del juez federal ya existe, as├Г que cualquier acci├│n futura de congelaci├│n del DoD contra un laboratorio competidor ahora tiene un predicado verificado en tribunales. La narrativa "deal is possible" de Trump del 17 de abril + las firmas del 1 de mayo son la coreograf├Гa zanahoria-y-palo; una vez que el binario hay-acuerdo-o-no-acuerdo se hace visible al lado comprador, la presi├│n de asignaci├│n de capital obligar├А a cada consejo de laboratorio frontera a adoptar formalmente o la postura Anthropic (carve-out, aceptar exclusi├│n) o la postura OpenAI/Microsoft/Google (sin carve-out, aceptar uso completo del DoD). La posici├│n intermedia se vuelve insostenible tan pronto comience el ciclo de resultados del Q3.
description.fil: **(Non-tech) Ang May 1 Pentagon-snubs-Anthropic + 7-vendor classified-network AI deal ay magiging unang US presidential-administration-vs-frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons-use line in the sand Рђћ sa Q3 2026, kahit dalawa pang frontier labs (Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere) ay explicitly maglalabas ng use-of-force / autonomous-weapons carve-out sa public ToS o DoD bid responses; ang Anthropic federal-judge-blocked Trump-admin freeze (April CA ruling) ay magiging operative procurement-law precedent; magdadagdag ang Q3 earnings calls ng "autonomous-weapons exposure" disclosure line para sa cohort.** Ang forcing function ay litigation precedent: existing na ang federal-judge block, kaya anumang future DoD freeze action laban sa kakumpitensyang lab ngayon ay may court-tested predicate. Ang "deal is possible" framing ni Trump noong April 17 + ang May 1 contract signings ang carrot-and-stick choreography; sa sandaling mag-binary ang deal-or-no-deal sa buyside, ipipilit ng capital-allocation pressure sa bawat frontier-lab board na pormal na adopt ang Anthropic posture (carve-out, accept exclusion) o ang OpenAI/Microsoft/Google posture (no carve-out, accept full DoD use). Hindi na maitatago ang gitnang posisyon sa simula pa lang ng Q3 earnings cycle.

The middle position becomes untenable as soon as Q3 earnings cycle starts.
summary.ja: **(жЮъТіђУАЊ) 5Тюѕ1ТЌЦсЂ«сђїтЏйжў▓уиЈуюЂсЂї Anthropic сѓњТјњжЎцсЂЌ7уцЙтЦЉу┤ёсђЇсЂїсђЂу▒│тцДух▒жаўТћ┐ТеЕсЂесЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбAIуаћуЕХТЅђсЂесЂ«УЄфтЙІтЁхтЎеСй┐ућесѓњсѓЂсЂљсѓІтѕЮсЂ«СИђуиџсЂесЂфсѓІсђѓ2026т╣┤угг3тЏЏтЇіТюЪсЂЙсЂДсЂФт░ЉсЂфсЂЈсЂесѓѓС╗ќсЂ«2сЂцсЂ«сЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбуаћуЕХТЅђ(Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere)сЂїтЁгжќІ ToS сЂЙсЂЪсЂ» DoD тЁЦТюГтЏъуГћсЂФТГдтіЏСй┐ућесЃ╗УЄфтЙІтЁхтЎесЂ«жЎцтцќТЮАжаЁсѓњТўјуц║сђѓAnthropic сЂ«жђБжѓдтѕцС║Іти«сЂЌТГбсѓЂ(4ТюѕCAтѕцТ▒║)сЂїсЃѕсЃЕсЃ│сЃЌТћ┐ТеЕтЄЇухљТјфуй«сЂ«СйютІЋтЈ»УЃйсЂфУф┐жЂћТ│ЋСИісЂ«тЅЇСЙІсЂесЂфсѓІсђѓугг3тЏЏтЇіТюЪТ▒║у«ЌжЏ╗УЕ▒С╝џУГ░сЂДсђїУЄфтЙІтЁхтЎесѓесѓ»сѓ╣сЃЮсЃ╝сѓИсЃБсЃ╝сђЇжќІуц║УАїсЂїТЦГуЋїтЁеСйЊсЂФУ┐йтіасЂЋсѓїсѓІсђѓ** т╝итѕХУдЂтЏасЂ»тѕцСЙІсђѓжђБжѓдтѕцС║Іти«сЂЌТГбсѓЂтѕцТ▒║сЂїТЌбсЂФтГўтюесЂЎсѓІсЂЪсѓЂсђЂуФХтљѕуаћуЕХТЅђсЂИсЂ«т░єТЮЦсЂ« DoD тЄЇухљТјфуй«сЂ»Т│Ћт╗иТцюУе╝ТИѕсЂ┐сЂ«тЅЇТЈљсѓњТїЂсЂцсђѓсЃѕсЃЕсЃ│сЃЌТ░ЈсЂ«4Тюѕ17ТЌЦсђїтљѕТёЈсЂ»тЈ»УЃйсђЇсЂе5Тюѕ1ТЌЦсЂ«тЦЉу┤ёуиаухљсЂ»сѓбсЃАсЂесЃасЃЂсЂ«Тї»С╗ўсЂЉсђѓУ▓исЂёТЅІтЂ┤сЂФсђїтљѕТёЈсЂЎсѓІсЂІсЂЌсЂфсЂёсЂІсђЇсЂїС║їУђЁТіъСИђсЂесЂЌсЂдтЈ»УдќтїќсЂЋсѓїсЂЪуъгжќЊсђЂУ│ЄТюгжЁЇтѕєтюДтіЏсЂФсѓѕсѓітЁесЃЋсЃГсЃ│сЃєсѓБсѓбуаћуЕХТЅђсЂ«тЈќуиатй╣С╝џсЂї Anthropic Уи»уиџ(жЎцтцќТЮАжаЁ + ТјњжЎцтЈЌт«╣)сЂІ OpenAI/Microsoft/Google Уи»уиџ(жЎцтцќТЮАжаЁсЂфсЂЌ + DoDтЁеСй┐ућетЈЌт«╣)сѓњТГБт╝ЈТјАТіъсЂЏсЂќсѓІсѓњтЙЌсЂфсЂЈсЂфсѓІсђѓугг3тЏЏтЇіТюЪТ▒║у«Ќсѓхсѓцсѓ»сЃФжќІтДІсЂетљїТЎѓсЂФСИГжќЊсЃЮсѓИсѓисЃДсЃ│сЂїуХГТїЂСИЇтЈ»УЃйсЂФсЂфсѓІсђѓ
summary.es: **(No t├Еcnico) El "Pent├Аgono excluye a Anthropic" del 1 de mayo + acuerdo de IA de 7 proveedores se convierte en la primera l├Гnea presidencial de EE. UU. vs laboratorio frontera de IA sobre uso en armas aut├│nomas Рђћ para el Q3 2026 al menos otros dos laboratorios frontera (Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere) publican expl├Гcitamente un carve-out de uso de fuerza/armas aut├│nomas en sus ToS p├║blicos o respuestas a licitaciones del DoD; la congelaci├│n de la administraci├│n Trump bloqueada por juez federal de Anthropic (sentencia CA de abril) se convierte en el precedente de derecho de adquisici├│n operativo; las llamadas de resultados del Q3 a├▒aden una l├Гnea de divulgaci├│n de "exposici├│n a armas aut├│nomas" para la cohorte.** El forzamiento es el precedente litigioso: el bloqueo del juez federal ya existe, as├Г que cualquier acci├│n futura de congelaci├│n del DoD contra un laboratorio competidor ahora tiene un predicado verificado en tribunales. La narrativa "deal is possible" de Trump del 17 de abril + las firmas del 1 de mayo son la coreograf├Гa zanahoria-y-palo; una vez que el binario hay-acuerdo-o-no-acuerdo se hace visible al lado comprador, la presi├│n de asignaci├│n de capital obligar├А a cada consejo de laboratorio frontera a adoptar formalmente o la postura Anthropic (carve-out, aceptar exclusi├│n) o la postura OpenAI/Microsoft/Google (sin carve-out, aceptar uso completo del DoD). La posici├│n intermedia se vuelve insostenible tan pronto comience el ciclo de resultados del Q3.
summary.fil: **(Non-tech) Ang May 1 Pentagon-snubs-Anthropic + 7-vendor classified-network AI deal ay magiging unang US presidential-administration-vs-frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons-use line in the sand Рђћ sa Q3 2026, kahit dalawa pang frontier labs (Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere) ay explicitly maglalabas ng use-of-force / autonomous-weapons carve-out sa public ToS o DoD bid responses; ang Anthropic federal-judge-blocked Trump-admin freeze (April CA ruling) ay magiging operative procurement-law precedent; magdadagdag ang Q3 earnings calls ng "autonomous-weapons exposure" disclosure line para sa cohort.** Ang forcing function ay litigation precedent: existing na ang federal-judge block, kaya anumang future DoD freeze action laban sa kakumpitensyang lab ngayon ay may court-tested predicate. Ang "deal is possible" framing ni Trump noong April 17 + ang May 1 contract signings ang carrot-and-stick choreography; sa sandaling mag-binary ang deal-or-no-deal sa buyside, ipipilit ng capital-allocation pressure sa bawat frontier-lab board na pormal na adopt ang Anthropic posture (carve-out, accept exclusion) o ang OpenAI/Microsoft/Google posture (no carve-out, accept full DoD use). Hindi na maitatago ang gitnang posisyon sa simula pa lang ng Q3 earnings cycle.

detail.title: Non-tech) The May 1 Pentagon-snubs-AnthРђд
detail.subtitle: Prediction ┬и Business
detail.description: **(Non-tech) The May 1 Pentagon-snubs-Anthropic + 7-vendor classified-network AI deal becomes the first US presidential-administration vs frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons-use line in the sand Рђћ by Q3 2026 at least two other frontier labs (Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere) explicitly publish a use-of-force / autonomous-weapons carve-out in their public ToS or DoD bid responses; Anthropic's federal-judge-blocked Trump-admin freeze (April CA ruling) becomes the operative procurement-law precedent; Q3 earnings calls add an "autonomous-weapons exposure" disclosure line for the cohort.** Forcing function is litigation precedent: the federal-judge block already exists, so any future DoD freeze action against a competing lab now has a court-tested predicate. Trump's "deal is possible" framing on Apr 17 + the May 1 contract signings are the carrot-and-stick choreography; once a deal-or-no-deal binary becomes visible to the buyside, capital-allocation pressure will force every frontier-lab board to formally adopt either the Anthropic posture (carve-out, accept exclusion) or the OpenAI/Microsoft/Google posture (no carve-out, accept full DoD use). The middle position becomes untenable as soon as Q3 earnings cycle starts.

nodes.label: **(Non-tech) The May 1 record S&P 7,230.12 + Nasdaq 25,114.44 + April best-month-since-2020 + AAPL +3.28% to $280.25 + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AРђд
nodes.description: **(Non-tech) The May 1 record S&P 7,230.12 + Nasdaq 25,114.44 + April best-month-since-2020 + AAPL +3.28% to $280.25 + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI-capex tape sets up the mid-May Cerebras IPO to price at or above the top of the $22-25B targeted range with a multi-day pop Рђћ the Apr 30 Apple +$100B buyback authorization + the Q3 guide (+14-17%) is the buyside ratification of the AI-capex-on-faith thesis, and the Cerebras roadshow lands into the cleanest single tape since 2020; pricing closer to the pre-IPO secondary $26-28B than the public S-1 $22-25B; first-day pop РЅЦ30% with the underwriter syndicate (Morgan Stanley / Citi / Barclays / UBS) pulling allocation aggressively from the long-only side; the IPO becomes the cohort signal that the AI-infrastructure-build is fundable through public markets and not just private capex.** $510M 2025 revenue + $20B+/750MW OpenAI deal through 2028 + the 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration is priced in already; the swing factor is the May 1 record-tape ratification of the AI-capex thesis, which the buyside has been waiting for since the Apr 28 OpenAI-revenue-miss WSJ. The mid-May window also avoids competing with the May 8 Apr Jobs print + the May 5 AMD print; pricing should land in the pre-Cerebras quiet-period sweet spot.
